040101.cherokee: ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎡᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
040101.english: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
040101.phonetic: Di-da-le-ni-s-gv Ka-no-he-dv e-he-i, a-le na-s-gi Ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsu-la-ha a-ne-he-i, a-le na-s-gi Ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-se-i.

040102.english: The same was in the beginning with God.

040103.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏢᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏬᏢᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ.
040103.english: All things were made by him; and without him was not any thing made that was made.
040103.phonetic: Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di na-s-gi u-wo-tlv-ne-i, a-le ni-ga-v go-tlv-nv-hi tsi-gi v-tla go-hu-s-di na-s-gi nu-wo-tlv-nv-na yi-gi.

040104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎧᏃᎮᏛ] ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏪᎮᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎢᎦ ᎤᎾᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ.
040104.english: In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
040104.phonetic: Na-s-gi [Ka-no-he-dv] gv-ni-dv u-we-he-i; a-le na-s-gi gv-ni-dv yv-wi i-ga u-na-ti-s-da-ne-hi ge-se-i.

040105.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏚᎸᏌᏕᎢ, ᎤᎵᏏᎩᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏓᏂᎸᏤᎢ.
040105.english: And the light shineth in darkness; and the darkness comprehended it not.
040105.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-ga--ga-ti-s-di-s-gi u-li-si-gv du-lv-sa-de-i, u-li-si-gi-no v-tla yi-du-da-ni-lv-tse-i.

040106.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎡᎲᎩ ᏣᏂ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040106.english: There was a man sent from God, whose name was John.
040106.phonetic: Gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya e-hv-gi Tsa-ni tsu-do-i-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv ge-sv-gi.

040107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᎤᏃᎮᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏗᏱ.
040107.english: The same came for a witness, to bear witness of the Light, that all men through him might believe.
040107.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-lu-tsv-gi ka-no-he-s-gi ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi I-ga--ga-ti u-no-he-di-yi, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi na-ni-v u-no-hi-yu-di-yi.

040108.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ.
040108.english: He was not that Light, but was sent to bear witness of that Light.
040108.phonetic: V-tla na-s-gi na I-ga--ga-ti yi-ge-se-i, ka-no-he-s-gi-quo-s-gi-ni ge-sv-gi na-s-gi I-ga--ga-ti.

040109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᎷᏨ, ᎢᎦ ᏥᏕᎠᏘᏍᏓᏁ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ.
040109.english: That was the true Light, which lighteth every man that cometh into the world.
040109.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na ka-no-he-dv u-do-hi-yu-sv I-ga--ga-ti ge-sv-gi; na-s-gi e-lo-hi tsu-lu-tsv, i-ga tsi-de-a-ti-s-da-ne na-ni-v yv-wi.

040110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏬᎵᏤᎢ.
040110.english: He was in the world, and the world was made by him, and the world knew him not.
040110.phonetic: Na-s-gi e-lo-hi e-hv-gi, a-le na-s-gi e-lo-hi u-wo-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-gi, a-le e-lo-hi v-tla yu-wo-li-tse-i.

040111.cherokee: ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏤᎢ.
040111.english: He came unto his own, and his own received him not.
040111.phonetic: U-tse-li-go-hi u-lu-tsv-gi, a-se-no tsu-tse-li v-tla yi-di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tse-i.

040112.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᏕᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅ Ꭿ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ;
040112.english: But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God, even to them that believe on his name:
040112.phonetic: Na-ni-v-s-gi-ni di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi de-u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-gi U-ne-la-nv hi tsu-we-tsi i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi; na-s-gi de-u-do-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi;

040113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎬ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ.
040113.english: Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of God.
040113.phonetic: Na-s-gi gi-gv tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le u-que-da-li a-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le yv-wi a-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi.

040114.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏕᎲ ᎤᎴᏂᏙᎸᎩ, ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏗᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040114.english: And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us, (and we beheld his glory, the glory as of the only begotten of the Father,) full of grace and truth.
040114.phonetic: A-le Ka-no-he-dv u-que-da-li nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le i-de-hv u-le-ni-do-lv-gi, u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-sv-gi u-da-do-li-tsa-dv a-le du-yu-go-dv-i; a-le i-di-go-wa-ti-s-gv-gi u-tse-li-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv A-ga-yv-li-ge u-wa-sv-hi-yu u-de-ne-lv-hi u-tse-li-ga na-s-gi-ya ge-sv-gi.

040115.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎧᏃᎮᏛ,] ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎷᏅᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎣᏂ ᏨᏓᏯᎢ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᎦᎴᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎡᎲᎩ ᎠᏏ ᏂᎨᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
040115.english: John bare witness of him, and cried, saying, This was he of whom I spake, He that cometh after me is preferred before me: for he was before me.
040115.phonetic: Tsa-ni ka-no-he-s-gv-gi na-s-gi [Ka-no-he-dv,] a-le u-we-lu-nv-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-tsi-no-he-s-gv-gi, hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-we-s-gv-gi, o-ni tsv-da-ya-i i-gv-yi a-ga-le-di, na-s-gi-ye-no e-hv-gi a-si ni-ge-v-na tsi-ge-sv-gi.

040116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎡᎩᏁᎸᎯ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎶᏏᎶᏛ ᎡᎩᏁᎸ.
040116.english: And of his fulness have all we received, and grace for grace.
040116.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-sv ni-di-v e-gi-ne-lv-hi, gv-wa-ga-ti-ya-ye-no u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv u-lo-si-lo-dv e-gi-ne-lv.

040117.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎼᏏ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏂᏙᏓᏳᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ.
040117.english: For the law was given by Moses, but grace and truth came by Jesus Christ.
040117.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no Mo-si gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-gi, u-da-do-li-tsa-dv-s-gi-ni a-le du-yu-go-dv-i Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ni-do-da-yu-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi.

040118.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᎬᏩᎪᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎦᏁᏥᎢ ᎡᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ.
040118.english: No man hath seen God at any time; the only begotten Son, which is in the bosom of the Father, he hath declared him.
040118.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo i-lv-hi-yu yi-gv-wa-go-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi; u-wa-sv-hi-yu u-de-ne-lv-hi U-we-tsi, A-ga-yv-li-ge ga-ne-tsi-i e-hi, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv nu-wa-ne-lv.

040119.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎯ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏙᏧᏂᏅᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎵᏫ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᎢᏳᏂᏪᏍᏗᏱ; ᎦᎪ ᏂᎯ?
040119.english: And this is the record of John, when the Jews sent priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him, Who art thou?
040119.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a Tsa-ni u-no-he-lv-hi, na-hi-yu A-ni-tsu-si Tsi-lu-si-li-mi do-tsu-ni-nv-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le A-ni-li-wi gv-wa-dv-dv-di-yi, hi-a i-yu-ni-we-s-di-yi; Ga-go ni-hi?

040120.cherokee: ᎠᎴ Ꭴ'ᏃᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏓᏱᎴᎢ, Ꭴ'ᏃᏅᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏱᎩ.
040120.english: And he confessed, and denied not; but confessed, I am not the Christ.
040120.phonetic: A-le u'no-nv-gi, a-le v-tla yu-da-yi-le-i, u'no-nv-quo-s-gi-ni hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; V-tla a-yv Ga-lo-ne-dv yi-gi.

040121.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᎪᎨ?  ᎢᎳᏯᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝ.  ᏥᎪᎨ Ꮎ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ?  ᎥᏝ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
040121.english: And they asked him, What then? Art thou Elias? And he saith, I am not. Art thou that prophet? And he answered, No.
040121.phonetic: A-le v-gv-wa-dv-dv-nv-gi hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-go-ge?  I-la-ya-s-go ni-hi?  Hi-a-no nu-we-sv-gi; V-tla.  Tsi-go-ge na a-do-le-ho-s-gi ni-hi?  V-tla, u-dv-nv-gi.

040122.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᎪ ᏂᎯ?  ᏫᏙᏥᏃᏁᏗᏱᏰᏃ ᏅᏓᎪᎩᏅᏒᎯ; ᎦᏙ ᎭᏗᎭ ᏨᏒ ᎭᏓᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ?
040122.english: Then said they unto him, Who art thou? that we may give an answer to them that sent us. What sayest thou of thyself?
040122.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-go ni-hi?  Wi-do-tsi-no-ne-di-yi-ye-no nv-da-go-gi-nv-sv-hi; Ga-do ha-di-ha tsv-sv ha-da-no-he-s-gv-i?

040123.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏪᎷᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ; ᎢᏥᏥᏃᎯᏍᏓ ᏅᏃᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎢᏌᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
040123.english: He said, I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord, as said the prophet Esaias.
040123.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; A-yv na-s-gi na u-we-lu-gi hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we i-na-ge-i; I-tsi-tsi-no-hi-s-da nv-no-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga; na-s-gi nu-we-sv I-sa-ya a-do-le-ho-s-gi.

040124.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᏅᏓᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏱ ᎤᎾᎵᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040124.english: And they which were sent were of the Pharisees.
040124.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na nv-da-ge-tsi-nv-si-dv A-ni-qua-li-si-yi u-na-li-go-hi ge-sv-gi.

040125.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏥᏕᎭᏓᏬᏍᎦ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎳᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ?
040125.english: And they asked him, and said unto him, Why baptizest thou then, if thou be not that Christ, nor Elias, neither that prophet?
040125.phonetic: Gv-wa-dv-dv-nv-gi-no hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no tsi-de-ha-da-wo-s-ga, i-yu-no ni-hi na-s-gi na Ga-lo-ne-dv a-le I-la-ya a-le na-s-gi na a-do-le-ho-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi?

040126.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏚᏁᏤᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎹ ᏕᎦᏓᏬᏍᏗᎭ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙᎦ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏥᏙᎾᎥ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ;
040126.english: John answered them, saying, I baptize with water: but there standeth one among you, whom ye know not;
040126.phonetic: Tsa-ni du-ne-tse-lv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi, A-yv a-ma de-ga-da-wo-s-di-ha; a-se-no ga-do-ga gi-lo i-tsi-do-na-v u-da-su-ya na-s-gi ne-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na;

040127.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎣᏂ ᏨᏓᏯᎢ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᏣᎦᎴᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎳᏑᎶ ᏕᎪᎸᏌᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏂᎪᎢ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᏴᏗᏱ.
040127.english: He it is, who coming after me is preferred before me, whose shoe's latchet I am not worthy to unloose.
040127.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na o-ni tsv-da-ya-i, i-gv-yi tsa-ga-le-di; na-s-gi tsu-la-su-lo de-go-lv-sa-dv v-tla ye-li yi-ni-go-i di-s-gi-ka-ne-yv-di-yi.

040128.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸᎩ ᏗᎦᏐᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏦᏓᏂ ᏍᎪᏂᏗᏢ ᎾᎿᎭᏣᏂ ᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎢ.
040128.english: These things were done in Bethabara beyond Jordan, where John was baptizing.
040128.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv-gi Di-ga-so-hi-s-di-yi Tso-da-ni s-go-ni-di-tlv na-hna Tsa-ni da-da-wo-s-gv-i.

040129.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ ᏣᏂ ᏭᎪᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏙᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏛᎦᏛᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏤᏣᎦᏅᎦ ᎠᏫ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎲᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
040129.english: The next day John seeth Jesus coming unto him, and saith, Behold the Lamb of God, which taketh away the sin of the world.
040129.phonetic: A-le u-gi-tsv-dv Tsa-ni wu-go-hv-gi Tsi-sa ga-do-gv i-di-tlv dv-ga-dv-gi, a-le hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tse-tsa-ga-nv-ga A-wi--a-gi-na U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi a-hv-s-gi e-lo-hi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

040130.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ Ꮎ ᏥᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ; ᎣᏂ ᏓᏯᎢ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᎦᎴᏗ ᏥᎦᏗᏍᎬᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎡᎲᎩ ᎠᏏ ᏂᎨᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎢ.
040130.english: This is he of whom I said, After me cometh a man which is preferred before me: for he was before me.
040130.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a na tsi-tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-gi; O-ni da-ya-i i-gv-yi a-ga-le-di tsi-ga-di-s-gv-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no e-hv-gi a-si ni-ge-v-na tsi-ge-sv-i.

040131.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎮᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎨᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎠᎩᎷᏨ ᎠᎹ ᏕᎦᏓᏬᏍᏗᎭ.
040131.english: And I knew him not: but that he should be made manifest to Israel, therefore am I come baptizing with water.
040131.phonetic: A-le a-yv v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-he-i; a-se-no na-s-gi I-si-li ge-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv a-gi-lu-tsv a-ma de-ga-da-wo-s-di-ha.

040132.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎫᎴ-ᏗᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏓᏳᏁᏡᏅᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎩᎸᏨᎩ.
040132.english: And John bare record, saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove, and it abode upon him.
040132.phonetic: A-le Tsa-ni u-no-he-lv-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; A-gi-go-hv-gi A-da-nv-do gu-le--di-s-go-ni-hi na-s-gi-ya da-yu-ne-tlu-nv-gi ga-lv-la-di, a-le na-s-gi du-gi-lv-tsv-gi.

040133.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎮᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎹ ᏗᏆᏓᏬᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎩᎶ ᎯᎪᎥᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏁᏡᎲᏍᎬᎢ ᏚᎩᎸᏨᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗᏍᎩ.
040133.english: And I knew him not: but he that sent me to baptize with water, the same said unto me, Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending, and remaining on him, the same is he which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
040133.phonetic: A-le a-yv v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-he-i; a-se-no na-s-gi na nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv a-ma di-qua-da-wo-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi; Gi-lo hi-go-v-ha A-da-nv-do a-ne-tlu-hv-s-gv-i du-gi-lv-tsv-ha, na-s-gi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do di-da-wo-s-di-s-gi.

040134.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040134.english: And I saw, and bare record that this is the Son of God.
040134.phonetic: A-gi-go-hv-gi-no a-le a-gi-no-he-lv-gi na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-sv-i.

040135.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎤᎩᏨᏛ ᏣᏂ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏓᏂᏙᎬᎩ.
040135.english: Again the next day after John stood, and two of his disciples;
040135.phonetic: A-le-wo u-gi-tsv-dv Tsa-ni ga-do-gv-gi, a-le a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi da-ni-do-gv-gi.

040136.cherokee: ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎢᏒᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏤᏣᎦᏅᎦ ᎠᏫ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
040136.english: And looking upon Jesus as he walked, he saith, Behold the Lamb of God!
040136.phonetic: Du-ka-hna-nv-no Tsi-sa a-i-sv-i hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tse-tsa-ga-nv-ga A-wi--a-gi-na U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga;

040137.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎤᏁᏨ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ.
040137.english: And the two disciples heard him speak, and they followed Jesus.
040137.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-dv-ga-nv-gi u-ne-tsv; a-le na-s-gi u-ni-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi Tsi-sa.

040138.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎦᏔᎲᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏒ ᏚᎪᎲ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎢᏍᏗᏲᎭ?  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᏈ-ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᏛᎦ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ-ᎭᏢ ᏗᏤᏅ.
040138.english: Then Jesus turned, and saw them following, and saith unto them, What seek ye? They said unto him, Rabbi, (which is to say, being interpreted, Master,) where dwellest thou?
040138.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ga-ta-hv-sv, a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-sv du-go-hv, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do i-s-di-yo-ha?  Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-qui---na-s-gi a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi ga-dv-ga Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi---ha-tlv di-tse-nv.

040139.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏕᎾ, ᏫᏍᏓᎦᏔ.  ᎤᏁᏅᏒᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎦᏔᏅᎩ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᏁᏙᎸᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ; ᏅᎩᏁᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040139.english: He saith unto them, Come and see. They came and saw where he dwelt, and abode with him that day: for it was about the tenth hour.
040139.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-de-na, wi-s-da-ga-ta.  U-ne-nv-sv-gi-no a-le u-na-ga-ta-nv-gi ga-ne-lv-i, a-le i-tsu-la-ha u-ne-do-lv-hi na-hi-yu i-ga; nv-gi-ne-ye-no i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ge-sv-gi.

040140.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏣᏂ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ [ᏥᏌ] ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏩᏛᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏂᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
040140.english: One of the two which heard John speak, and followed him, was Andrew, Simon Peter's brother.
040140.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi na-s-gi na a-ni-ta-li Tsa-ni u-na-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi, a-le [Tsi-sa] u-ni-s-da-wa-dv-dv, na-s-gi E-ni-di ge-sv-gi, Sa-wa-ni Qui-da di-na-da-nv-tli.

040141.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏂᎵ ᏌᏩᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎣᏥᏩᏛᎲ ᎺᏌᏯ; (ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᏛᎦ.)
040141.english: He first findeth his own brother Simon, and saith unto him, We have found the Messias, which is, being interpreted, the Christ.
040141.phonetic: I-gv-yi u-wa-dv-hv-gi u-tse-li u-ni-li Sa-wa-ni, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; O-tsi-wa-dv-hv Me-sa-ya; (na-s-gi a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-dv-ga.)

040142.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏘᏃᎸᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏙᎲᎢ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏌᏩᏂ ᏂᎯ, ᏦᎾ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏏᏆᏏ ᏕᏣᏙᎡᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᏈᏓ ᎦᏛᎦ.
040142.english: And he brought him to Jesus. And when Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone.
040142.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-ti-no-lv-gi Tsi-sa e-do-hv-i.  Tsi-sa-no du-ka-hna-nv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Sa-wa-ni ni-hi, Tso-na u-we-tsi, Si-qua-si de-tsa-do-e-s-di; na-s-gi a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi Qui-da ga-dv-ga.

040143.cherokee: ᎤᎩᏨᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᏪᏅᏍᏗᏱ; ᏈᎵᎩᏃ ᎤᏩᏛᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏚᎦ.
040143.english: The day following Jesus would go forth into Galilee, and findeth Philip, and saith unto him, Follow me.
040143.phonetic: U-gi-tsv-dv Tsi-sa u-du-li-s-gv-gi Ge-li-li u-we-nv-s-di-yi; Qui-li-gi-no u-wa-dv-hv-gi, a-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; S-gi-s-da-wa-du-ga.

040144.cherokee: ᏈᎵᎩ ᏇᏣᏱᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎡᏂᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏈᏓ ᎤᏂᏚᎲᎢ.
040144.english: Now Philip was of Bethsaida, the city of Andrew and Peter.
040144.phonetic: Qui-li-gi Que-tsa-yi-di e-hi ge-sv-gi, E-ni-di a-le Qui-da u-ni-du-hv-i.

040145.cherokee: ᏈᎵᏃ ᎤᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᏁᏓᏂᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎣᏥᏩᏛᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎼᏏ ᎫᏬᏪᎳ ᏥᎧᏃᎮᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏣᏂᏃᎮᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ.
040145.english: Philip findeth Nathanael, and saith unto him, We have found him, of whom Moses in the law, and the prophets, did write, Jesus of Nazareth, the son of Joseph.
040145.phonetic: Qui-li-no u-wa-dv-hv-gi Ne-da-ni-li, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; O-tsi-wa-dv-hv na-s-gi Mo-si gu-wo-we-la tsi-ka-no-he-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di go-we-li-hi, a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsa-ni-no-he-ha, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi Tso-wa u-we-tsi.

040146.cherokee: ᏁᏓᏂᎵᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏰᎵᏍᎪ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ?  ᏈᎵᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏁᎾ, ᏩᎦᏔ.
040146.english: And Nathanael said unto him, Can there any good thing come out of Nazareth? Philip saith unto him, Come and see.
040146.phonetic: Ne-da-ni-li-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ye-li-s-go go-hu-s-di o-s-dv nv-da-gv-wa-na-nu-go-i-s-di Na-se-li-di?  Qui-li-gi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; I-ne-na, wa-ga-ta.

040147.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᏭᎪᎲᎩ ᏁᏓᏂᎵ, ᎦᏙᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏛᎦᏛᎩ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᏄᏓᏑᏴᎾ.
040147.english: Jesus saw Nathanael coming to him, and saith of him, Behold an Israelite indeed, in whom is no guile!
040147.phonetic: Tsi-sa wu-go-hv-gi Ne-da-ni-li, ga-do-gv i-di-tlv dv-ga-dv-gi; hi-a-no nu-we-sv-gi, na-s-gi u-ne-i-s-ta-nv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya I-si-li u-we-tsi, na-s-gi ga-lo-nu-he-dv nu-da-su-yv-na.

040148.cherokee: ᏁᏓᏂᎵ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᏍᎩᎦᏔᎭ?  ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏏᏉ ᏈᎵᎩ ᏫᏂᏣᏯᏂᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎡᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏥᏦᎸᎩ, ᏫᎬᎪᎥᎩ.
040148.english: Nathanael saith unto him, Whence knowest thou me? Jesus answered and said unto him, Before that Philip called thee, when thou wast under the fig tree, I saw thee.
040148.phonetic: Ne-da-ni-li hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do di-ga-li-s-do-di i-s-gi-ga-ta-ha?  Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; A-si-quo qui-li-gi wi-ni-tsa-ya-ni-s-gv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi, e-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di Tlu-gv-i ha-wi-ni-di-tlv tsi-tso-lv-gi, wi-gv-go-v-gi.

040149.cherokee: ᏁᏓᏂᎵ ᎤᏅᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ; ᏂᎯ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
040149.english: Nathanael answered and saith unto him, Rabbi, thou art the Son of God; thou art the King of Israel.
040149.phonetic: Ne-da-ni-li u-nv-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-tsi; ni-hi Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi I-si-li u-na-tse-li-ga.

040150.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏪᏏ, ᎬᎪᎥᎩ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎰᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ?  ᎤᏟ ᎢᏳᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎯᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ.
040150.english: Jesus answered and said unto him, Because I said unto thee, I saw thee under the fig tree, believest thou? thou shalt see greater things than these.
040150.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go hi-a tsi-ni-gv-we-si, gv-go-v-gi ha-wi-ni-di-tlv sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv-i, na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ho-hi-yu-hv-s-ga?  U-tli i-yu-s-qua-ni-go-di hi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi.

040151.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎢᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᎾᎵᏌᎳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ.
040151.english: And he saith unto him, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Hereafter ye shall see heaven open, and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of man.
040151.phonetic: A-le-wo hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-wa u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di ga-lv-la-di u-li-s-du-i-dv ge-se-s-di, a-le de-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga a-na-li-sa-la-di-s-ge-s-di a-le e-la-di na-na-dv-ne-he-s-di gv-wa-lu-tse-he-s-di yv-wi U-we-tsi.

040201.cherokee: ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎨᏂ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ; ᏥᏌ ᎤᏥ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏙᎲᎩ.
040201.english: And the third day there was a marriage in Cana of Galilee; and the mother of Jesus was there:
040201.phonetic: Tso-i-ne-no i-ga de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv-gi Ge-li-li Ge-ni ga-du-hv-i; Tsi-sa u-tsi na-hna e-do-hv-gi.

040202.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏩᏥᏯᏅᎲᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏕᎨᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
040202.english: And both Jesus was called, and his disciples, to the marriage.
040202.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no wa-tsi-ya-nv-hv-gi a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi de-ge-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gv u-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi.

040203.cherokee: ᎩᎦᎨᏃ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎤᏗᏒᏅ, ᏥᏌ ᎤᏥ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᏁᎭ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ.
040203.english: And when they wanted wine, the mother of Jesus saith unto him, They have no wine.
040203.phonetic: Gi-ga-ge-no--a-di-ta-s-di u-di-sv-nv, Tsi-sa u-tsi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla yu-ni-ne-ha gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di.

040204.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎨᏴ ᎦᏙ ᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᎾᏓᏛᏙᏗ?  ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᎠᏴ ᏯᎩᏍᏆᎸᎡᎸ.
040204.english: Jesus saith unto her, Woman, what have I to do with thee? mine hour is not yet come.
040204.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-ge-yv ga-do a-yv di-gi-na-da-dv-do-di?  V-tla a-si a-yv ya-gi-s-qua-lv-e-lv.

040205.cherokee: ᎤᏥᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏥᏪᏎᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸᎭ.
040205.english: His mother saith unto the servants, Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it.
040205.phonetic: U-tsi-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di; Ni-ga-v ni-tsi-we-se-hv na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv-ha.

040206.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏕᎦᎧᎲᎩ ᏑᏓᎵ ᎠᎹ ᏗᏟᏍᏗ ᏅᏯ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏥᏂᏕᎤᏅᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᎦᎸᏗᏱ ᏥᏂᏕᎬᏅᎩ, ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏗᏟᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ
040206.english: And there were set there six waterpots of stone, after the manner of the purifying of the Jews, containing two or three firkins apiece.
040206.phonetic: Na-hna-no de-ga-ka-hv-gi su-da-li a-ma di-tli-s-di nv-ya di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi A-ni-tsu-si tsi-ni-de-u-nv-no u-na-da-nv-ga-lv-di-yi tsi-ni-de-gv-nv-gi, tso-a-s-go-hi i-yv-dv i-yu-tli-lo-dv di-tli-s-do-di ge-sv-gi

040207.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᎹ ᏗᏥᎧᎵᎢᏍᏓ ᎠᎹ ᏗᏟᏍᏗ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᏚᏂᎧᎵᎸᎩ.
040207.english: Jesus saith unto them, Fill the waterpots with water. And they filled them up to the brim.
040207.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-ma di-tsi-ka-li-i-s-da a-ma di-tli-s-di.  Na-s-gi-no a-ka-li-i du-ni-ka-li-lv-gi.

040208.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏥᏢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏪᏥᏁᎥᏏ.  ᏭᏂᏁᏁᎸᎩᏃ.
040208.english: And he saith unto them, Draw out now, and bear unto the governor of the feast. And they bare it.
040208.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Hna-quo di-tsi-tlv a-le a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi we-tsi-ne-v-si.  Wu-ni-ne-ne-lv-gi-no.

040209.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎤᏚᎩᏒ ᎠᎹ ᎩᎦᎨᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏎ ᏧᎶᏒᎢ, ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎹ ᎤᏂᏢᏛ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎩ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏭᏯᏅᎲᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏣᎦᏨᏍᏗᏍᎩ,
040209.english: When the ruler of the feast had tasted the water that was made wine, and knew not whence it was: (but the servants which drew the water knew;) the governor of the feast called the bridegroom,
040209.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi u-du-gi-sv a-ma gi-ga-ge-a-di-ta-s-di i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi, a-le na-ga-ta-hv-na ge-se tsu-lo-sv-i, ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di-s-gi-ni a-ma u-ni-tlv-dv a-ni-ga-ta-hv-gi, u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi wu-ya-nv-hv-gi a-s-ga-ya tsa-ga-tsv-s-di-s-gi,

040210.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎾᎴᏅᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏂᏝᎲᏍᎪ ᎣᏌᏂ ᎩᎦᎨᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᏗᏔᎲᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ ᎩᎳ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎠᏂᏝᎲᏍᎪᎢ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ.
040210.english: And saith unto him, Every man at the beginning doth set forth good wine; and when men have well drunk, then that which is worse: but thou hast kept the good wine until now.
040210.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Na-ni-v yv-wi a-na-le-nv-di-s-go a-ni-tla-hv-s-go o-sa-ni gi-ga-ge-a-di-ta-s-di, hna-quo-no u-tsa-ti u-na-di-ta-hv-hi tsi-ge-so-i gi-la u-so-nv a-ni-tla-hv-s-go-i; ni-hi-s-gi-ni tsa-s-qua-ni-go-de o-s-dv gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di go-hi i-ya-s-di.

040211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎴᏅᏔᏅᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎨᏂ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏩᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ.
040211.english: This beginning of miracles did Jesus in Cana of Galilee, and manifested forth his glory; and his disciples believed on him.
040211.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a u-le-nv-ta-nv-gi Tsi-sa u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-gi Ge-li-li Ge-ni ga-du-hv-i, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv nu-wa-ne-lv-gi a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.  Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi.

040212.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎨᏆᏂ ᏭᎶᏒᎩ, ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎸᏍᎩᏉ ᏄᏂᏒᎸᎩ.
040212.english: After this he went down to Capernaum, he, and his mother, and his brethren, and his disciples: and they continued there not many days.
040212.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv Ge-qua-ni wu-lo-sv-gi, u-wa-sv, a-le u-tsi, a-le a-na-li-nv-tli a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi; a-le na-hna i-lv-s-gi-quo nu-ni-sv-lv-gi.

040213.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩᏃ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗᏒᎩ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏭᎶᏒᎩ.
040213.english: And the Jews' passover was at hand, and Jesus went up to Jerusalem,
040213.phonetic: Ka-no-hi-ye-gi-no di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga u-s-qua-lv-hi-di-sv-gi; Tsi-sa-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wu-lo-sv-gi.

040214.cherokee: ᎤᏛᏅᏃ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᎠᏂᏅᎩ ᏗᏂᎾᏕᎩ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏫ ᎠᎴ ᎫᎴ-ᏗᏂᏍᎪᏂᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᎩ.
040214.english: And found in the temple those that sold oxen and sheep and doves, and the changers of money sitting:
040214.phonetic: U-dv-nv-no--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi du-wa-dv-hv-gi a-ni-nv-gi di-ni-na-de-gi wa-ga a-le a-wi a-le gu-le--di-ni-s-go-ni-hi, a-le a-de-lv di-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-gi.

040215.cherokee: ᎦᏩᏍᏛᏂᏍᏗᏃ ᎤᏬᏢᏅ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏛᎾ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᎦ; ᏚᏤᏮᎩᏃ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏚᏂᎲ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎷᏆᏗᏅᏒᎩ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ.
040215.english: And when he had made a scourge of small cords, he drove them all out of the temple, and the sheep, and the oxen; and poured out the changers' money, and overthrew the tables;
040215.phonetic: Ga-wa-s-dv-ni-s-di-no u-wo-tlv-nv, ni-ga-dv u-dv-na--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi du-nu-go-wi-sv-gi, a-le na-s-quo a-wi, a-le wa-ga; du-tse-wv-gi-no a-de-lv du-ni-hv a-de-lv di-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-gi, a-le du-lu-qua-di-nv-sv-gi de-ga-s-gi-lv-i.

040216.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎫᎴ-ᏗᏂᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᏗᏂᎾᏕᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᏗᏥᎧᎲᎾ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎦᏁᎸ ᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏨᏁᎸᎢ.
040216.english: And said unto them that sold doves, Take these things hence; make not my Father's house an house of merchandise.
040216.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi gu-le--di-ni-s-go-ni-hi di-ni-na-de-gi; hi-a di-tsi-ka-hv-na, Tle-s-di E-do-da ga-ne-lv ga-no-do-di-yi a-da-ne-lv i-tsv-ne-lv-i.

040217.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᎾᏅᏓᏛᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ; "ᏣᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏓᏇᎷᎬ ᎠᎩᏯᎣᏅ."
040217.english: And his disciples remembered that it was written, The zeal of thine house hath eaten me up.
040217.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-na-nv-da-dv-gi hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-i; "Tsa-tse-li a-da-ne-lv da-que-lu-gv a-gi-ya-o-nv."

040218.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏍᎩᏴᏁᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ?
040218.english: Then answered the Jews and said unto him, What sign shewest thou unto us, seeing that thou doest these things?
040218.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si-no u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-s-gi-yv-ne-li, na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di tsi-de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha?

040219.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏥᏲᏍᏓ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏦᎢᏉᏃ ᎢᎦ ᏓᏥᏱᎵᏙᎵ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏛᎦᏁᏍᎨᎰᏂ.
040219.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, Destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.
040219.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-tsi-yo-s-da hi-a u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, tso-i-quo-no i-ga da-tsi-yi-li-do-li hna-quo dv-ga-ne-s-ge-ho-ni.

040220.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏑᏓᎵᎦᎵ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎤᏂᏱᎵᏙᎸᎯ ᎠᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᏥᎪᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏦᎢᏉ ᎢᎦ ᏛᎯᏱᎵᏙᎵ ᏛᎭᏁᏍᎨᎰᏂ?
040220.english: Then said the Jews, Forty and six years was this temple in building, and wilt thou rear it up in three days?
040220.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si-no hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Nv-ga-s-go-hi su-da-li-ga-li tsu-de-ti-yv-dv u-ni-yi-li-do-lv-hi a-na-ne-s-ge-s-gv hi-a u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; tsi-go-no ni-hi tso-i-quo i-ga dv-hi-yi-li-do-li dv-ha-ne-s-ge-ho-ni?

040221.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒ.
040221.english: But he spake of the temple of his body.
040221.phonetic: A-se-no u-wa-sv a-ye-lv a-da-ne-lv ka-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi nu-we-sv.

040222.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏕᎤᎴᏅ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏅᏓᏛᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ.
040222.english: When therefore he was risen from the dead, his disciples remembered that he had said this unto them; and they believed the scripture, and the word which Jesus had said.
040222.phonetic: Ho-wa-no hna-quo u-yo-hu-sv de-u-le-nv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-nv-da-dv-gi na-s-gi ni-du-we-se-lv-i; a-le u-no-hi-yu-nv-gi go-we-li a-le na-s-gi Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-i.

040223.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎡᏙᎲ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅ ᏚᏙᎥᎢ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
040223.english: Now when he was in Jerusalem at the passover, in the feast day, many believed in his name, when they saw the miracles which he did.
040223.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no e-do-hv ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi i-yu ge-sv-i, u-ni-tsa-dv-gi u-no-hi-yu-nv du-do-v-i, u-ni-go-hv u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

040224.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᏚᏓᏲᏎᎢ, ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᏓᎦᏔᎲᎩ,
040224.english: But Jesus did not commit himself unto them, because he knew all men,
040224.phonetic: A-se-no Tsi-sa v-tla u-wa-sv yi-du-da-yo-se-i, na-ni-v-ye-no da-ga-ta-hv-gi,

040225.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏱᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎭᏫᏂ ᎤᏪᎲ ᏴᏫ.
040225.english: And needed not that any should testify of man: for he knew what was in man.
040225.phonetic: V-tla a-le u-du-lv-di yi-nu-li-s-da-ne-he gi-lo gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi nu-s-dv yv-wi, a-ga-ta-hv-gi-ye-no nu-s-dv ha-wi-ni u-we-hv yv-wi.

040301.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎡᎲᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᎹᏏ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏᏱ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᎶᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040301.english: There was a man of the Pharisees, named Nicodemus, a ruler of the Jews:
040301.phonetic: A-s-ga-ya e-hv-gi Ni-ga-di-ma-si tsu-do-i-dv, A-ni-qua-li-si-yi u-tse-li-go-hi, A-ni-tsu-si di-gv-wa-ne-lo-di ge-sv-gi.

040302.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏗᏍᏇᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏣᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏥᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏱᏙᎬᏩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏚᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ.
040302.english: The same came to Jesus by night, and said unto him, Rabbi, we know that thou art a teacher come from God: for no man can do these miracles that thou doest, except God be with him.
040302.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tsi-sa u-lu-tse-lv-gi sv-no-yi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Di-s-que-yo-hv-s-gi, o-tsi-ga-ta-ha ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-tsa-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i:  v-tla-ye-no gi-lo na-s-gi hi-a u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsi-de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha yi-do-gv-wa-lv-wi-s-da-si, U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-du-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hv-na-yi-gi.

040303.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙ ᎯᏳᎯᏯ, ᎤᏙ ᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏕᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎬᎪᏩᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫ ᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040303.english: Jesus answered and said unto him, Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born again, he cannot see the kingdom of God.
040303.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; U-do hi-yu-hi-ya, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha, Gi-lo ta-li-ne u-de-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di v-tla yv-gv-go-wa-dv na-hna U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi yu-hi ge-sv-i.

040304.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᎹᏏᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏴᏫ ᏯᏕᎲᎦ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏱᎩ?  ᏥᎪ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏥᏏᏱ ᏫᏯᏴᎭ, ᏯᏕᎲᎦ?
040304.english: Nicodemus saith unto him, How can a man be born when he is old? can he enter the second time into his mother's womb, and be born?
040304.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-ma-si-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yv-wi ya-de-hv-ga hna-quo a-ga-yv-li-ge yi-gi?  Tsi-go ta-li-ne u-tsi-si-yi wi-ya-yv-ha, ya-de-hv-ga?

040305.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎠᎹ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᎬᏴᎭ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040305.english: Jesus answered, Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born of water and of the Spirit, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.
040305.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha, Gi-lo a-ma a-le A-da-nv-do gv-wa-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di, v-tla yv-gv-yv-ha na-hna U-ne-la-nv-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

040306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᏐᎢ.
040306.english: That which is born of the flesh is flesh; and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit.
040306.phonetic: Na-s-gi na u-que-da-li u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi u-que-da-li-quo ge-so-i; na-s-gi na a-da-nv-do u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi A-da-nv-do ge-so-i.

040307.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏣᏕᏗ, ᏥᎬᏲᏏ.
040307.english: Marvel not that I said unto thee, Ye must be born again.
040307.phonetic: Tle-s-di tsa-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi a-se ta-li-ne i-tsa-de-di, tsi-gv-yo-si.

040308.cherokee: ᎤᏃᎴ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᏛᏉ ᎢᏘᏢ ᏫᎦᏃᎸᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏴᎬ ᎭᏛᎩᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏔᎰ ᏗᎦᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏩᎦᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ.
040308.english: The wind bloweth where it listeth, and thou hearest the sound thereof, but canst not tell whence it cometh, and whither it goeth: so is every one that is born of the Spirit.
040308.phonetic: U-no-le u-du-li-s-dv-quo i-ti-tlv wi-ga-no-lv-di-s-go-i, a-le u-no-yv-gv ha-dv-gi-s-go-i, a-se-no v-tla yi-ga-ta-ho di-ga-dv-i a-le wa-ga-dv-i; na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni nu-s-di na-ni-v gi-lo na-s-gi A-da-nv-do tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi.

040309.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᎹᏏ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ?
040309.english: Nicodemus answered and said unto him, How can these things be?
040309.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-ma-si u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di?

040310.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏃ ᎢᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ.
040310.english: Jesus answered and said unto him, Art thou a master of Israel, and knowest not these things?
040310.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi I-si-li a-ne-hv-i, ni-ga-ta-hv-na-no i-gi na-s-gi hi-a.

040311.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ; ᎣᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎣᏥᏁᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎪᎲᎯ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᎪ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
040311.english: Verily, verily, I say unto thee, We speak that we do know, and testify that we have seen; and ye receive not our witness.
040311.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha; O-ni-ga-ta-hv o-tsi-ne-go-i, a-le o-gi-go-hv-hi o-tsi-no-he-s-go-i, a-se-no v-tla yi-di-tsa-da-ni-lv-go o-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i.

040312.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᏂᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲ ᏱᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸ?
040312.english: If I have told you earthly things, and ye believe not, how shall ye believe, if I tell you of heavenly things?
040312.phonetic: I-yu-no e-lo-hi ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv i-tsv-no-he-he-lv ni-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na yi-gi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yi-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga, ga-lv-la-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv yi-tsv-no-he-he-lv?

040313.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏳᎶᏐᎢ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏤᎭ.
040313.english: And no man hath ascended up to heaven, but he that came down from heaven, even the Son of man which is in heaven.
040313.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no gi-lo ga-lv-la-di wi-yu-lo-so-i, ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi u-wa-sv, yv-wi U-we-tsi, na-s-gi ga-lv-la-di tse-ha.

040314.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎼᏏ ᎢᎾᏛ ᏧᏌᎳᏓᏁ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏓᏰᏥᏌᎳᏗᏂ,
040314.english: And as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, even so must the Son of man be lifted up:
040314.phonetic: A-le Mo-si i-na-dv tsu-sa-la-da-ne i-na-ge-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo yv-wi U-we-tsi da-ye-tsi-sa-la-di-ni,

040315.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎬᏂᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏛᏗ.
040315.english: That whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have eternal life.
040315.phonetic: Na-s-gi gi-lo go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di, u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, gv-ni-dv-s-gi-ni u-wa-dv-di.

040316.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎨᏳᏒᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᏕᎤᏲᏒᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ, ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎬᏂᏛᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏛᏗ.
040316.english: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.
040316.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no ni-ga-v-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ge-yu-sv-gi e-lo-hi, de-u-yo-sv-gi u-tse-li-ga U-we-tsi na-s-gi u-wa-sv-hi-yu u-de-ne-lv-hi, gi-lo na-s-gi yi-go-hi-yu-hv-s-ga u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, gv-ni-dv-quo-s-gi-ni u-wa-dv-di.

040317.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏴᏧᏅᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏧᏭᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
040317.english: For God sent not his Son into the world to condemn the world; but that the world through him might be saved.
040317.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla e-lo-hi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi yv-tsu-nv-sv U-we-tsi tsu-wu-da-ne-di-yi e-lo-hi, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi e-lo-hi a-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

040318.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏧᏚᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏂᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏧᏚᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᏄᏬᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ.
040318.english: He that believeth on him is not condemned: but he that believeth not is condemned already, because he hath not believed in the name of the only begotten Son of God.
040318.phonetic: Gi-lo na-s-gi na tsi-go-hi-yu-hv-s-go-i, v-tla u-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsu-du-go-ta-nv-hi yi-ge-so-i, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na ni-go-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na na-s-gi ga-yu-la u-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsu-du-go-ta-nv-hi ge-so-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go nu-wo-hi-yu-nv-na ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi de-u-do-v na-s-gi u-wa-sv-hi-yu u-de-ne-lv-hi.

040319.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏥᏚᎾᏚᎪᏓᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏅ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ, ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᏰᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040319.english: And this is the condemnation, that light is come into the world, and men loved darkness rather than light, because their deeds were evil.
040319.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv tsi-du-na-du-go-da-ne-ha, na-s-gi i-ga-ga-ti e-lo-hi u-na-nu-go-tsi-lv, a-le yv-wi u-tli u-ni-ye-lv-nv u-li-si-gi e-s-ga-quo i-ga--ga-ti, du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-ye-no u-yo-i-yu ge-sv-gi.

040320.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏰᏃ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᎪ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎷᎪ ᎢᎦᎦᏛᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᏄᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
040320.english: For every one that doeth evil hateth the light, neither cometh to the light, lest his deeds should be reproved.
040320.phonetic: U-yo-ye-no tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi a-s-ga-go i-ga-ga-ti, a-le v-tla yi-ga-lu-go i-ga-ga-dv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go nu-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi nu-s-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

040321.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎦᎷᎪᎢ, ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
040321.english: But he that doeth truth cometh to the light, that his deeds may be made manifest, that they are wrought in God.
040321.phonetic: Du-yu-go-dv-s-gi-ni tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi i-ga-ga-dv ga-lu-go-i, u-du-li-s-go gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

040322.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ, ᏥᏌ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏭᏂᎶᏒᎩ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎤᏁᏙᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏓᏬᎥᎩ.
040322.english: After these things came Jesus and his disciples into the land of Judaea; and there he tarried with them, and baptized.
040322.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv, Tsi-sa a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi Tsu-di-yi wu-ni-lo-sv-gi, na-hna-no u-ne-do-lv-gi, a-le du-da-wo-v-gi.

040323.cherokee: ᏣᏂᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏃᏂ ᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎩ, ᏎᎵᎻ ᎾᎥᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏛᎩ ᎠᎹ.  ᎠᏂᎷᎬᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᎦᏬᏍᎬᎩ.
040323.english: And John also was baptizing in Aenon near to Salim, because there was much water there: and they came, and were baptized.
040323.phonetic: Tsa-ni-no na-s-quo I-no-ni da-da-wo-s-gv-gi, Se-li-mi na-v-i, na-hna-ye-no u-tsa-dv-gi a-ma.  A-ni-lu-gv-gi-no a-le de-ge-ga-wo-s-gv-gi.

040324.english: For John was not yet cast into prison.

040325.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏗ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᏣᏂ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᎦᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
040325.english: Then there arose a question between some of John's disciples and the Jews about purifying.
040325.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ka-no-he-di nu-na-li-s-da-ne-lv-gi Tsa-ni gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi A-ni-tsu-si-no a-da-nv-ga-lv-di-yi u-gv-wa-li.

040326.cherokee: ᏣᏂᏃ ᎤᏂᎵᏤᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏥᏍᏕᏙᎲᎩ ᏦᏓᏂ ᏍᎪᏂᏗᏢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎩ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᏬᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛᏉ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎭ.
040326.english: And they came unto John, and said unto him, Rabbi, he that was with thee beyond Jordan, to whom thou barest witness, behold, the same baptizeth, and all men come to him.
040326.phonetic: Tsa-ni-no u-ni-li-tse-lv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi na-tsi-s-de-do-hv-gi Tso-da-ni s-go-ni-di-tlv, na-s-gi tsi-no-he-s-gv-gi, gv-ni-yu-quo na-s-gi da-da-wo-a, a-le ni-ga-dv-quo gv-wa-lu-tse-ha.

040327.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏴᏫ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᎬᏩᏛ ᎬᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏰᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
040327.english: John answered and said, A man can receive nothing, except it be given him from heaven.
040327.phonetic: Tsa-ni u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Yv-wi v-tla go-hu-s-di yv-gv-wa-dv gv-ni ga-lv-la-di nv-da-ye-tsi-ne-lv-hi yi-gi.

040328.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᏍᎬᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏥᏰᏅᎡᎯ.
040328.english: Ye yourselves bear me witness, that I said, I am not the Christ, but that I am sent before him.
040328.phonetic: Ni-hi i-tsv-sv i-tsi-ga-ta-hi hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-we-s-gv-gi; A-yv v-tla Ga-lo-ne-dv yi-gi, v-gi-nv-si-dv-quo-s-gi-ni i-gv-yi tsi-ye-nv-e-hi.

040329.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᎧᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᎵᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎦᏙᎪ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏛᎦᏁᎰᎢ, ᎤᏣᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎪ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏴ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎬ ᎤᎧᎵᏨ.
040329.english: He that hath the bride is the bridegroom: but the friend of the bridegroom, which standeth and heareth him, rejoiceth greatly because of the bridegroom's voice: this my joy therefore is fulfilled.
040329.phonetic: U-da-yv-s-di u-we-ka-hi na-s-gi a-de-sv-hv-s-gi; a-se-no a-de-sv-hv-s-gi u-na-li-i, na-s-gi tsi-ga-do-go a-le tsu-dv-ga-ne-ho-i, u-tsa-la-nv-hi a-li-he-li-go nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go a-de-sv-hv-s-gi ka-ne-gv-i.  Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni a-yv ga-li-e-li-gv u-ka-li-tsv.

040330.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏎ ᏛᏛᏃᏏ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏎ ᏓᏥᏲᎶᏥ.
040330.english: He must increase, but I must decrease.
040330.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-se dv-dv-no-si, a-yv-s-gi-ni a-se da-tsi-yo-lo-tsi.

040331.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏨᎯ ᎡᎶᎯᏉ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎡᎶᎯᏉ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ.
040331.english: He that cometh from above is above all: he that is of the earth is earthly, and speaketh of the earth: he that cometh from heaven is above all.
040331.phonetic: Ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo na-ni-v-i.  E-lo-hi u-na-nu-go-tsv-hi e-lo-hi-quo e-hi ge-so-i, a-le ga-wo-ni-s-gv e-lo-hi-quo e-hi ge-so-i, ga-lv-la-di-s-gi-ni nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo na-ni-v-i.

040332.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎪᎲᎢ ᎤᏛᎦᏅᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᎭ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏓᏓᏂᎸᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎢ.
040332.english: And what he hath seen and heard, that he testifieth; and no man receiveth his testimony.
040332.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-go-hv-i u-dv-ga-nv-na-s-gi ka-no-he-ha, a-se-no v-tla gi-lo yi-da-da-ni-lv-ga na-s-gi u-no-he-lv-i.

040333.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏧᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏓᏱᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᏥᎪᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040333.english: He that hath received his testimony hath set to his seal that God is true.
040333.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na tsu-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi-s-gi-ni u-no-he-lv-i na-s-gi u-s-da-yi-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-tsi-go-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

040334.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏛ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏬᏂᎭ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏟᎶᏛᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏳᏁᎭ.
040334.english: For he whom God hath sent speaketh the words of God: for God giveth not the Spirit by measure unto him.
040334.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-nv-si-dv, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv ga-wo-ni-ha; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla u-tli-lo-dv-quo A-da-nv-do yu-ne-ha.

040335.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏚᏲᎯᏎᎸ.
040335.english: The Father loveth the Son, and hath given all things into his hand.
040335.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge u-ge-yu-hi-yu U-we-tsi, a-le ni-ga-di-yu go-hu-s-di du-yo-hi-se-lv.

040336.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏁᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏃᎯᏰᎭ.
040336.english: He that believeth on the Son hath everlasting life: and he that believeth not the Son shall not see life; but the wrath of God abideth on him.
040336.phonetic: Na-s-gi na go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi [U-ne-la-nv-hi] U-we-tsi, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ne-ge-sv-na u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni U-we-tsi go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na v-tla gv-ni-dv u-go-wa-dv-di yi-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo-s-gi-ni u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv u-li-no-hi-ye-ha.

040401.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᏬᏍᎬᎢ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏣᏂ,
040401.english: When therefore the Lord knew how the Pharisees had heard that Jesus made and baptized more disciples than John,
040401.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no u-dv-ga-nv A-ni-qua-li-si u-na-dv-ga-nv Tsi-sa u-tli i-ya-ni-i gv-wa-s-da-wa-de-gi ni-de-gv-ne-hv a-le de-ga-wo-s-gv-i, e-s-ga-quo Tsa-ni,

040402.english: (Though Jesus himself baptized not, but his disciples,)

040403.cherokee: ᏧᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎩᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏮᎤᎶᏒᎩ.
040403.english: He left Judaea, and departed again into Galilee.
040403.phonetic: Tsu-di-yi u-ni-gi-sv-gi a-le ta-li-ne Ge-li-li wv-u-lo-sv-gi.

040404.english: And he must needs go through Samaria.

040405.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᏌᎦ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎥ ᏥᎦᏚᎭ ᎦᏓ ᎠᎲ ᏤᎦᏈ ᏧᏁᎴ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏦᏩ.
040405.english: Then cometh he to a city of Samaria, which is called Sychar, near to the parcel of ground that Jacob gave to his son Joseph.
040405.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Sa-me-li-yi ga-du-hv u-lu-tsv-gi Sa-ga tsu-do-i-dv na-s-gi na-v tsi-ga-du-ha ga-da a-hv Tse-ga-qui tsu-ne-le u-we-tsi Tso-wa.

040406.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎠᏔᎴᏒᎩ ᎠᎹ ᏧᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᏯᏪᏨ ᎠᎢᏒ ᎤᏪᏅᎩ ᎠᏔᎴᏒᎢ; ᏔᎳᏚᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040406.english: Now Jacob's well was there. Jesus therefore, being wearied with his journey, sat thus on the well: and it was about the sixth hour.
040406.phonetic: Na-hna-no a-ta-le-sv-gi a-ma tsu-ni-tlv-di-yi Tse-ga-qui u-tse-li-ga; Tsi-sa-no du-ya-we-tsv a-i-sv u-we-nv-gi a-ta-le-sv-i; ta-la-du-no i-yv-dv i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ge-sv-gi.

040407.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎷᏤ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎹ ᎤᏢᎯᎴᎢ; ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏆᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏍᎩᏁᎲᏏ.
040407.english: There cometh a woman of Samaria to draw water: Jesus saith unto her, Give me to drink.
040407.phonetic: Na-hna u-lu-tse a-ge-yv Sa-me-li-yi e-hi a-ma u-tlv-hi-le-i; Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; A-qua-di-ta-s-di s-gi-ne-hv-si.

040408.english: (For his disciples were gone away unto the city to buy meat.)

040409.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎯᏧᏏ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎢᏍᎩᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᏥᎨᏴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎨᎢ.  (ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏰᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᎾᏓᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᎢ.)
040409.english: Then saith the woman of Samaria unto him, How is it that thou, being a Jew, askest drink of me, which am a woman of Samaria? for the Jews have no dealings with the Samaritans.
040409.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi a-ge-yv Sa-me-li-yi e-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ga-do di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-hi Hi-tsu-si a-di-ta-s-di i-s-gi-ta-yo-se-ha tsi-ge-yv Sa-me-li-yi ge-i.  (A-ni-tsu-si-ye-no a-le Sa-me-li-yi a-ne-hi v-tla yi-du-na-da-ga-sa-ya-s-do-i.)

040410.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᎯᎦᏔᎮ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᎯᎦᏔᎮ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏣᏪᏎᎭ, ᎠᏆᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏍᎩᏁᎲᏏ; ᏨᏒ ᏱᏔᏲᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏣᏁᏁᎴ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎹ.
040410.english: Jesus answered and said unto her, If thou knewest the gift of God, and who it is that saith to thee, Give me to drink; thou wouldest have asked of him, and he would have given thee living water.
040410.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tse-i hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; I-yu-no yi-hi-ga-ta-he U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ne-di tsi-gi, a-le yi-hi-ga-ta-he hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-tsa-we-se-ha, A-qua-di-ta-s-di s-gi-ne-hv-si; tsv-sv yi-ta-yo-se-le-i, a-le yi-tsa-ne-ne-le gv-ni-dv a-ma.

040411.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏰᎭ ᎠᏢᏗ, ᎭᏫᏂᏳᏃ ᎠᏔᎴᏒᎢ, ᎭᏢᏃ ᏣᏁᎩᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎹ?
040411.english: The woman saith unto him, Sir, thou hast nothing to draw with, and the well is deep: from whence then hast thou that living water?
040411.phonetic: A-ge-yv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Hi-s-ga-ya, v-tla go-hu-s-di yi-ye-ha a-tlv-di, ha-wi-ni-yu-no a-ta-le-sv-i, ha-tlv-no tsa-ne-gi-sv na-s-gi gv-ni-dv a-ma?

040412.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏟ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏂᎯ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏔᎴᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏗᏔᎲᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᏗᏔᎲᎢ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏝᎾᎥᎢ.
040412.english: Art thou greater than our father Jacob, which gave us the well, and drank thereof himself, and his children, and his cattle?
040412.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-tli e-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu ni-hi, e-s-ga-quo i-gi-do-da Tse-ga-qui na-s-gi i-gi-ne-lv-hi hi-a a-ta-le-sv-i, a-le na-hna u-wa-sv u-di-ta-hv-i a-le du-na-di-ta-hv-i tsu-we-tsi a-le u-na-tla-na-v-i.

040413.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎩᎶ ᏳᏗᏔᎲ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎹ ᏔᎵᏁᏉ ᎤᏔᏕᎪᏗ;
040413.english: Jesus answered and said unto her, Whosoever drinketh of this water shall thirst again:
040413.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tse-i hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Gi-lo yu-di-ta-hv hi-a a-ma ta-li-ne-quo u-ta-de-go-di;

040414.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏳᏗᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎹ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏁᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏳᎯᏳ ᎤᏔᏕᎪᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏁᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎠᎹ, ᎭᏫᏂ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᎹ ᎦᏄᎪᎬ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏫᎦᎾᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
040414.english: But whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst; but the water that I shall give him shall be in him a well of water springing up into everlasting life.
040414.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni yu-di-ta-hv na-s-gi a-ma a-yv tsi-ne-ne-di tsi-gi v-tla i-yu-hi-yu u-ta-de-go-di yi-gi, a-yv-s-gi-ni tsi-ne-ne-di tsi-gi a-ma, ha-wi-ni a-ye-lv a-ma ga-nu-go-gv ge-se-s-di, wi-ga-na-nu-go-ge-s-di gv-ni-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na di-ge-sv-i.

040415.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎹ ᏍᎩᏁᎲᏏ, ᏞᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᎩᏔᏕᎦᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏂ ᎠᎩᏢᎯᎸᎩ.
040415.english: The woman saith unto him, Sir, give me this water, that I thirst not, neither come hither to draw.
040415.phonetic: A-ge-yv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-s-ga-ya, hi-a na-s-gi a-ma s-gi-ne-hv-si, tle-s-di-no a-gi-ta-de-ga-nv-gi, a-le tle-s-di a-ni a-gi-tlv-hi-lv-gi.

040416.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏣᏰᎯ ᏫᏯᏅ, ᎠᏂᏃ ᎢᏍᏗᎷᏨᎭ.
040416.english: Jesus saith unto her, Go, call thy husband, and come hither.
040416.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tsa-ye-hi wi-ya-nv, a-ni-no i-s-di-lu-tsv-ha.

040417.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎤᏁᏤᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏰᎭ ᎠᎩᏰᎯ.  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏰᎵ ᏂᏫ, ᎥᏝ ᏰᎭ ᎠᎩᏰᎯ, ᏣᏛ;
040417.english: The woman answered and said, I have no husband. Jesus said unto her, Thou hast well said, I have no husband:
040417.phonetic: A-ge-yv-no u-ne-tse-i hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; V-tla ye-ha a-gi-ye-hi.  Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ye-li ni-wi, v-tla ye-ha a-gi-ye-hi, tsa-dv;

040418.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᏂᎥᎩ ᎨᏣᏰᎯ, ᎪᎯᏃ ᏥᏣᎧᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏣᏰᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏫ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏫ.
040418.english: For thou hast had five husbands; and he whom thou now hast is not thy husband: in that saidst thou truly.
040418.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-ye-no na-ni-v-gi ge-tsa-ye-hi, go-hi-no tsi-tsa-ka-ha v-tla tsa-ye-hi yi-gi; na-s-gi tsi-ni-wi du-yu-go-dv ni-wi.

040419.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎦᏙᎴᎣᏍᎦ ᎭᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040419.english: The woman saith unto him, Sir, I perceive that thou art a prophet.
040419.phonetic: A-ge-yv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-s-ga-ya, ga-do-le-o-s-ga ha-do-le-ho-s-gi ge-sv-i.

040420.cherokee: ᏦᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎣᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎪᎢ; ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
040420.english: Our fathers worshipped in this mountain; and ye say, that in Jerusalem is the place where men ought to worship.
040420.phonetic: Tso-gi-ga-yv-li-ge a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-gi a-ni o-da-lv-i, a-se-no ni-hi hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-go-i; Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-s-gi-ni na-hna u-gv-wi-yu-ha a-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi.

040421.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎯᎨᏴ, ᏍᏉᎯ ᏳᎲᎦ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂ ᎣᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᏱᎦᏰᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
040421.english: Jesus saith unto her, Woman, believe me, the hour cometh, when ye shall neither in this mountain, nor yet at Jerusalem, worship the Father.
040421.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Hi-ge-yv, s-quo-hi-yu-hv-ga, dv-s-qua-lv-hi na-hi-yu v-tla a-ni o-da-lv-i, a-le na-s-quo Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, yi-ga-ye-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

040422.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏰᏃ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ.
040422.english: Ye worship ye know not what: we know what we worship: for salvation is of the Jews.
040422.phonetic: Ni-hi i-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha go-hu-s-di na-s-gi ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na; a-yv-s-gi-ni o-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-yu-s-di o-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hv-i; A-ni-tsu-si-ye-no a-ne-hv a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-na-nu-go-i-s-di.

040423.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏛᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏙᏛᏅᏔᏂ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ; ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᏚᏲᎰ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
040423.english: But the hour cometh, and now is, when the true worshippers shall worship the Father in spirit and in truth: for the Father seeketh such to worship him.
040423.phonetic: A-se-no dv-s-qua-lv-hi, a-le hna-quo u-s-qua-lv-hv, na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-sv a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gi dv-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-li A-ga-yv-li-ge do-dv-nv-ta-ni tsu-na-da-nv-do a-le du-yu-go-dv-i; A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no du-yo-ho na-s-gi i-yu-na-s-di gv-wa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi.

040424.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᏅᏙᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ.
040424.english: God is a Spirit: and they that worship him must worship him in spirit and in truth.
040424.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi A-da-nv-do; na-s-gi-no na a-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi tsu-na-da-nv-do a-le du-yu-go-dv tsu-nv-do-di u-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di.

040425.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎺᏌᏯ-ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏣᏃᏎᎰᎢ-ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᏓᎩᏃᏁᎵ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ.
040425.english: The woman saith unto him, I know that Messias cometh, which is called Christ: when he is come, he will tell us all things.
040425.phonetic: A-ge-yv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Tsi-ga-ta-ha u-lu-hi-s-di ge-sv Me-sa-ya---na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsa-no-se-ho-i---na-s-gi ga-lu-tsv-ha, da-gi-no-ne-li ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di.

040426.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᏴ ᏥᎬᏬᏁᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎺᏌᏯ.]
040426.english: Jesus saith unto her, I that speak unto thee am he.
040426.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; A-yv tsi-gv-wo-ne-di-ha na-s-gi [Me-sa-ya.]

040427.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᎵᏃᎮᏗᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏣᏲᎭ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎯᏯᎵᏃᎮᏍᏗ?  ᏳᏬᏎᎴᎢ.
040427.english: And upon this came his disciples, and marvelled that he talked with the woman: yet no man said, What seekest thou? or, Why talkest thou with her?
040427.phonetic: Hna-quo-no gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-ni-lu-tsv-gi, a-le u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi a-ge-yv a-li-no-he-di-s-gv-i.  A-se-no v-tla gi-lo-i, Ga-do tsa-yo-ha?  A-le Ga-do-no i-hi-ya-li-no-he-s-di?  yu-wo-se-le-i.

040428.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎯᏴᎩ ᎠᎹ ᎤᏢᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᏭᎶᏒᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏴᏫ;
040428.english: The woman then left her waterpot, and went her way into the city, and saith to the men,
040428.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ge-yv u-hi-yv-gi a-ma u-tlv-di, a-le di-ga-du-hv wu-lo-sv-gi, hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-lv-gi yv-wi;

040429.cherokee: ᎢᏕᎾ, ᏪᏥᎪᏩᏛ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎩᏃᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏆᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏱᎩ?
040429.english: Come, see a man, which told me all things that ever I did: is not this the Christ?
040429.phonetic: I-de-na, we-tsi-go-wa-dv a-s-ga-ya a-gi-no-ne-lv-hi ni-ga-v na-qua-dv-ne-li-do-lv-i.  Tla-s-go na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv yi-gi?

040430.english: Then they went out of the city, and came unto him.

040431.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏪᏙᎲᎩ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏩᏍᏗᏰᏔᏅᎩ, ᏗᏍᎩᏰᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎭᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᎦ, ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
040431.english: In the mean while his disciples prayed him, saying, Master, eat.
040431.phonetic: A-si-quo-no ga-du-hv we-do-hv-gi, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi gv-wa-s-di-ye-ta-nv-gi, Di-s-gi-ye-yo-hv-s-gi, ha-li-s-da-yv-hv-ga, a-na-di-s-gv-gi.

040432.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᎩᎭ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ.
040432.english: But he said unto them, I have meat to eat that ye know not of.
040432.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-gi-ha a-qua-li-s-da-yv-di ni-hi ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na.

040433.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏲᎮᎸ ᎤᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ?
040433.english: Therefore said the disciples one to another, Hath any man brought him ought to eat?
040433.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go gi-lo u-yo-he-lv u-li-s-da-yv-di?

040434.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ.
040434.english: Jesus saith unto them, My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.
040434.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi, Nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv a-gi-nv-si-dv i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi, a-le na-s-gi u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv a-gi-s-qua-di-s-di-yi, na-s-gi a-yv a-qua-li-s-da-yv-di.

040435.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎨᏥᏪᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᏏ ᏅᎩ ᎢᏯᏅᏙ ᎩᎳ ᏛᎦᏛᎾᏥ?  ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏗᏥᎦᏙᎵ ᏗᏥᏌᎳᏛᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᎶᎨᏒ ᏗᏣᎧᏅᎦ, ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᏧᏁᎩᏳ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᎠᏍᎫᏕᏍᏗᏱ.
040435.english: Say not ye, There are yet four months, and then cometh harvest? behold, I say unto you, Lift up your eyes, and look on the fields; for they are white already to harvest.
040435.phonetic: Tla-s-go hi-a i-ge-tsi-we-s-di yi-gi; A-si nv-gi i-ya-nv-do gi-la dv-ga-dv-na-tsi?  Gv-ni-yu-quo hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; di-tsi-ga-do-li di-tsi-sa-la-dv-ga, a-le de-ga-lo-ge-sv di-tsa-ka-nv-ga, hna-quo-ye-no tsu-ne-gi-yu, a-le u-s-qua-lv-hv a-s-gu-de-s-di-yi.

040436.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎫᏕᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᎫᏴᎡᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᎫᏕᏒᎯ ᏫᎦᏟᏏᏍᎪ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏫᏍᎩ ᎾᏃ ᎠᏍᎫᏕᏍᎩ.
040436.english: And he that reapeth receiveth wages, and gathereth fruit unto life eternal: that both he that soweth and he that reapeth may rejoice together.
040436.phonetic: A-le a-s-gu-de-s-gi a-ga-gu-yv-e-ho-i, a-le u-s-gu-de-sv-hi wi-ga-tli-si-s-go gv-ni-dv di-ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-tsu-la u-na-li-he-li-s-di-yi ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go a-wi-s-gi na-no a-s-gu-de-s-gi.

040437.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ; ᎩᎶ ᎠᏫᏍᎪᎢ ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎠᏍᎫᏕᏍᎪᎢ.
040437.english: And herein is that saying true, One soweth, and another reapeth.
040437.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-ni u-do-hi-yu-hi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha hi-a i-ga-we-dv tsi-gi; Gi-lo a-wi-s-go-i nv-wa-da-le-no a-s-gu-de-s-go-i.

040438.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏅᏒᎩ ᏫᏥᏍᎫᏕᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏂᎯ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏗᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᏥᏴᎸ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
040438.english: I sent you to reap that whereon ye bestowed no labour: other men laboured, and ye are entered into their labours.
040438.phonetic: I-tsv-nv-sv-gi wi-tsi-s-gu-de-s-di-yi na-hna ni-hi di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i; nv-wa-na-da-le di-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-gi, ni-hi-no i-tsi-yv-lv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

040439.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎠᏂᏌᎺᎵ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏃᎮᎸ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᎩᏃᏁᎸᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏆᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ.
040439.english: And many of the Samaritans of that city believed on him for the saying of the woman, which testified, He told me all that ever I did.
040439.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-dv-gi A-ni-sa-me-li na-hna ga-du-hv a-ne-hi gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi u-no-he-lv a-ge-yv hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i; A-gi-no-ne-lv-gi ni-ga-v na-qua-dv-ne-li-do-lv-i.

040440.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏌᎺᎵ ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸ ᎬᏩᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ ᏧᏪᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏔᎵ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᎤᏪᏙᎸᎩ.
040440.english: So when the Samaritans were come unto him, they besought him that he would tarry with them: and he abode there two days.
040440.phonetic: A-le A-ni-sa-me-li gv-wa-lu-tse-lv gv-wa-ta-yo-se-lv-gi tsu-we-la-di-da-s-di-yi, a-le Na-hna ta-li tsu-sv-hi-dv u-we-do-lv-gi.

040441.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅᎩ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ;
040441.english: And many more believed because of his own word;
040441.phonetic: A-le a-si u-ni-tsa-dv-gi u-no-hi-yu-nv-gi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi u-wa-sv ka-ne-gv-i;

040442.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎣᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᎥᏝ ᏂᎯᏉ ᏣᏁᏨ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᎭ ᏦᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ, ᎣᎬᏒᏰᏃ ᎣᏣᏛᎦᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ.
040442.english: And said unto the woman, Now we believe, not because of thy saying: for we have heard him ourselves, and know that this is indeed the Christ, the Saviour of the world.
040442.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi a-ge-yv; Hna-quo o-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga v-tla ni-hi-quo tsa-ne-tsv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-ha tso-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga, o-gv-sv-ye-no o-tsa-dv-ga-si, a-le o-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi hi-a u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv e-lo-hi A-s-de-li-s-gi.

040443.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏔᎵ ᏫᏄᏒᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏂᎩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏭᎶᏒᎩ.
040443.english: Now after two days he departed thence, and went into Galilee.
040443.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ta-li wi-nu-sv-lv na-hna u-ni-gi-sv-gi, a-le Ge-li-li wu-lo-sv-gi.

040444.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
040444.english: For Jesus himself testified, that a prophet hath no honour in his own country.
040444.phonetic: Tsi-sa-ye-no u-wa-sv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; a-do-le-ho-s-gi v-tla a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu yi-ge-so u-wa-sv u-tse-li-go-hi.

040445.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏭᎷᏨ, ᎨᎵᎵ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏕᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏨᎩ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎯᏰᏃ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᏅᏒᎩ ᏙᏗᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ.
040445.english: Then when he was come into Galilee, the Galilaeans received him, having seen all the things that he did at Jerusalem at the feast: for they also went unto the feast.
040445.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Ge-li-li wu-lu-tsv, Ge-li-li a-ne-hi de-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tsv-gi, u-ni-go-hv-hi-ye-no ge-sv-gi na-s-gi ni-ga-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi na-hi-yu da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i; na-s-quo-ye-no u-ne-nv-sv-gi do-di-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i.

040446.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᎨᏂ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ ᎨᎵᎵᏱ, ᎾᎿᎭᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎠᎹ ᎤᏬᏢᏔᏅᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎡᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏢᎬᎩ ᎨᏆᏂ.
040446.english: So Jesus came again into Cana of Galilee, where he made the water wine. And there was a certain nobleman, whose son was sick at Capernaum.
040446.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no ta-li-ne u-lu-tsv-gi Ge-ni ga-du-hv-i Ge-li-li-yi, na-hna gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di a-ma u-wo-tlv-ta-nv-i.  A-le gi-lo i-yu-s-di u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-s-de-li-s-gi e-hv-gi, na-s-gi u-we-tsi u-tlv-gv-gi Ge-qua-ni.

040447.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᏥᏌ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏧᎶᏒ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᎷᏥᎸᎢ, ᎤᏩᏛᎲᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᏪᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏭᏅᏬᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎤᏲᎱᏏᏕᎾᏰᏃ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040447.english: When he heard that Jesus was come out of Judaea into Galilee, he went unto him, and besought him that he would come down, and heal his son: for he was at the point of death.
040447.phonetic: Na-s-gi na u-dv-ga-nv Tsi-sa Tsu-di-yi tsu-lo-sv Ge-li-li u-lu-tsi-lv-i, u-wa-dv-hv-sv-gi, a-le u-ta-yo-se-lv-gi u-we-nv-s-di-yi wu-nv-wo-di-yi u-we-tsi, u-yo-hu-si-de-na-ye-no ge-sv-gi.

040448.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ, ᎬᏂ ᏱᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ.
040448.english: Then said Jesus unto him, Except ye see signs and wonders, ye will not believe.
040448.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla yv-ge-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga, gv-ni yi-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha u-ye-lv-dv-i a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di.

040449.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎮᎾ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏲᎱᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᏇᏥ.
040449.english: The nobleman saith unto him, Sir, come down ere my child die.
040449.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-s-de-li-s-gi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, he-na a-si-quo na-yo-hu-s-gv-na a-que-tsi.

040450.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎮᎾ, ᏤᏥ ᎬᏅ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ ᏥᏌ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏅᏒᎩ.
040450.english: Jesus saith unto him, Go thy way; thy son liveth. And the man believed the word that Jesus had spoken unto him, and he went his way.
040450.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-he-na, tse-tsi gv-nv.  A-le na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi Tsi-sa nu-we-se-lv-i, a-le u-we-nv-sv-gi.

040451.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎥᎠᎢᏒᎩ, ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏕᎬᏩᏠᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏃᏁᎸᎩ, ᏤᏥ ᎬᏅ, ᎥᎬᏬᏎᎸᎩ.
040451.english: And as he was now going down, his servants met him, and told him, saying, Thy son liveth.
040451.phonetic: Hna-quo-no v-a-i-sv-gi, tsu-nv-si-da-s-di de-gv-wa-tlo-sv-gi a-le gv-wa-no-ne-lv-gi, Tse-tsi gv-nv, v-gv-wo-se-lv-gi.

040452.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᏛᏛᏅᎩ ᎢᏳᎢ ᎤᎴᏅᎲ ᏏᏲᏍᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.  ᎤᏒᎯ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᏄᏗᎴᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎥᎬᏬᏎᎸᎩ.
040452.english: Then inquired he of them the hour when he began to amend. And they said unto him, Yesterday at the seventh hour the fever left him.
040452.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-dv-dv-nv-gi i-yu-i u-le-nv-hv si-yo-s-dv nu-li-s-da-ne-lv-i.  U-sv-hi sa-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv nu-di-le-hv-s-gv-na nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, v-gv-wo-se-lv-gi.

040453.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎢ; ᏤᏥ ᎬᏅ.  ᎤᏩᏒᏃ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040453.english: So the father knew that it was at the same hour, in the which Jesus said unto him, Thy son liveth: and himself believed, and his whole house.
040453.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-do-da u-do-le-ho-sv-gi na-hi-yu ge-sv Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-i; Tse-tsi gv-nv.  U-wa-sv-no u-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi a-le na-s-quo ni-ga-dv tsu-tse-li si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

040454.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏥᏌ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᎷᏦᏅᎯ, ᏧᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ.
040454.english: This is again the second miracle that Jesus did, when he was come out of Judaea into Galilee.
040454.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ta-li-ne u-s-qua-ni-go-di du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv Tsi-sa Ge-li-li u-lu-tso-nv-hi, Tsu-di-yi nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi.

040501.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ, ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎤᏪᏅᏒᎩ.
040501.english: After this there was a feast of the Jews; and Jesus went up to Jerusalem.
040501.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv, u-s-qua-lv-hv-gi A-ni-tsu-si tsu-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi; a-le Tsi-sa Tsi-lu-si-li-mi u-we-nv-sv-gi.

040502.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏂ ᎠᏫ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎥ ᎠᏓᏬᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏢᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏈᎷ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏡᏕᏍᏗ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ; ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎯᏍᎩ ᏓᏲᏓᏝᎭ.
040502.english: Now there is at Jerusalem by the sheep market a pool, which is called in the Hebrew tongue Bethesda, having five porches.
040502.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-ni a-wi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi na-v a-da-wo-s-di-yi go-tlv-ha na-s-gi A-ni-qui-lu u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv Tlu-de-s-di de-u-do-v; na-hna-ni hi-s-gi da-yo-da-tla-ha.

040503.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏂᏜᏓᎥᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏂᏢᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎨᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏲᎤᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᎢᏒᎯ, ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏴᎩ ᎤᎵᏖᎸᏗᏱ ᎠᎹ.
040503.english: In these lay a great multitude of impotent folk, of blind, halt, withered, waiting for the moving of the water.
040503.phonetic: Na-hna a-ni-ni-dla-v-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-ni-tlv-gi, a-le di-ni-ge-wi, a-le di-ni-yo-u-li, a-le u-nv-i-sv-hi, a-ni-ga-ti-yv-gi u-li-te-lv-di-yi a-ma.

040504.cherokee: ᎢᏴᏛᎭᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎦᎷᏥᎯᎲᎩ ᎠᏓᏬᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏖᎸᎲᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᎹ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᏅᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏖᎸᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎠᎹ, ᎤᏗᏩᏍᎬᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎥᏳᎩ ᎤᏱᎵᏙᎲᎢ.
040504.english: For an angel went down at a certain season into the pool, and troubled the water: whosoever then first after the troubling of the water stepped in was made whole of whatsoever disease he had.
040504.phonetic: I-yv-dv-ha-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ga-lu-tsi-hi-hv-gi a-da-wo-s-di-yi, a-le a-te-lv-hv-s-gv-gi a-ma, gi-lo-no na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-ta-nv-hi u-du-nv-hi hna-quo a-te-lv-nv-hi tsi-ge-so a-ma, u-di-wa-s-gv-gi ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di v-yu-gi u-yi-li-do-hv-i.

040505.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏅᎬᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏁᎳᎦᎵ ᎢᏳᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᏢᏨᎯ ᏄᏗᏩᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040505.english: And a certain man was there, which had an infirmity thirty and eight years.
040505.phonetic: A-le na-hna ga-nv-gv-gi gi-lo i-yu-s-di a-s-ga-ya, tso-a-s-go-hi ne-la-ga-li i-yu-de-ti-yv-dv gv-wa-tlv-tsv-hi nu-di-wa-s-gv-na ge-sv-gi.

040506.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎪᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏅᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᎡᏣᏅᏬᏗᏱ?
040506.english: When Jesus saw him lie, and knew that he had been now a long time in that case, he saith unto him, Wilt thou be made whole?
040506.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-go-hv-gi na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya ga-nv-gv-i, a-le u-do-le-ho-sv ge-sv-gi, go-hi-di-yu i-gv-wa-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-du-li-s-go e-tsa-nv-wo-di-yi?

040507.cherokee: ᎤᏢᎩ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᏍᎦᏯ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏰᏙᎰ ᎠᎹ ᎠᎵᏖᎸᎲᎦ, ᎠᏓᏬᏍᏗᏱ ᏩᎩᎧᎲᏍᎩ; ᎠᏏᏉᏰᏃ ᏥᏫᎦᎢᏐᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᏓᎩᎪᏂᏍᎪᎢ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏩᏠᎠᏍᎪᎢ.
040507.english: The impotent man answered him, Sir, I have no man, when the water is troubled, to put me into the pool: but while I am coming, another steppeth down before me.
040507.phonetic: U-tlv-gi u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-s-ga-ya, v-tla gi-lo ye-do-ho a-ma a-li-te-lv-hv-ga, a-da-wo-s-di-yi wa-gi-ka-hv-s-gi; a-si-quo-ye-no tsi-wi-ga-i-so-i, gi-lo da-gi-go-ni-s-go-i i-gv-yi wa-tlo-a-s-go-i.

040508.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᎴᎲᎦ, ᎯᎾᎩ ᏣᏤᏍᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎮᏓ.
040508.english: Jesus saith unto him, Rise, take up thy bed, and walk.
040508.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-le-hv-ga, hi-na-gi tsa-tse-s-do, a-le he-da.

040509.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏗᏩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏒᎩ ᎤᏤᏍᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏙᎸᎩ.  ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ.
040509.english: And immediately the man was made whole, and took up his bed, and walked: and on the same day was the sabbath.
040509.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-di-wa-sv-gi, a-le u-ne-sv-gi u-tse-s-do, a-le u-we-do-lv-gi.  A-le u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv ge-sv-gi na-hi-yu i-ga.

040510.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎴ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎯ; ᎪᎯ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᎩ ᏣᏤᏍᏙ ᏣᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ.
040510.english: The Jews therefore said unto him that was cured, It is the sabbath day: it is not lawful for thee to carry thy bed.
040510.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di A-ni-tsu-si hi-a nu-ni-we-se-le a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-hi; Go-hi u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-i, v-tla du-yu-go-dv yi-gi tsa-tse-s-do tsa-ni-da-s-di-yi.

040511.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎠᎩᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎾᎩ ᏣᏤᏍᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎮᏓ.
040511.english: He answered them, He that made me whole, the same said unto me, Take up thy bed, and walk.
040511.phonetic: Hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; A-gi-nv-wa-nv-hi hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-na-gi tsa-tse-s-do, a-le he-da.

040512.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ; ᎦᎪ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᏣᏤᏍᏙ ᎯᎾᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎮᏓ, ᏦᏎᎸᎯ?
040512.english: Then asked they him, What man is that which said unto thee, Take up thy bed, and walk?
040512.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-dv-dv-ne-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i; Ga-go i-yu-s-di na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya, Tsa-tse-s-do hi-na-gi a-le he-da, tso-se-lv-hi?

040513.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎦᏔᎮ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏥᏌᏰᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ; ᎤᏂᏣᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᏙᎲᎩ.
040513.english: And he that was healed wist not who it was: for Jesus had conveyed himself away, a multitude being in that place.
040513.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-tsi-nv-wa-nv-hi v-tla ya-ga-ta-he na-s-gi ge-sv-i; Tsi-sa-ye-no u-de-li-dv u-da-nv-sv-gi; u-ni-tsa-dv-ye-no na-hna a-ne-do-hv-gi.

040514.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏛᎲᎩ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎡᏣᏅᏩᏅ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏣᏍᎦᏅᏤᏍᏗ, ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏲ ᏱᏣᎷᏥᏏ.
040514.english: Afterward Jesus findeth him in the temple, and said unto him, Behold, thou art made whole: sin no more, lest a worse thing come unto thee.
040514.phonetic: O-ni-no Tsi-sa na-s-gi u-wa-dv-hv-gi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo e-tsa-nv-wa-nv; tle-s-di hna-quo i-lv-hi-yu yi-tsa-s-ga-nv-tse-s-di, u-tli-ye-no i-yu-yo yi-tsa-lu-tsi-si.

040515.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏚᏃᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ, ᏥᏌ ᎤᏅᏩᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040515.english: The man departed, and told the Jews that it was Jesus, which had made him whole.
040515.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-da-nv-sv-gi, a-le wi-du-no-ne-lv-gi A-ni-tsu-si, Tsi-sa u-nv-wa-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

040516.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏕᏯᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏲᎸᎩ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ.
040516.english: And therefore did the Jews persecute Jesus, and sought to slay him, because he had done these things on the sabbath day.
040516.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di A-ni-tsu-si u-na-de-ya-do-ta-nv-gi Tsi-sa, a-le u-ni-yo-lv-gi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi nu-dv-ne-lv u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga.

040517.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏁᏤᎸᎩ [ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ,] ᎡᏙᏓ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
040517.english: But Jesus answered them, My Father worketh hitherto, and I work.
040517.phonetic: A-se-no Tsi-sa du-ne-tse-lv-gi [hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi,] E-do-da go-hi i-ya-s-ti du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i, a-yv-no na-s-quo da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i.

040518.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᎲᎩ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏲᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᏛᏅᎢ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
040518.english: Therefore the Jews sought the more to kill him, because he not only had broken the sabbath, but said also that God was his Father, making himself equal with God.
040518.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di A-ni-tsu-si u-tli i-ga-i u-na-du-lv-hv-gi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi v-tla u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-quo u-wa-sv u-yo-s-ta-nv-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi U-do-da u-dv-nv-i, i-tsu-la-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi na-da-dv-ne-hv-i.

040519.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎤᏪᏥ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵᎦ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏙᎬᏩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ, ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
040519.english: Then answered Jesus and said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do: for what things soever he doeth, these also doeth the Son likewise.
040519.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; [U-ne-la-nv-hi] U-we-tsi v-tla ye-li-ga go-hu-s-di u-wa-sv ge-sv yi-do-gv-wa-lv-wi-s-da-si, a-go-wa-ti-s-gv-s-gi-ni U-do-da du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i; na-s-gi-ye-no nu-s-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i na-s-gi na-s-quo U-we-tsi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i.

040520.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎰ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎯᎠ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
040520.english: For the Father loveth the Son, and sheweth him all things that himself doeth: and he will shew him greater works than these, that ye may marvel.
040520.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no u-ge-yu-hi-yu U-we-tsi, a-le ga-na-nu-go-wi-se-ho ni-ga-dv u-wa-sv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i; a-le u-tli i-ga-i di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di da-ga-na-nu-go-wi-se-li e-s-ga-quo hi-a; na-s-gi i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-hi-s-di-yi.

040521.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᏥᏓᎴᏗᏍᎪ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᏥᏂᏕᎬᏁᎰᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎰ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎡᎳ.
040521.english: For as the Father raiseth up the dead, and quickeneth them; even so the Son quickeneth whom he will.
040521.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no tsi-da-le-di-s-go tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi, a-le di-nv-no-dv tsi-ni-de-gv-ne-ho-i, na-s-gi-ya-s-gi-ni U-we-tsi di-nv-no-dv ni-de-gv-ne-ho na-ni-v na-s-gi-quo e-la.

040522.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏗᎫᎪᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᏚᏲᎯᏎᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎾᎦᏛ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
040522.english: For the Father judgeth no man, but hath committed all judgment unto the Son:
040522.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no na-s-quo v-tla gi-lo yi-di-gu-go-da-ne-ho-i, du-yo-hi-se-lv-s-gi-ni U-we-tsi na-ga-dv di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv-i,

040523.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏂᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᎾᏂᎸᏉᏗᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.  ᎩᎶ ᏂᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎸᏉᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ.
040523.english: That all men should honour the Son, even as they honour the Father. He that honoureth not the Son honoureth not the Father which hath sent him.
040523.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-ni-lv-quo-do-di-yi U-we-tsi, na-s-gi-ya tsi-na-ni-lv-quo-di-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.  Gi-lo ni-ga-lv-quo-di-s-gv-na tsi-ge-so U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi, v-tla yi-ga-lv-quo-di-s-go A-ga-yv-li-ge na-s-gi nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv.

040524.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎩ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎭ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎾᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏚᎪᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᏅᏒ, ᎬᏂᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏭᎶᏒ.
040524.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that heareth my word, and believeth on him that sent me, hath everlasting life, and shall not come into condemnation; but is passed from death unto life.
040524.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; A-dv-gi-s-gi tsi-ne-gv-i, a-le go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi u-ha gv-ni-dv na-li-s-qua-di-s-gv-na, a-le na-s-gi v-tla tsu-du-go-do-di yi-gi u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, a-yo-hu-hi-s-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv u-da-nv-sv, gv-ni-dv di-ge-sv wu-lo-sv.

040525.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᏂᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040525.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, The hour is coming, and now is, when the dead shall hear the voice of the Son of God: and they that hear shall live.
040525.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Dv-s-qua-lv-hi a-le hna-quo u-s-qua-lv-hv tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-dv-go-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ka-ne-gv-i, a-le u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi u-na-dv-ni-di-s-di ge-se-s-di.

040526.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎸ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
040526.english: For as the Father hath life in himself; so hath he given to the Son to have life in himself;
040526.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no gv-ni-dv u-tse-li-ga tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo u-ne-lv U-we-tsi gv-ni-dv u-tse-li-ga i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

040527.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎸ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗᏱ, ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040527.english: And hath given him authority to execute judgment also, because he is the Son of man.
040527.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo u-ne-lv tsu-wu-go-do-di-yi, nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv yv-wi U-we-tsi ge-sv-i.

040528.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏓᏤᎵᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᏯᎢ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏛᎾᏛᎦᏂ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ,
040528.english: Marvel not at this: for the hour is coming, in the which all that are in the graves shall hear his voice,
040528.phonetic: Tle-s-di na-s-gi hi-a i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi, dv-s-qua-lv-hi-ye-no na-hi-yu da-tse-li-s-dv a-ni-ya-i ni-ga-dv dv-na-dv-ga-ni ka-ne-gv-i,

040529.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏛᏂᎾᏄᎪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏙᏛᎾᎴᏔᏂ, ᎤᏲᏃ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏓᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏙᏛᎾᎴᏔᏂ.
040529.english: And shall come forth; they that have done good, unto the resurrection of life; and they that have done evil, unto the resurrection of damnation.
040529.phonetic: A-le dv-ni-na-nu-go-tsi, na-s-gi na o-s-dv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi gv-ni-dv ge-sv wi-do-dv-na-le-ta-ni, u-yo-no tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi u-da-s-dv-di-s-di ge-sv wi-do-dv-na-le-ta-ni.

040530.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵ ᏱᏙᎬᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ; ᎦᏛᎩᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏉᎪᏔᏅ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᎩᏲᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎩᏲᎲᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ.
040530.english: I can of mine own self do nothing: as I hear, I judge: and my judgment is just; because I seek not mine own will, but the will of the Father which hath sent me.
040530.phonetic: V-tla go-hu-s-di a-quv-sv ge-sv ye-li yi-do-gv-gi-lv-wi-s-da-si; ga-dv-gi-s-gv na-s-gi-ya de-gu-go-di-s-go-i, a-le da-quo-go-ta-nv du-yu-go-dv ge-so-i; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go na-gi-yo-hv-na ge-sv a-quv-sv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, a-gi-yo-hv-s-gi-ni a-da-nv-te-s-gv E-do-da na-s-gi nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv.

040531.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏋᏒ ᏱᎦᏓᏃᎮᎭ, ᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᏩᏙᎯᏳᎭ.
040531.english: If I bear witness of myself, my witness is not true.
040531.phonetic: I-yu-no a-quv-sv yi-ga-da-no-he-ha, tsi-no-he-s-gv v-tla yi-gv-wa-do-hi-yu-ha.

040532.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎡᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
040532.english: There is another that beareth witness of me; and I know that the witness which he witnesseth of me is true.
040532.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le e-ha a-yv a-gi-no-he-s-gi, a-le tsi-ga-ta-ha u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv na-s-gi ka-no-he-s-gv-i, a-yv a-gi-no-he-s-gv-i.

040533.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏧᏬᎸ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎩ.
040533.english: Ye sent unto John, and he bare witness unto the truth.
040533.phonetic: Tsa-ni tsu-wo-lv i-tsa-da-nv-sv-gi, a-le na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv u-no-he-lv-gi.

040534.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᎦᏓᏂᎸᎦ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎠ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
040534.english: But I receive not testimony from man: but these things I say, that ye might be saved.
040534.phonetic: A-se-no a-yv v-tla yi-di-ga-da-ni-lv-ga yv-wi a-gi-no-he-s-gv-i, a-se-no na-s-gi hi-a ni-tsi-we-a e-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

040535.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎸᏌᏓ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᏞᎦ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏒᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏘᏍᏛᎢ.
040535.english: He was a burning and a shining light: and ye were willing for a season to rejoice in his light.
040535.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-da-we-li-gi-s-gi a-le tsu-lv-sa-da a-tsv-s-do-di ge-sv-gi; ni-hi-no tle-ga o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-sv-gi i-tsa-li-he-li-s-di-yi na-s-gi i-ga u-ti-s-dv-i.

040536.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎠᏇᎭ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏣᏂ; ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎠᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎪ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ;
040536.english: But I have greater witness than that of John: for the works which the Father hath given me to finish, the same works that I do, bear witness of me, that the Father hath sent me.
040536.phonetic: A-se-no u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu a-gi-no-he-s-gi a-que-ha e-s-ga-quo Tsa-ni; di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-ye-no A-ga-yv-li-ge a-gi-ne-lv-hi a-gi-s-qua-di-s-di-yi, na-s-gi tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha, a-gi-no-he-s-go a-yv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i;

040537.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᎸ.  ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᎨᏣᏛᎦᏃ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᎨᏥᎪᎰ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ.
040537.english: And the Father himself, which hath sent me, hath borne witness of me. Ye have neither heard his voice at any time, nor seen his shape.
040537.phonetic: A-le A-ga-yv-li-ge nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi a-gi-no-he-lv.  V-tla i-lv-hi-yu yi-ge-tsa-dv-ga-no ka-ne-gv-i, a-le yi-ge-tsi-go-ho nu-s-dv-i.

040538.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏯᎠ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏰᏦᎢᏳᎲᏍᎦ.
040538.english: And ye have not his word abiding in you: for whom he hath sent, him ye believe not.
040538.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi u-ne-tsv-i v-tla yi-tsi-ya-a, na-s-gi-ye-no na nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv v-tla ye-tso-i-yu-hv-s-ga.

040539.cherokee: ᏗᏥᎪᎵᏯ ᎪᏪᎵ, ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᏥᎭ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎩ.
040539.english: Search the scriptures; for in them ye think ye have eternal life: and they are they which testify of me.
040539.phonetic: Di-tsi-go-li-ya go-we-li, na-hna-ye-no na-li-s-qua-di-s-gv-na gv-ni-dv i-tsi-ha i-tsi-ye-lv-ha, a-le na-s-gi na go-we-li a-yv a-gi-no-he-s-gi.

040540.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏚᎵᎭ ᏍᎩᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
040540.english: And ye will not come to me, that ye might have life.
040540.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla yi-tsa-du-li-ha s-gi-lu-tse-di-yi gv-ni-dv i-tsa-tse-li-ga i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

040541.english: I receive not honour from men.

040542.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᎦᏔᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏥᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040542.english: But I know you, that ye have not the love of God in you.
040542.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsv-ga-ta-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi e-tsi-ge-yu-i-yu ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

040543.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎠᎩᎷᎯᏍᏔᏅ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏱᏗᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᎦ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏕᏅᏙᎥ ᏳᎷᎯᏍᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏱᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᎩ.
040543.english: I am come in my Father's name, and ye receive me not: if another shall come in his own name, him ye will receive.
040543.phonetic: A-yv E-do-da de-u-do-v a-gi-lu-hi-s-ta-nv, v-tla-no yi-di-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-ga.  I-yu-no nv-wa-da-le u-wa-sv de-nv-do-v yu-lu-hi-s-ta-nv, na-s-gi a-se yi-de-tsa-da-ni-lv-gi.

040544.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬ ᏥᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᎦ, ᏂᏥᏲᎲᎾᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏓᏗᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ?
