040544.english: How can ye believe, which receive honour one of another, and seek not the honour that cometh from God only?
040544.phonetic: Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yi-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga, i-tsv-sv de-tsa-da-lv-quo-di-s-gv tsi-de-tsa-da-ni-lv-ga, ni-tsi-yo-hv-na-no tsi-gi v-da-di-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wa-sv-hi-yu nv-da-yu-li-s-go-lv-do-di tsi-gi?

040545.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏓᎧᏃᏁᎵ ᏓᏲᎫᎯᏍᏔᏂ ᏱᏍᎩᏰᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎡᎭ ᎢᏧᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎼᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᏥᎩ.
040545.english: Do not think that I will accuse you to the Father: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses, in whom ye trust.
040545.phonetic: Tle-s-di A-ga-yv-li-ge-i da-ka-no-ne-li da-yo-gu-hi-s-ta-ni yi-s-gi-ye-li-se-he-s-di; a-si-yv-wi e-ha i-tsu-hi-s-di-s-gi, Mo-si, na-s-gi tse-tsa-ne-lo-di tsi-gi.

040546.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎼᏏ ᏱᎡᏦᎢᏳᎲᏍᎨᎢ ᎠᏴ ᏱᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎩ.
040546.english: For had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed me: for he wrote of me.
040546.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no Mo-si yi-e-tso-i-yu-hv-s-ge-i a-yv yi-s-gi-yo-i-yu-ne-i, na-s-gi-ye-no a-yv a-gi-no-he-s-gv-i u-wo-we-la-nv-gi.

040547.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎲᎦ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ?
040547.english: But if ye believe not his writings, how shall ye believe my words?
040547.phonetic: A-se-no ni-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na yi-gi na-s-gi u-wo-we-la-nv-hi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yi-tso-hi-yu-hv-ga a-yv tsi-ne-gv-i?

040601.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ, ᏥᏌ ᏚᏪᏐᏨᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎥᏓᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏈᎵᏯ ᎥᏓᎸ ᏥᏚᏙᎥ.
040601.english: After these things Jesus went over the sea of Galilee, which is the sea of Tiberias.
040601.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv, Tsi-sa du-we-so-tsv-gi ge-li-li v-da-lv-i, na-s-gi Da-qui-li-ya v-da-lv tsi-du-do-v.

040602.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏂᏓᏛᏁᎲ ᎫᏂᏢᎩ.
040602.english: And a great multitude followed him, because they saw his miracles which he did on them that were diseased.
040602.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-ta-nv-hi gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-gv na-s-gi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-di ni-da-dv-ne-hv gu-ni-tlv-gi.

040603.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎿᎭᎷᏒᎩ ᎣᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏪᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.
040603.english: And Jesus went up into a mountain, and there he sat with his disciples.
040603.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-hna-lu-sv-gi o-da-lv-i, a-le na-hna u-we-nv-gi, a-le na-s-quo gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.

040604.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩᏃ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏕᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040604.english: And the passover, a feast of the Jews, was nigh.
040604.phonetic: Ka-no-hi-ye-gi-no di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga u-s-qua-lv-hi-de-na ge-sv-gi.

040605.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎪᎲ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏗᎬᏩᎷᏤᎵᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏈᎵᎩ; ᎭᏢ ᏓᎩᏩᏏ ᎦᏚ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏂᎩᏍᏗ.
040605.english: When Jesus then lifted up his eyes, and saw a great company come unto him, he saith unto Philip, Whence shall we buy bread, that these may eat?
040605.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no du-sa-la-da-nv di-ga-do-li, a-le du-go-hv u-ni-tsa-ti di-gv-wa-lu-tse-li-sv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi Qui-li-gi; Ha-tlv da-gi-wa-si ga-du hi-a u-ni-gi-s-di.

040606.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ ᎠᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎩ, ᎤᏩᏒᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎩ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
040606.english: And this he said to prove him: for he himself knew what he would do.
040606.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi a-tsi-go-li-ye-s-gv-gi, u-wa-sv-ye-no a-ga-ta-hv-gi i-yu-dv-ne-di-yi.

040607.cherokee: ᏈᎵᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᎵᏧᏈ ᎠᏂᎩᏏ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎦᏚ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏱᎦᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎩᏒᏍᏗᏱ.
040607.english: Philip answered him, Two hundred pennyworth of bread is not sufficient for them, that every one of them may take a little.
040607.phonetic: Qui-li-gi hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-li-tsu-qui a-ni-gi-si tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ga-du v-tla ye-li yi-ga-gi, na-s-gi a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha u-s-di u-ni-gi-sv-s-di-yi.

040608.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ, ᎡᏂᏗ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ;
040608.english: One of his disciples, Andrew, Simon Peter's brother, saith unto him,
040608.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ge-sv a-si-yv-wi, E-ni-di tsu-do-i-dv, Sa-wa-ni Qui-da di-na-da-nv-tli, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi;

040609.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏫᏄᏣ ᎠᏂ ᎡᏙᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏰᎭ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏕᎦᏁᎭ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏎᏉᎧᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏥᏄᏂᏣᏔ?
040609.english: There is a lad here, which hath five barley loaves, and two small fishes: but what are they among so many?
040609.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi a-wi-nu-tsa a-ni e-do-ha, na-s-gi da-ye-ha hi-s-gi u-tsa-le-s-di--i-yu-s-di ga-du, a-le ta-li tsu-na-s-di a-tsa-di de-ga-ne-ha; a-se-no a-se-quo-ka-ni na-s-gi, hi-a-no tsi-nu-ni-tsa-ta?

040610.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏩᎾᏅᎥᎦ ᏴᏫ.  ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎤᏣᏛᎩ ᎦᏄᎸᏒᎩ.  ᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᎾᏅᏅᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎯᏍᎩᎭ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ.
040610.english: And Jesus said, Make the men sit down. Now there was much grass in the place. So the men sat down, in number about five thousand.
040610.phonetic: A-le Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; wa-na-nv-v-ga yv-wi.  Na-hna-no u-tsa-dv-gi ga-nu-lv-sv-gi.  Ho-wa-no u-na-nv-nv-gi a-ni-s-ga-ya hi-s-gi-ha i-ya-ga-yv-li i-yv-dv i-ya-ni-i.

040611.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏚ ᏚᎩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ ᏚᏯᏙᎮᎸᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᏚᏂᏯᏙᎮᎸᎩ ᎤᎾᏅᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏣᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
040611.english: And Jesus took the loaves; and when he had given thanks, he distributed to the disciples, and the disciples to them that were set down; and likewise of the fishes as much as they would.
040611.phonetic: A-le Tsi-sa ga-du du-gi-sv-gi, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv du-ya-do-he-lv-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no du-ni-ya-do-he-lv-gi u-na-nv-nv-hi, a-le na-s-quo a-tsa-di ni-ga-v du-na-du-li-s-gv-i.

040612.cherokee: ᏚᏃᎸᏒᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎢᏥᏟᏌ ᎤᎵᎬᎭᎷᏴᎯ ᎤᏘᏴᎯ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏤᏬᏤᏍᏗ.
040612.english: When they were filled, he said unto his disciples, Gather up the fragments that remain, that nothing be lost.
040612.phonetic: Du-no-lv-sv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi; I-tsi-tli-sa u-li-gv-ha-lu-yv-hi u-ti-yv-hi, tle-s-di go-hu-s-di yu-tse-wo-tse-s-di.

040613.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᏂᏟᏌᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏔᎷᏣ ᏚᏂᎧᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᎵᎬᎭᎷᏴᎯ ᎯᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᏚ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎯ ᎤᎾᏘᏰᎸᎯ.
040613.english: Therefore they gathered them together, and filled twelve baskets with the fragments of the five barley loaves, which remained over and above unto them that had eaten.
040613.phonetic: Ho-wa-no u-ni-tli-sa-nv-gi, a-le ta-la-du ta-lu-tsa du-ni-ka-li-s-ta-nv-gi u-li-gv-ha-lu-yv-hi hi-s-gi u-tsa-le-s-di--i-yu-s-di ga-du na-s-gi u-na-li-s-da-yv-nv-hi u-na-ti-ye-lv-hi.

040614.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏥᏌ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
040614.english: Then those men, when they had seen the miracle that Jesus did, said, This is of a truth that prophet that should come into the world.
040614.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na a-ni-s-ga-ya, u-ni-go-hv u-s-qua-ni-go-di Tsi-sa du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, Hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; hi-a u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya na-s-gi na A-do-le-ho-s-gi e-lo-hi u-lu-hi-s-di tsi-ge-sv-gi.

040615.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏗᏂᎷᏥᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏩᏗᏝᎥᏔᏂᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏅᏗᎬᏩᏁᎵᏒᎢ, ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏦᏓᎸ ᏭᏣᏒᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040615.english: When Jesus therefore perceived that they would come and take him by force, to make him a king, he departed again into a mountain himself alone.
040615.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa u-do-le-ho-sv di-ni-lu-tsi-sv-gi a-le di-gv-wa-di-tla-v-ta-ni-sv u-gv-wi-yu-hi nv-di-gv-wa-ne-li-sv-i, u-da-nv-sv-gi ta-li-ne tso-da-lv wu-tsa-sv-gi u-wa-sv ge-sv-i.

040616.english: And when even was now come, his disciples went down unto the sea,

040617.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏣᏅᎩ ᎨᏆᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏫᏚᏂᏐᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ.  ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎵᏏᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎷᏤᎮᎢ.
040617.english: And entered into a ship, and went over the sea toward Capernaum. And it was now dark, and Jesus was not come to them.
040617.phonetic: A-le tsi-yu-hi u-na-tsa-nv-gi Ge-qua-ni i-di-tlv wi-du-ni-so-hi-s-ta-nv-gi.  A-le Hna-quo u-li-si-gv-gi, a-le Tsi-sa v-tla yu-ni-lu-tse-he-i.

040618.english: And the sea arose by reason of a great wind that blew.

040619.cherokee: ᏦᎢᎭᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏅᎩᎭ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎤᏂᎦᏪᎸ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎥᏓᎵ ᎦᏚᎢ ᎠᎢᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏳᎯ ᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏥᏗᏒᎩ.  ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲᎩ.
040619.english: So when they had rowed about five and twenty or thirty furlongs, they see Jesus walking on the sea, and drawing nigh unto the ship: and they were afraid.
040619.phonetic: Tso-i-ha-no a-le nv-gi-ha i-yu-tli-lo-dv u-ni-ga-we-lv, u-ni-go-hv-gi Tsi-sa v-da-li ga-du-i a-i-sv-gi, a-le tsi-yu-hi na-v u-lu-tsi-di-sv-gi.  A-le a-ni-s-ga-i-hv-gi.

040620.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴᏉ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ.
040620.english: But he saith unto them, It is I; be not afraid.
040620.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-yv-quo, tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-ga-i-he-s-di.

040621.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏳᎯ ᏕᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᏨᎩ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏥᏳ ᏭᏔᎳᏗᏨᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎤᎾᏅᏔᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
040621.english: Then they willingly received him into the ship: and immediately the ship was at the land whither they went.
040621.phonetic: Hna-quo-no tsi-yu-hi de-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-tsv-gi; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv tsi-yu wu-ta-la-di-tsv-gi na-hna u-na-nv-ta-wa-di-sv-i.

040622.cherokee: ᎤᎩᏨᏛᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎥᏓᎵ ᎢᏍᎪᎾ ᏅᏛᏂᏙᎾᎢ, ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏅᏩᏓᎵ ᏥᏳ ᎾᏔᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏦᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏂᏚᎵᎪᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏥᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏣᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏂᎩᏒᎢ;^
040622.english: The day following, when the people which stood on the other side of the sea saw that there was none other boat there, save that one whereinto his disciples were entered, and that Jesus went not with his disciples into the boat, but that his disciples were gone away alone;
040622.phonetic: U-gi-tsv-dv-no u-ni-tsa-ti v-da-li i-s-go-na nv-dv-ni-do-na-i, u-na-do-le-ho-sv nv-wa-da-li tsi-yu na-ta-lv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na u-wa-sv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-tso-ta-nv-hi, a-le Tsi-sa ni-du-li-go-ne-lv-na ge-sv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi tsi-yu-hi u-na-tsa-nv, a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-nv-sv u-na-ni-gi-sv-i;^

040623.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏂᏗᎬᏩᏓᎴ ᏥᏳ ᏓᏈᎵᏯ ᏂᏙᏓᏳᏂᏅᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏚᏂᏃᎸᎩ ᎾᎥᎢ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏅᎢ^
040623.english: (Howbeit there came other boats from Tiberias nigh unto the place where they did eat bread, after that the Lord had given thanks:)
040623.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv ni-di-gv-wa-da-le tsi-yu Da-qui-li-ya ni-do-da-yu-ni-nv-s-ta-nv-hi du-ni-no-lv-gi na-v-i na-hna U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-li-he-li-tsv-i a-le u-na-li-s-da-yv-nv-i^

040624.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎾᎿᎭᏁᏙᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᎰᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏳᎯ ᏚᎾᏣᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏆᏂ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎩ, ᎠᏂᏲᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ.
040624.english: When the people therefore saw that Jesus was not there, neither his disciples, they also took shipping, and came to Capernaum, seeking for Jesus.
040624.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hna-quo u-ni-tsa-ti u-na-do-le-ho-sv Tsi-sa na-hna ne-do-hv-na ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-quo gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-ho-hi, na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-yu-hi du-na-tsa-nv-gi, a-le Ge-qua-ni u-ni-lu-tsv-gi, a-ni-yo-hv-gi Tsi-sa.

040625.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏩᏛᎲᏃ ᎥᏓᎵ ᎢᏍᎪᏂᏗᏢ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎯᎳᎪ ᎢᏳ ᎠᏂ ᏣᎷᏤᎢ?
040625.english: And when they had found him on the other side of the sea, they said unto him, Rabbi, when camest thou hither?
040625.phonetic: Gv-wa-wa-dv-hv-no v-da-li i-s-go-ni-di-tlv hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, hi-la-go i-yu a-ni tsa-lu-tse-i?

040626.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᏚᏁᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏍᎩᏲᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏥᎪᎲᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᏚ ᏕᏥᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏦᎸᏒᎢ.
040626.english: Jesus answered them and said, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Ye seek me, not because ye saw the miracles, but because ye did eat of the loaves, and were filled.
040626.phonetic: Tsi-sa du-ne-tse-lv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; S-gi-yo-ha v-tla yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-s-qua-ni-go-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di i-tsi-go-hv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-quo-s-gi-ni ga-du de-tsi-gv-i, a-le de-tso-lv-sv-i.

040627.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ ᎢᎬᏂᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏍᏓᏱᏛ.
040627.english: Labour not for the meat which perisheth, but for that meat which endureth unto everlasting life, which the Son of man shall give unto you: for him hath God the Father sealed.
040627.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di i-tsi-wa-dv-di-yi a-li-s-da-yv-di a-yo-li, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na a-li-s-da-yv-di a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na di-ge-sv-i i-gv-ni-dv tsi-gi, na-s-gi yv-wi U-we-tsi i-tsi-ne-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge u-s-da-yi-dv.

040628.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏓᏲᏣᏛᏁᎵ ᏙᏓᏲᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
040628.english: Then said they unto him, What shall we do, that we might work the works of God?
040628.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do da-yo-tsa-dv-ne-li do-da-yo-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-li U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i?

040629.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ.
040629.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, This is the work of God, that ye believe on him whom he hath sent.
040629.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-a na-s-gi na di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi e-tso-i-yu-di-yi na-s-gi na nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv.

040630.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎯᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏲᎢᏳᏗᏱ?  ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ?
040630.english: They said therefore unto him, What sign shewest thou then, that we may see, and believe thee? what dost thou work?
040630.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no u-s-di u-ye-lv-dv hi-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga, na-s-gi o-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi a-le i-tsv-yo-i-yu-di-yi?  Ga-do u-s-di de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha?

040631.cherokee: ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎹᎾ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ; "ᏕᎠᏁᎲᎩ ᎦᏚ ᎤᏂᎩᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ."
040631.english: Our fathers did eat manna in the desert; as it is written, He gave them bread from heaven to eat.
040631.phonetic: Di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge-i ma-na a-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-gi i-na-ge-i, na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la; "De-a-ne-hv-gi ga-du u-ni-gi-s-di ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi."

040632.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᎼᏏ ᏱᏥᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏚ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎡᏙᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏥᏁᎭ ᎦᏚ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
040632.english: Then Jesus said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Moses gave you not that bread from heaven; but my Father giveth you the true bread from heaven.
040632.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; V-tla Mo-si yi-tsi-ne-le na-s-gi na ga-du ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi; E-do-da-s-gi-ni i-tsi-ne-ha ga-du u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

040633.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᏚ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏛ Ꭰ'ᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ.
040633.english: For the bread of God is he which cometh down from heaven, and giveth life unto the world.
040633.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-tse-li-ga ga-du na-s-gi hi-a ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi tsi-gi, a-le gv-ni-dv a'ne-hi tsi-gi e-lo-hi.

040634.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏍᎩᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎦᏚ.
040634.english: Then said they unto him, Lord, evermore give us this bread.
040634.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, ni-go-hi-lv s-gi-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi hi-a ga-du.

040635.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏛᏂᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎦᏚ.  ᎩᎶ ᎠᎩᎷᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏲᏏᏐᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏔᏕᎪᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040635.english: And Jesus said unto them, I am the bread of life: he that cometh to me shall never hunger; and he that believeth on me shall never thirst.
040635.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-yv na-s-gi na a-dv-ni-di-s-do-di ga-du.  Gi-lo a-gi-lu-tse-he-s-di v-tla u-yo-si-so-di yi-ge-se-s-di, a-le gi-lo a-quo-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di v-tla u-ta-de-go-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

040636.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏍᎩᎪᏩᏛᎲ ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ.
040636.english: But I said unto you, That ye also have seen me, and believe not.
040636.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-lv-gi; S-gi-go-wa-dv-hv a-se-no v-tla yi-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga.

040637.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏗᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᏎ ᏓᎬᎩᎷᏤᎵ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎩᎷᏤᎸᎯ ᎠᏎ ᎥᏝ ᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ.
040637.english: All that the Father giveth me shall come to me; and him that cometh to me I will in no wise cast out.
040637.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv E-do-da di-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi a-se da-gv-gi-lu-tse-li; a-le na-s-gi na a-gi-lu-tse-lv-hi a-se v-tla tsi-nu-go-wi-s-di yi-gi.

040638.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏰᏃ ᏗᏆᏠᎣᏒ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ.
040638.english: For I came down from heaven, not to do mine own will, but the will of him that sent me.
040638.phonetic: Ga-lv-la-di-ye-no di-qua-tlo-o-sv, v-tla a-quv-sv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv.

040639.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᏎᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᏗᎦᎴᏙᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040639.english: And this is the Father's will which hath sent me, that of all which he hath given me I should lose nothing, but should raise it up again at the last day.
040639.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di a-da-nv-te-s-gv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i na-s-gi nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv di-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi ge-sv-i, go-hu-s-di a-gi-yo-hu-se-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, di-ga-le-do-di-yi-s-gi-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-ga ge-se-s-di.

040640.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏙᏓᏥᏯᎴᏔᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040640.english: And this is the will of him that sent me, that every one which seeth the Son, and believeth on him, may have everlasting life: and I will raise him up at the last day.
040640.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di a-da-nv-te-s-gv A-ga-yv-li-ge nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv, na-s-gi gi-lo a-go-wa-ti-s-gi Uwe-tsi, a-le na-s-gi go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, na-li-s-qua-di-s-gv-na gv-ni-dv u-tse-li-ga i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi; a-le na-s-gi a-yv do-da-tsi-ya-le-ta-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-ga ge-se-s-di.

040641.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎬᏩᎪᏁᎶᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏚ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏛᎶᏒᎯ.
040641.english: The Jews then murmured at him, because he said, I am the bread which came down from heaven.
040641.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si gv-wa-go-ne-lo-hi-se-lv-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-i, a-yv na-s-gi na ga-du ga-lv-la-di nv-da-dv-lo-sv-hi.

040642.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏌ ᏱᎩ, ᏦᏩ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᏗᏗᎦᏔᎯ ᏥᎩ?  ᎦᏙᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏛᏆᏠᎠᏒᎯ, ᏣᏗᎭ?
040642.english: And they said, Is not this Jesus, the son of Joseph, whose father and mother we know? how is it then that he saith, I came down from heaven?
040642.phonetic: Hi-a-no nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Tla-s-go hi-a na-s-gi na Tsi-sa yi-gi, Tso-wa u-we-tsi, na-s-gi u-do-da a-le u-tsi di-di-ga-ta-hi tsi-gi?  Ga-do-no u-li-s-do-ta-nv, ga-lv-la-di nv-dv-qua-tlo-a-sv-hi, tsa-di-ha?

040643.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎪᏁᎶᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
040643.english: Jesus therefore answered and said unto them, Murmur not among yourselves.
040643.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Tle-s-di yi-tsi-go-ne-lo-s-ge-s-di.

040644.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎬᎩᎷᏥᏏ, ᎬᏂ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᏎᏒᏛ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᏓᏥᏯᎴᏔᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040644.english: No man can come to me, except the Father which hath sent me draw him: and I will raise him up at the last day.
040644.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo ye-li yv-gv-gi-lu-tsi-si, gv-ni A-ga-yv-li-ge-i nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv u-se-sv-dv yi-gi; a-le a-yv na-s-gi do-da-tsi-ya-le-ta-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-ga ge-se-s-di.

040645.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩᏱ; "ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏲᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ."  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏕᎶᏆᎡᎸᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎬᎩᎷᏤᎰᎢ.
040645.english: It is written in the prophets, And they shall be all taught of God. Every man therefore that hath heard, and hath learned of the Father, cometh unto me.
040645.phonetic: Hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi-yi; "A-le ni-ga-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-yo-nv-hi ge-se-s-di."  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-ga-dv u-na-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi a-le u-na-de-lo-qua-e-lv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, gv-gi-lu-tse-ho-i.

040646.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏱᎩ, Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
040646.english: Not that any man hath seen the Father, save he which is of God, he hath seen the Father.
040646.phonetic: V-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv gi-lo A-ga-yv-li-ge-i u-go-hv-hi yi-gi, na u-wa-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi; na-s-gi u-go-hv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

040647.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᎭ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ.
040647.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me hath everlasting life.
040647.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, A-quo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-ha a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ni-dv.

040648.english: I am that bread of life.

040649.cherokee: ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎹᎾ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒ;
040649.english: Your fathers did eat manna in the wilderness, and are dead.
040649.phonetic: Di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i ma-na a-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-gi i-na-ge-i, a-le du-ni-yo-hu-sv;

040650.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᏚ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏳᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎬᏲᎱᎯ.
040650.english: This is the bread which cometh down from heaven, that a man may eat thereof, and not die.
040650.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-di ga-du ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, na-s-gi gi-lo yu-gv v-tla yv-gv-yo-hu-hi.

040651.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏚ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏁᏍᏗ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏚ ᏨᏓᏥᏁᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏫᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏙᏛᎩᏲᏏ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏛᏂᏗᏍᏙᏗ.
040651.english: I am the living bread which came down from heaven: if any man eat of this bread, he shall live for ever: and the bread that I will give is my flesh, which I will give for the life of the world.
040651.phonetic: A-yv na-s-gi na ga-du gv-ni-dv ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi.  I-yu-no gi-lo a-gi-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi hi-a ga-du, a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ne-s-di.  A-le na-s-gi na ga-du tsv-da-tsi-ne-li na-s-gi a-yv a-gi-wi-ya, na-s-gi tsi-do-dv-gi-yo-si e-lo-hi u-dv-ni-di-s-do-di.

040652.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᏚᎾᏘᏲᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏱᎩᎲᏏ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏫᏯ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗ?
040652.english: The Jews therefore strove among themselves, saying, How can this man give us his flesh to eat?
040652.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si u-nv-sv-quo du-na-ti-yo-lv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi, Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da hi-a a-s-ga-ya yi-gi-hv-si u-wa-sv u-wi-ya i-ga-li-s-da-yv-do-di?

040653.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪ ᏎᎭ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏥᎬᎾ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏫᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᎲ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏱᏥᏯᎠ.
040653.english: Then Jesus said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Except ye eat the flesh of the Son of man, and drink his blood, ye have no life in you.
040653.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we se-ha; I-yu-no ni-tsi-gv-na yv-wi U-we-tsi u-wi-ya, a-le u-gi-gv i-tsa-di-ta-hv yi-gi, v-tla gv-ni-dv yi-tsi-ya-a.

040654.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏫᏯ ᎠᎩᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎩ, ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏙᏓᏥᏯᎴᏔᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040654.english: Whoso eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, hath eternal life; and I will raise him up at the last day.
040654.phonetic: A-gi-wi-ya a-gi-s-gi, a-le a-gi-gi-gv a-di-ta-s-gi, gv-ni-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na u-tse-li-ga, a-le na-s-gi a-yv do-da-tsi-ya-le-ta-ni u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-ga ge-se-s-di.

040655.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏫᏯᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ.
040655.english: For my flesh is meat indeed, and my blood is drink indeed.
040655.phonetic: A-gi-wi-ya-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-sv a-li-s-da-yv-di, a-le a-gi-gi-gv u-do-hi-yu-sv a-di-ta-s-di.

040656.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏫᏯ ᎠᎩᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏯᎠ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏯᎠ.
040656.english: He that eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, dwelleth in me, and I in him.
040656.phonetic: A-gi-wi-ya a-gi-s-gi, a-le a-gi-gi-gv a-di-ta-s-gi, na-s-gi a-gi-ya-a, a-yv a-le na-s-gi tsi-ya-a.

040657.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᏥᎬᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏁᏍᏗ.
040657.english: As the living Father hath sent me, and I live by the Father: so he that eateth me, even he shall live by me.
040657.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-i gv-ni-dv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-gi-nv-si-dv tsi-gi, a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yv tsi-gv-nv, na-s-gi-ya-i a-yv a-qua-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gi na-s-gi a-yv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di gv-ne-s-di.

040658.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ Ꮎ ᎦᏚ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ; ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎹᎾ ᏣᏂᎩᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏁᏍᏗ.
040658.english: This is that bread which came down from heaven: not as your fathers did eat manna, and are dead: he that eateth of this bread shall live for ever.
040658.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a na ga-du ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi; v-tla na-s-gi-ya di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i ma-na tsa-ni-gi-s-ge-i, a-le na-s-gi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi tsi-gi; hi-a ga-du a-gi-s-gi a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ne-s-di.

040659.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎨᏆᏂ.
040659.english: These things said he in the synagogue, as he taught in Capernaum.
040659.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, da-de-yo-hv-s-gv Ge-qua-ni.

040660.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ; ᎦᎪ ᏰᎵ ᏯᏛᎬᎦ?
040660.english: Many therefore of his disciples, when they had heard this, said, This is an hard saying; who can hear it?
040660.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-ni-tsa-dv-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-dv-ga-nv, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Na-s-gi hi-a a-s-da-yi-yu ka-no-he-dv; ga-go ye-li ya-dv-gv-ga?

040661.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏧᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᎪᏁᎶᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏕᏦᏕᏍᏗᎭ?
040661.english: When Jesus knew in himself that his disciples murmured at it, he said unto them, Doth this offend you?
040661.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa tsu-da-nv-dv u-do-le-ho-sv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-ni-go-ne-lo-s-gv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go na-s-gi hi-a de-tso-de-s-di-ha?

040662.cherokee: ᎢᏳᎾᏃ ᏰᏥᎪᎥ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏳᎵᏌᎳᏓᏅ ᎾᎿᎭᏧᏓᎴᏅ ᏱᏬᎶᏒ?
040662.english: What and if ye shall see the Son of man ascend up where he was before?
040662.phonetic: I-yu-na-no ye-tsi-go-v yv-wi U-we-tsi yu-li-sa-la-da-nv na-hna tsu-da-le-nv yi-wo-lo-sv?

040663.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᏛᏂᏗᏍᎩ; ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏩᏓᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏱᎩ.  ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏨᏬᏁᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ.
040663.english: It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life.
040663.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni a-da-dv-ni-di-s-gi; u-que-da-li v-tla gv-wa-da-s-de-lv-di yi-gi.  Ka-no-he-dv a-yv tsi-tsv-wo-ne-di-ha na-s-gi a-da-nv-do, a-le na-s-gi gv-ni-dv.

040664.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏓᏑᏯ ᏂᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ.  ᏥᏌᏰᏃ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏂᏓᎦᏔᎰ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎦᏔᎰᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ.
040664.english: But there are some of you that believe not. For Jesus knew from the beginning who they were that believed not, and who should betray him.
040664.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsa-da-su-ya ni-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na.  Tsi-sa-ye-no di-da-le-ni-s-gv ni-da-ga-ta-ho na-s-gi na na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na, a-le na-ga-ta-ho-i na-s-gi na u-tlu-di-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di.

040665.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏴᎬᎩᎷᏥ, ᎬᏂ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎤᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
040665.english: And he said, Therefore said I unto you, that no man can come unto me, except it were given unto him of my Father.
040665.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-s-quo nu-we-sv-gi; Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a tsi-ni-tsv-we-se-lv-gi; v-tla gi-lo yv-gv-gi-lu-tsi, gv-ni E-do-da u-ne-lv-hi yi-gi.

040666.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎾᏨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏳᏁᏙᎴᎢ.
040666.english: From that time many of his disciples went back, and walked no more with him.
040666.phonetic: A-le na-hi-yu i-yu-da-le-nv-dv u-ni-tsa-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-na-tsv-sv-gi, a-le v-tla hna-quo i-lv-hi-yu yu-ne-do-le-i.

040667.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ; ᏥᎪ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏛᏣᏓᏅᏏ?
040667.english: Then said Jesus unto the twelve, Will ye also go away?
040667.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv; Tsi-go na-s-quo ni-hi dv-tsa-da-nv-si?

040668.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎦᎪ ᏧᏬᎸ ᏮᏓᏲᏥᎶᏏ?  ᏂᎯ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏛᏂᏗᏍᏙᏗ.
040668.english: Then Simon Peter answered him, Lord, to whom shall we go? thou hast the words of eternal life.
040668.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Sa-wa-ni Qui-da hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, ga-go tsu-wo-lv wv-da-yo-tsi-lo-si?  Ni-hi tsa-s-qua-ni-go-di ka-no-he-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na a-dv-ni-di-s-do-di.

040669.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ.
040669.english: And we believe and are sure that thou art that Christ, the Son of the living God.
040669.phonetic: A-le o-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga, a-le o-tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-hi na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-i, gv-ni-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi.

040670.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏥᏛ ᏱᏨᏯᏑᏰᏎᎢ?  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎢᎩ.
040670.english: Jesus answered them, Have not I chosen you twelve, and one of you is a devil?
040670.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi.  Tla-s-go ni-hi ta-la-du i-tsi-dv yi-tsv-ya-su-ye-se-i?  A-se-no a-si-yv-wi u-da-su-ya a-s-gi-na i-gi.

040671.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒ ᏧᏓᏏ ᎢᏍᎦᎳᏗ ᏌᏩᏂ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏥᏛᎬᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᎨᎳ ᎨᏒᎩ.
040671.english: He spake of Judas Iscariot the son of Simon: for he it was that should betray him, being one of the twelve.
040671.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-we-sv Tsu-da-si I-s-ga-la-di Sa-wa-ni u-we-tsi a-tsi-dv-gv-gi; na-s-gi-ye-no u-tlu-di-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-gi, ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv na-hna ge-la ge-sv-gi.

040701.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᏥᏌ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᏪᏙᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏳᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᎾᏁᎶᏗᏍᎬ ᎬᏩᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
040701.english: After these things Jesus walked in Galilee: for he would not walk in Jewry, because the Jews sought to kill him.
040701.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv Tsi-sa Ge-li-li u-we-do-lv-gi; V-tla-ye-no yu-du-li-s-ge Tsu-di-yi u-we-da-s-di-yi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi A-ni-tsu-si a-na-ne-lo-di-s-gv gv-wa-hi-s-di-yi.

040702.english: Now the Jews' feast of tabernacles was at hand.

040703.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎭᏓᏅᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏫᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎨᏣᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎪᎲᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
040703.english: His brethren therefore said unto him, Depart hence, and go into Judaea, that thy disciples also may see the works that thou doest.
040703.phonetic: A-na-li-nv-tli-no hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ha-da-nv-na, a-le Tsu-di-yi wi-lo-hi, na-s-gi-no ge-tsa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi na-s-quo a-ni-go-hv-ha nu-s-dv de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

040704.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏚᎵᏍᎪᎢ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏱᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎿᎭᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏯᏛᏂᏏ.
040704.english: For there is no man that doeth any thing in secret, and he himself seeketh to be known openly. If thou do these things, shew thyself to the world.
040704.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no gi-lo a-tsi-ga-ta-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-du-li-s-go-i u-de-li-dv yi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i.  I-yu-no na-s-gi hi-a hna-dv-ne-he-s-di, e-lo-hi gv-ni-ge-sv ni-ya-dv-ni-si.

040705.english: For neither did his brethren believe in him.

040706.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᏯᎩᏍᏆᎸᎡᎭ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏉ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᎸᎡᎰᎢ.
040706.english: Then Jesus said unto them, My time is not yet come: but your time is always ready.
040706.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla a-si ya-gi-s-qua-lv-e-ha; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ni-go-hi-lv-quo i-tsi-s-qua-lv-e-ho-i.

040707.cherokee: ᎡᎶᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᏍᎦᎦ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏥᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040707.english: The world cannot hate you; but me it hateth, because I testify of it, that the works thereof are evil.
040707.phonetic: E-lo-hi v-tla i-tsi-s-ga-gi yi-nv-ga-li-s-da; a-yv-s-gi-ni a-gi-s-ga-ga, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsi-tsi-no-he-ha na-s-gi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-yo-i-yu ge-sv-i.

040708.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᏙᏗᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎢᏤᎾ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᎠᏴ ᏙᏗᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᏴᏓᎨᏏ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏯᎩᏍᏆᎸᎡᎸ.
040708.english: Go ye up unto this feast: I go not up yet unto this feast; for my time is not yet full come.
040708.phonetic: Ni-hi do-di-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv i-tse-na; v-tla a-si a-yv do-di-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv yv-da-ge-si; v-tla-ye-no a-si ya-gi-s-qua-lv-e-lv.

040709.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎤᏪᏙᎸᎩ ᎨᎵᎵ.
040709.english: When he had said these words unto them, he abode still in Galilee.
040709.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv, a-si-quo u-we-do-lv-gi Ge-li-li.

040710.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏁᏅᏛ ᏂᎨᏐᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏙᏗᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᏪᏅᏒᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏕᎵᏛᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
040710.english: But when his brethren were gone up, then went he also up unto the feast, not openly, but as it were in secret.
040710.phonetic: A-se-no a-na-li-nv-tli u-ne-nv-dv ni-ge-so-i, hna-quo na-s-quo do-di-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv u-we-nv-sv-gi, v-tla gv-ni-ge-sv-i, u-de-li-dv-quo-s-gi-ni i-yu-s-di.

040711.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎬᏩᏲᎸᎩ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎭᏢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏙᎭ?
040711.english: Then the Jews sought him at the feast, and said, Where is he?
040711.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si gv-wa-yo-lv-gi da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i, a-le hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ha-tlv na-s-gi e-do-ha?

040712.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏛᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏓᎾᎵᏃᎮᎵᏙᎲᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ; ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ, ᎥᏝ, ᏕᎦᎶᏄᎮᏉ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
040712.english: And there was much murmuring among the people concerning him: for some said, He is a good man: others said, Nay; but he deceiveth the people.
040712.phonetic: U-tsa-dv-no u-de-li-dv da-na-li-no-he-li-do-hv-gi yv-wi na-s-gi gv-wa-no-he-s-gv-i; i-ga-dv-ye-no hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi; O-si-yu a-s-ga-ya; i-ga-dv-no, v-tla, de-ga-lo-nu-he-quo yv-wi, a-na-di-s-gv-gi.

040713.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏳᏃᎮᏍᎨᎢ, ᎤᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏓᏂᎾᏰᏍᎬ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ.
040713.english: Howbeit no man spake openly of him for fear of the Jews.
040713.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla gi-lo gv-ni-ge-sv yu-no-he-s-ge-i, u-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi da-ni-na-ye-s-gv A-ni-tsu-si.

040714.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎵᏒ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏴᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏕᏲᏅᎩ.
040714.english: Now about the midst of the feast Jesus went up into the temple, and taught.
040714.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ye-li i-yv-dv a-li-ye-i-li-sv da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i Tsi-sa u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-yv-lv-gi, a-le du-de-yo-nv-gi.

040715.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎪᏪᎵ ᏗᏏᎾᏏᏳ ᏥᎩ, ᏧᏕᎶᏆᎥᎯᏃ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ?
040715.english: And the Jews marvelled, saying, How knoweth this man letters, having never learned?
040715.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si-no u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi, a-le nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-do u-li-s-do-ta-nv hi-a a-s-ga-ya go-we-li di-si-na-si-yu tsi-gi, tsu-de-lo-qua-v-hi-no ni-ge-sv-na?

040716.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᏚᏁᏤᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏥᏕᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏤᎵᎦᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ.
040716.english: Jesus answered them, and said, My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me.
040716.phonetic: Tsi-sa du-ne-tse-lv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tsi-de-ga-de-yo-hv-s-ga, v-tla a-qua-tse-li-ga yi-gi, u-tse-li-ga-s-gi-ni nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv.

040717.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏕᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040717.english: If any man will do his will, he shall know of the doctrine, whether it be of God, or whether I speak of myself.
040717.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo u-du-li-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, a-se u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di na-s-gi hi-a tsi-de-ga-de-yo-hv-s-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, a-le tsi-wo-ni-s-gv a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-da-nv-te-lv-hi i-ge-se-s-di.

040718.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏥᎦᏬᏂᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏲᎰᎢ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏲᎰᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏳᏓᏑᏲᎢ.
040718.english: He that speaketh of himself seeketh his own glory: but he that seeketh his glory that sent him, the same is true, and no unrighteousness is in him.
040718.phonetic: Gi-lo u-wa-sv u-da-nv-te-dv tsi-ga-wo-ni-s-go-i, u-wa-sv-quo a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-yo-ho-i; gi-lo-s-gi-ni nv-da-yu-nv-si-dv a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-yo-ho-i, na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv ge-so-i, a-le v-tla a-tlo-na-s-di ge-sv yu-da-su-yo-i.

040719.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎼᏏ ᏱᏥᏁᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ?  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏓᏑᏯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏱᎾᏛᏁᎭ.  ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏣᏚᎵ ᏍᎩᎢᏍᏗᏱ?
040719.english: Did not Moses give you the law, and yet none of you keepeth the law? Why go ye about to kill me?
040719.phonetic: Tla-s-go Mo-si yi-tsi-ne-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di?  A-se-no v-tla gi-lo yu-da-su-ya di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv yi-na-dv-ne-ha.  Ga-do-no i-tsa-du-li s-gi-i-s-di-yi?

040720.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏣᏯᎠ; ᎦᎪ ᎤᏚᎵ ᏣᎯᏍᏗᏱ?
040720.english: The people answered and said, Thou hast a devil: who goeth about to kill thee?
040720.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ti u-ni-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; A-s-gi-na tsa-ya-a; ga-go u-du-li tsa-hi-s-di-yi?

040721.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ, ᏂᏥᎥᏃ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎦ.
040721.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, I have done one work, and ye all marvel.
040721.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Su-da-le-gi da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv, ni-tsi-v-no i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-s-ga.

040722.cherokee: ᎼᏏ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏁᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎼᏏ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᏃ ᎢᎡᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎰ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ.
040722.english: Moses therefore gave unto you circumcision; (not because it is of Moses, but of the fathers;) and ye on the sabbath day circumcise a man.
040722.phonetic: Mo-si a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv i-tsi-ne-lv-gi; v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv Mo-si u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi yi-gi, a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-s-gi-ni u-ni-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi; ni-hi-no u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-no i-e-tsi-u-s-de-se-ho a-s-ga-ya.

040723.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ ᏯᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎭ, ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᎪ ᎢᏍᎩᏍᎦᎦ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏥᏥᏅᏩᏅ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ?
040723.english: If a man on the sabbath day receive circumcision, that the law of Moses should not be broken; are ye angry at me, because I have made a man every whit whole on the sabbath day?
040723.phonetic: I-yu-no a-s-ga-ya u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga ya-tsi-u-s-de-se-ha, yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di Mo-si u-tse-li u-yo-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, tsi-go i-s-gi-s-ga-ga nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-s-ga-ya ni-gv a-ye-lv tsi-tsi-nv-wa-nv u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga?

040724.english: Judge not according to the appearance, but judge righteous judgment.

040725.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎯᎠ ᏱᎩ ᏧᎾᏚᎵ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ?
040725.english: Then said some of them of Jerusalem, Is not this he, whom they seek to kill?
040725.phonetic: Hna-quo-no i-ga-dv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-ne-hi hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi, Tla-s-go na-s-gi na hi-a yi-gi tsu-na-du-li u-ni-hi-s-di-yi?

040726.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎦᏬᏂᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᏃᏎᎭ.  ᏥᏌ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ?
040726.english: But, lo, he speaketh boldly, and they say nothing unto him. Do the rulers know indeed that this is the very Christ?
040726.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-no na-s-ga-i-hv-na ga-wo-ni-ha, a-le v-tla go-hu-s-di ya-no-se-ha.  Tsi-sa u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi u-do-hi-yu-hi a-ni-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-i?

040727.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᎬᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎢ.
040727.english: Howbeit we know this man whence he is: but when Christ cometh, no man knoweth whence he is.
040727.phonetic: A-se-no i-di-ga-ta-ha hi-a a-s-ga-ya tsu-da-le-nv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni ga-lu-tsv-ha v-tla gi-lo yi-gv-ga-ta-he-s-di tsu-da-le-nv-i.

040728.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏪᎷᏅᎩ ᎤᏛᏅᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏍᎩᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏗᏆᏓᎴᏅᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏯᎩᎷᏨ, ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ.
040728.english: Then cried Jesus in the temple as he taught, saying, Ye both know me, and ye know whence I am: and I am not come of myself, but he that sent me is true, whom ye know not.
040728.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa u-we-lu-nv-gi u-dv-nv-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; S-gi-ga-ta-ha, a-le na-s-quo i-tsi-ga-ta-ha di-qua-da-le-nv-i; a-le v-tla a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-da-nv-te-dv ya-gi-lu-tsv, nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv-s-gi-ni du-yu-go-dv-i, na-s-gi ne-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-gi.

040729.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᎿᎭᏰᏃ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏅᏒ.
040729.english: But I know him: for I am from him, and he hath sent me.
040729.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-hna-ye-no nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi, a-le na-s-gi di-gi-nv-sv.

040730.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᎸᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᏗᏱ:  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏏᏔᏕᎢ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᏏ ᏄᏍᏆᎸᎡᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040730.english: Then they sought to take him: but no man laid hands on him, because his hour was not yet come.
040730.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-na-da-nv-te-lv-gi gv-wa-ni-yv-di-yi:  a-se-no v-tla gi-lo yu-si-ta-de-i, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi a-si nu-s-qua-lv-e-lv-na ge-sv-i.

040731.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᏥᎪ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏙᏓᏳᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎵ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ?
040731.english: And many of the people believed on him, and said, When Christ cometh, will he do more miracles than these which this man hath done?
040731.phonetic: A-le u-ni-tsa-dv-gi gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi, a-le hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-lu-tsv-ha, tsi-go u-tli i-ga-i u-s-qua-ni-go-di do-da-yu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-li, e-s-ga-quo hi-a na-s-gi tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv?

040732.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏓᎾᎵᏃᎮᎵᏙᎲᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏚᏂᏅᏒᎩ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏭᏂᏂᏴᏗᏱ.
040732.english: The Pharisees heard that the people murmured such things concerning him; and the Pharisees and the chief priests sent officers to take him.
040732.phonetic: A-ni-qua-li-si u-na-dv-ga-nv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti na-s-gi gv-wa-no-he-s-gv u-de-li-dv da-na-li-no-he-li-do-hv-i.  A-le A-ni-qua-li-si nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi du-ni-nv-sv-gi di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi na-s-gi wu-ni-ni-yv-di-yi.

040733.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏏ ᏞᎦ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎭ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᏬᎸ ᏮᏛᏥᎶᏏ.
040733.english: Then said Jesus unto them, Yet a little while am I with you, and then I go unto him that sent me.
040733.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-si tle-ga i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ha, hna-quo-no nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv tsu-wo-lv wv-dv-tsi-lo-si.

040734.cherokee: ᏍᎩᏲᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏓᏍᎩᏯᏠᏥ; ᎠᎴ ᏫᎨᎥ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏫᏴᎨᏥᎷᎩ.
040734.english: Ye shall seek me, and shall not find me: and where I am, thither ye cannot come.
040734.phonetic: S-gi-yo-he-s-di, a-se-no da-s-gi-ya-tlo-tsi; a-le wi-ge-v v-tla ye-li wi-yv-ge-tsi-lu-gi.

040735.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᏮᏓᎦᎶᏏ, ᎦᏰᏗᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ?  ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛᏍᎪ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᎾᏗᎦᎴᏲᏨᎯ ᏙᏛᏩᏛᎮᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏙᏓᎨᏲᏂ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ?
040735.english: Then said the Jews among themselves, Whither will he go, that we shall not find him? will he go unto the dispersed among the Gentiles, and teach the Gentiles?
040735.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-lv-gi, Ha-tlv wv-da-ga-lo-si, ga-ye-di-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di?  tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv-s-go yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv u-na-di-ga-le-yo-tsv-hi do-dv-wa-dv-he-si, a-le wi-do-da-ge-yo-ni tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi?

040736.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᎦᏛᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏒ; ᏍᎩᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏎᏃ ᏓᏍᎩᏯᏠᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᎨᎥᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏫᏴᎨᏥᎷᎩ?
040736.english: What manner of saying is this that he said, Ye shall seek me, and shall not find me: and where I am, thither ye cannot come?
040736.phonetic: Ga-do ga-dv-ga hi-a tsi-nu-we-sv; S-gi-yo-he-s-di a-se-no da-s-gi-ya-tlo-tsi, a-le wi-ge-v-i v-tla wi-yv-ge-tsi-lu-gi?

040737.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎢᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᏚᎴᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎷᏅᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏔᏕᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᏩᎩᎷᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᏗᏔ.
040737.english: In the last day, that great day of the feast, Jesus stood and cried, saying, If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink.
040737.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no i-ga, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di i-ga ge-sv da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-i, Tsi-sa du-le-nv-gi a-le u-we-lu-nv-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; I-yu-no gi-lo u-ta-de-gi-s-ge-s-di, a-yv wa-gi-lu-tsi, a-le wa-di-ta.

040738.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏍᏉᎵᏱ ᏕᎦᎾᏄᎪᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᏉᏂ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎹ ᏕᎨᏰᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏂᎦᏪ ᎪᏪᎵ.
040738.english: He that believeth on me, as the scripture hath said, out of his belly shall flow rivers of living water.
040738.phonetic: Gi-lo a-quo-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di, u-s-quo-li-yi de-ga-na-nu-go-ge-s-di e-quo-ni gv-ni-dv a-ma de-ge-ye-s-di; na-s-gi-ya tsi-ni-ga-we Go-we-li.

040739.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎤᏪᏛᏨᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᎦᎾᏄᎪᎨᎢ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏏ ᎾᏥᎸᏉᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040739.english: (But this spake he of the Spirit, which they that believe on him should receive: for the Holy Ghost was not yet given; because that Jesus was not yet glorified.)
040739.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv, u-we-dv-tsv-gi A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ge-tsi-ne-di ge-sv-i; tla-ye-no a-si Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do yi-ga-na-nu-go-ge-i, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi Tsi-sa a-si na-tsi-lv-quo-di-s-gv-na ge-sv-i.

040740.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏣᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
040740.english: Many of the people therefore, when they heard this saying, said, Of a truth this is the Prophet.
040740.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-ni-tsa-dv yv-wi na-s-gi hi-a u-na-dv-ga-nv, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a na-s-gi na A-do-le-ho-s-gi.

040741.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᎵᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ?
040741.english: Others said, This is the Christ. But some said, Shall Christ come out of Galilee?
040741.phonetic: I-ga-dv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Hi-a na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv.  A-se-no i-ga-dv hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; tsi-go Ga-lo-ne-dv Ge-li-li nv-da-yu-na-nu-go-i-s-di?

040742.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏪᎭ?  ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚᏱ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏕᏅᎢ?
040742.english: Hath not the scripture said, That Christ cometh of the seed of David, and out of the town of Bethlehem, where David was?
040742.phonetic: Tla-s-go Go-we-li hi-a yi-ni-ga-we-ha?  Ga-lo-ne-dv De-wi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv u-na-nu-go-i-s-di, a-le Ga-du-yi ga-du-hv-i De-wi u-de-nv-i?

040743.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎾᏓᏛᎩ ᏴᏫ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
040743.english: So there was a division among the people because of him.
040743.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ta-li nu-na-da-dv-gi yv-wi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-gv-i.

040744.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏑᏴᎩ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏏᏔᏕᎢ.
040744.english: And some of them would have taken him; but no man laid hands on him.
040744.phonetic: A-le i-ga-dv u-na-da-su-yv-gi u-na-du-li-s-gv-gi gv-wa-ni-yv-di-yi; a-se-no v-tla gi-lo yu-si-ta-de-i.

040745.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏂᎷᏤᎸᎩ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏴᎡᏣᏘᏃᎦ?
040745.english: Then came the officers to the chief priests and Pharisees; and they said unto them, Why have ye not brought him?
040745.phonetic: Hna-quo-no di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi gv-wa-ni-lu-tse-lv-gi nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le A-ni-qua-li-si.  Hi-a-no ni-du-ni-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do-no tla yv-e-tsa-ti-no-ga?

040746.cherokee: ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎩᎶ ᏱᎬᏩᏬᏂᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
040746.english: The officers answered, Never man spake like this man.
040746.phonetic: Di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; V-tla i-lv-hi-yu gi-lo yi-gv-wa-wo-ni-so na-s-gi-ya hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

040747.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏥᎶᏄᎡᎸ?
040747.english: Then answered them the Pharisees, Are ye also deceived?
040747.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-qua-li-si u-ni-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-ni-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go ni-hi na-s-quo e-tsi-lo-nu-e-lv?

040748.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅ?
040748.english: Have any of the rulers or of the Pharisees believed on him?
040748.phonetic: Tsi-go gi-lo nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-le A-ni-qua-li-si gv-wo-hi-yu-nv?

040749.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᎩᏅᏛᎯ.
040749.english: But this people who knoweth not the law are cursed.
040749.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni yv-wi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-gi ge-tsi-s-gi-nv-dv-hi.

040750.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᎹᏏ,^ᏥᏌ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎸᎩ,^ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ;
040750.english: Nicodemus saith unto them, (he that came to Jesus by night, being one of them,)
040750.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-ma-si,^Tsi-sa sv-no-yi u-lu-tse-lv-hi, na-s-gi ge-lv-gi,^na-s-gi hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi;

040751.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᏗᎩᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏚᏭᎪᏓᏁᎰ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏏ ᎾᎦᏛᎦᏁᎸᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ?
040751.english: Doth our law judge any man, before it hear him, and know what he doeth?
040751.phonetic: Tsi-go di-gi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di du-wu-go-da-ne-ho gi-lo a-si na-ga-dv-ga-ne-lv-na tsi-ge-so-i, a-le du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-so-i?

040752.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎮᎯ?  ᏣᏲᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎭᎦᏌᏯᏍᏓ, ᏝᏰᏃ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
040752.english: They answered and said unto him, Art thou also of Galilee? Search, and look: for out of Galilee ariseth no prophet.
040752.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go na-s-quo ni-hi Ge-li-li he-hi?  Tsa-yo-ga a-le ha-ga-sa-ya-s-da, tla-ye-no Ge-li-li u-na-nu-go-i-s-di yi-gi a-do-le-ho-s-gi.

040753.english: And every man went unto his own house.

040801.english: Jesus went unto the mount of Olives.

040802.cherokee: ᏑᎾᎴᏉᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎥᎬᏩᎷᏤᎸᎩ; ᎤᏪᏅᏃ ᏑᏪᏲᏅᎩ.
040802.english: And early in the morning he came again into the temple, and all the people came unto him; and he sat down, and taught them.
040802.phonetic: Su-na-le-quo-no ta-li-ne u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-lu-tsv-gi; a-le ni-ga-dv yv-wi v-gv-wa-lu-tse-lv-gi; u-we-nv-no su-we-yo-nv-gi.

040803.cherokee: ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎬᏩᏘᏃᎮᎸᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎲ ᎠᏥᏂᏴᏛ; ᎠᏰᎵᏃ ᎤᏂᎧᏅ,
040803.english: And the scribes and Pharisees brought unto him a woman taken in adultery; and when they had set her in the midst,
040803.phonetic: Di-no-we-li-s-gi-no a-le A-ni-qua-li-si gv-wa-ti-no-he-lv-gi a-ge-yv a-da-yo-ne-hv a-tsi-ni-yv-dv; a-ye-li-no u-ni-ka-nv,

040804.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏓᏲᏁᎲ ᏕᎦᏅᎬᎢ ᎠᏥᏂᏴᎲᎩ.
040804.english: They say unto him, Master, this woman was taken in adultery, in the very act.
040804.phonetic: Hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, hi-a a-ge-yv a-da-yo-ne-hv de-ga-nv-gv-i a-tsi-ni-yv-hv-gi.

040805.cherokee: Ꭷ, ᎼᏏ ᎣᎩᏁᏤᎸᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏅᏯ ᏗᎨᎬᏂᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎦᏙ ᎭᏗᎭ?
040805.english: Now Moses in the law commanded us, that such should be stoned: but what sayest thou?
040805.phonetic: Ka, Mo-si o-gi-ne-tse-lv-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi na-s-gi i-yu-na-s-di nv-ya di-ge-gv-ni-s-do-di-yi; a-se-no ni-hi ga-do ha-di-ha?

040806.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ ᎠᏂᏌᏛᎥᏍᎬᎩ, ᎤᏄᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱᏉ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏒᎩ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏗᏌᏓᏛᎩ, ᎦᏰᏌᏛᏃ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎩ ᎦᏙᎯ.
040806.english: This they said, tempting him, that they might have to accuse him. But Jesus stooped down, and with his finger wrote on the ground, as though he heard them not.
040806.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi a-ni-sa-dv-v-s-gv-gi, u-nu-hi-s-do-di-yi-quo u-ni-ye-lv-sv-gi.  A-se-no Tsi-sa u-di-sa-da-dv-gi, ga-ye-sa-dv-no u-wa-ta-nv-gi u-wo-we-la-nv-gi ga-do-hi.

040807.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏱᎵᏒ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᏓᏥᏃᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᏑᏰᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏫᏓᏓᎴᏅᏓ ᏅᏯ ᏫᎬᏂᏍᏓ.
040807.english: So when they continued asking him, he lifted up himself, and said unto them, He that is without sin among you, let him first cast a stone at her.
040807.phonetic: A-si-quo-no a-ni-yi-li-sv gv-wa-dv-dv-hv-s-gv u-da-tsi-no-hi-s-ta-nv-gi hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Gi-lo u-da-su-ye-s-di u-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi i-gv-yi wi-da-da-le-nv-da nv-ya wi-gv-ni-s-da.

040808.english: And again he stooped down, and wrote on the ground.

040809.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏩᏄᎯᏍᏔᏅ, ᎤᏂᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏛᏂᏛ ᎤᏓᏂᎵᎨ ᏚᏓᎴᏅᏔᏅᎩ, ᎣᏂᏱ ᏫᎬᏩᏛᏅᎩ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ.
040809.english: And they which heard it, being convicted by their own conscience, went out one by one, beginning at the eldest, even unto the last: and Jesus was left alone, and the woman standing in the midst.
040809.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-na-dv-ga-nv, a-le tsu-na-da-nv-do gv-wa-nu-hi-s-ta-nv, u-ni-nu-go-tsv-gi sa-quo u-dv-ni-dv u-da-ni-li-ge du-da-le-nv-ta-nv-gi, o-ni-yi wi-gv-wa-dv-nv-gi; Tsi-sa-no u-wa-sv nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, a-ge-yv-no a-ye-li ga-do-gv-gi.

040810.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏓᏥᏃᎯᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎪᎲ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎨᏴ, ᎭᏢ Ꮎ ᎨᏧᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎩᎶ ᏣᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ ᏱᏕᎫᎪᏓ?
040810.english: When Jesus had lifted up himself, and saw none but the woman, he said unto her, Woman, where are those thine accusers? hath no man condemned thee?
040810.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-da-tsi-no-hi-s-ta-nv, a-le a-ge-yv-quo u-wa-sv u-go-hv, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Hi-ge-yv, ha-tlv na ge-tsu-hi-s-di-s-gi?  Tla-s-go gi-lo tsa-s-ga-nv-tsv-i yi-de-gu-go-da?

040811.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏣᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏱᏗᎫᎪᏗᎭ.  ᏥᎮᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏱᏣᏍᎦᏅᏤᏍᏗ.
040811.english: She said, No man, Lord. And Jesus said unto her, Neither do I condemn thee: go, and sin no more.
040811.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; V-tla gi-lo, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi.  Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla na-s-quo a-yv tsa-s-ga-nv-tsv yi-di-gu-go-di-ha.  Tsi-he-na, a-le tle-s-di i-lv-hi-yu hna-quo yi-tsa-s-ga-nv-tse-s-di.

040812.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᏥᏐ ᏚᏬᏁᏔᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏥᏯᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ; ᎩᎶ ᎠᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏱᎦᏰᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᏛᏂᏗᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040812.english: Then spake Jesus again unto them, saying, I am the light of the world: he that followeth me shall not walk in darkness, but shall have the light of life.
040812.phonetic: A-le-wo Tsi-so du-wo-ne-ta-nv-gi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-yv e-lo-hi i-ga tsi-ya-ti-s-da-ne-hi; gi-lo a-gi-s-da-wa-de-ge-s-di v-tla u-li-si-gv yi-ga-ye-do-he-s-di; a-dv-ni-di-s-do-di-s-gi-ni i-ga u-tse-li-ga ge-se-s-di.

040813.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏨᏒᏉ ᎭᏓᏃᎮᎭ, ᎯᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏙᎯᏳᎭ.
040813.english: The Pharisees therefore said unto him, Thou bearest record of thyself; thy record is not true.
040813.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-qua-li-si hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Tsv-sv-quo ha-da-no-he-ha, hi-no-he-s-gv v-tla yu-do-hi-yu-ha.

040814.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᎦᏓᏃᎮᎭ, ᎠᏎ ᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎭ; ᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᏗᏆᏓᎴᏅᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏫᏥᎦᏛᎢ.  ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏗᏆᏓᎴᏅᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏫᏥᎦᏛᎢ.
040814.english: Jesus answered and said unto them, Though I bear record of myself, yet my record is true: for I know whence I came, and whither I go; but ye cannot tell whence I come, and whither I go.
040814.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-quv-sv-quo na-s-quo yi-ga-da-no-he-ha, a-se tsi-no-he-s-gv u-do-hi-yu-ha; tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no di-qua-da-le-nv-i a-le wi-tsi-ga-dv-i.  Ni-hi-s-gi-ni v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha di-qua-da-le-nv-i a-le wi-tsi-ga-dv-i.

040815.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᏕᏧᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᏧᏬᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏗᏥᏳᎪᏓᏁᎰᎢ.
040815.english: Ye judge after the flesh; I judge no man.
040815.phonetic: Ni-hi de-tsu-go-di-s-go u-que-da-li-quo tsu-wo-go-do-di ge-sv-i; a-yv v-tla gi-lo yi-di-tsi-yu-go-da-ne-ho-i.

040816.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᏗᎫᎪᏗᎭ, ᏓᏇᎪᏔᏅ ᏑᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᎩ.  ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎣᎩᎾᎵᎪᎭ.
040816.english: And yet if I judge, my judgment is true: for I am not alone, but I and the Father that sent me.
040816.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-quo yi-di-gu-go-di-ha, da-que-go-ta-nv su-yu-go-dv yi-gi.  V-tla-ye-no a-quv-sv-quo yi-gi, A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv o-gi-na-li-go-ha.

040817.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᏪᎳ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040817.english: It is also written in your law, that the testimony of two men is true.
040817.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo go-we-la di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi na-s-gi a-ni-ta-li u-ni-no-he-lv-hi ge-sv u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya ge-sv-i.

040818.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎦᏓᏃᎮᏍᎩ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏃ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏃᎮᎭ.
040818.english: I am one that bear witness of myself, and the Father that sent me beareth witness of me.
040818.phonetic: A-yv a-quv-sv ga-da-no-he-s-gi, A-ga-yv-li-ge-no nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-quo a-yv a-gi-no-he-ha.

040819.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᏣᏙᏓ?  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᏱᏍᎩᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎡᏙᏓ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏱᏍᎩᎦᏔᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏰᏥᎦᏔᎮ ᎡᏙᏓ.
040819.english: Then said they unto him, Where is thy Father? Jesus answered, Ye neither know me, nor my Father: if ye had known me, ye should have known my Father also.
040819.phonetic: Hna-quo hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi, Ha-tlv Tsa-do-da?  Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla a-yv yi-s-gi-ga-ta-ha, a-le v-tla ye-tsi-ga-ta-ha E-do-da.  I-yu-no a-yv yi-s-gi-ga-ta-he-i, na-s-quo ye-tsi-ga-ta-he E-do-da.

040820.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏱ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᎤ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏂᏴᎮᎢ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏳᏍᏆᎸᎡᎮᎢ.
040820.english: These words spake Jesus in the treasury, as he taught in the temple: and no man laid hands on him; for his hour was not yet come.
040820.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi Tsi-sa a-de-lv di-s-qua-ni-go-di-yi, na-hi-yu da-de-yo-hv-s-gv u-dv-u--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; a-le v-tla gi-lo yu-ni-yv-he-i, v-tla-ye-no a-si yu-s-qua-lv-e-he-i.

040821.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏓᎦᏓᏅᏏ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏍᎩᏲᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏥᏲᎱᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᏥᎦᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏫᏴᎨᏥᎷᎩ.
040821.english: Then said Jesus again unto them, I go my way, and ye shall seek me, and shall die in your sins: whither I go, ye cannot come.
040821.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa ta-li-ne hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Da-ga-da-nv-si, ni-hi-no s-gi-yo-he-s-di, a-le a-se a-s-ga-ni ge-sv do-da-tsi-yo-hu-si, a-le wi-tsi-ga-dv v-tla wi-yv-ge-tsi-lu-gi.

040822.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ, ᏥᎪ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏛᏓᎵ?  ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ; ᏫᏥᎦᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏫᏴᎨᏥᎷᎩ.
040822.english: Then said the Jews, Will he kill himself? because he saith, Whither I go, ye cannot come.
040822.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi, Tsi-go u-wa-sv dv-da-li?  Hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha; Wi-tsi-ga-dv v-tla wi-yv-ge-tsi-lu-gi.

040823.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏂᎯ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎠᏴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ.  ᏂᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.
040823.english: And he said unto them, Ye are from beneath; I am from above: ye are of this world; I am not of this world.
040823.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ni-hi e-la-di i-tsa-da-le-nv-hi; a-yv ga-lv-la-di nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi.  Ni-hi a-ni e-lo-hi i-tsa-da-le-nv-hi; a-yv v-tla a-ni e-lo-hi a-qua-da-le-nv-hi yi-gi.

040824.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏏ; ᎠᏎ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏂᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏥᏲᎱᏏ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏂᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏥᏲᎱᏏ.
040824.english: I said therefore unto you, that ye shall die in your sins: for if ye believe not that I am he, ye shall die in your sins.
040824.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-tsv-we-si; a-se ge-tsi-s-ga-ni-quo ge-sv do-da-tsi-yo-hu-si; i-yu-ye-no ni-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di a-yv na-s-gi ge-sv-i, a-se ge-tsi-s-ga-ni ge-sv do-da-tsi-yo-hu-si.

040825.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᎪᏂᎯ?  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏥᏨᏲᏎᎰᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ.
040825.english: Then said they unto him, Who art thou? And Jesus saith unto them, Even the same that I said unto you from the beginning.
040825.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-go-ni-hi?  Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Na-s-gi-quo tsi-tsv-yo-se-ho-i, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya na-s-gi-quo.

040826.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎭ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏨᏳᎪᏓᏁᏗ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ; ᎠᏴᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᏃᎮᎮᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏥᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎢ.
040826.english: I have many things to say and to judge of you: but he that sent me is true; and I speak to the world those things which I have heard of him.
040826.phonetic: U-tsa-ti go-hu-s-di a-gi-ha i-tsv-yo-se-di, a-le di-tsv-yu-go-da-ne-di; a-se-no nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv du-yu-go-dv-i; a-yv-no e-lo-hi tsi-no-he-he-ha na-s-gi nu-s-dv tsi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-i.

040827.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏳᏃᎵᏤ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎦᏛᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎦᏬᏁᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
040827.english: They understood not that he spake to them of the Father.
040827.phonetic: V-tla yu-no-li-tse A-ga-yv-li-ge ga-dv-gv na-s-gi de-ga-wo-ne-di-s-gv-i.

040828.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎡᏥᏌᎳᏓᏅᎭ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏓᏣᏙᎴᎰᏏ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᏙᏓᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏇᏲᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ.
040828.english: Then said Jesus unto them, When ye have lifted up the Son of man, then shall ye know that I am he, and that I do nothing of myself; but as my Father hath taught me, I speak these things.
040828.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Yv-wi U-we-tsi e-tsi-sa-la-da-nv-ha, hna-quo da-tsa-do-le-ho-si a-yv na-s-gi ge-sv-i, a-le a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-da-nv-te-dv go-hu-s-di ni-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-na ge-sv-i, E-do-da-quo-s-gi-ni a-que-yo-nv na-s-gi tsi-no-he-s-gv-i.

040829.cherokee: ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎣᎩᎾᎵᎪᎭ; ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏋᏕᏨ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏰᏃ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ.
040829.english: And he that sent me is with me: the Father hath not left me alone; for I do always those things that please him.
040829.phonetic: Nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv o-gi-na-li-go-ha; A-ga-yv-li-ge v-tla ya-quv-de-tsv, ni-go-hi-lv-ye-no da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di.

040830.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎤᏂᏣᏛ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏅᎩ.
040830.english: As he spake these words, many believed on him.
040830.phonetic: A-si-quo na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi, u-ni-tsa-dv gv-wo-hi-yu-nv-gi.

040831.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040831.english: Then said Jesus to those Jews which believed on him, If ye continue in my word, then are ye my disciples indeed;
040831.phonetic: Hna-quo Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi A-ni-tsu-si gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi; I-yu-no de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-se-s-di a-gi-ne-tsv-i, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya s-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ge-se-s-di.

040832.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᏥᎦᏙᎥᏏ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏃ ᏂᏕᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏅᏓᏨᏁᎵ.
040832.english: And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.
040832.phonetic: A-le da-tsi-ga-do-v-si du-yu-go-dv-i, du-yu-go-dv-no ni-de-tsi-na-tla-v-na nv-da-tsv-ne-li.

040833.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏁᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏙᎩᎾᏢᏃᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏂᏕᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏅᏓᏰᏨᏁᎵ, ᏣᏗᎭ?
040833.english: They answered him, We be Abraham's seed, and were never in bondage to any man: how sayest thou, Ye shall be made free?
040833.phonetic: Gv-wa-ne-tse-lv hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; A-yv E-qua-ha-mi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv, a-le v-tla i-lv-hi-yu gi-lo yi-do-gi-na-tlv-no-i, ga-do-no ni-de-tsi-na-tla-v-na nv-da-ye-tsv-ne-li, tsa-di-ha?

040834.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᏚᏁᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᏣᏍᎦᏅᎪᎢ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ ᎨᏐᎢ.
040834.english: Jesus answered them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whosoever committeth sin is the servant of sin.
040834.phonetic: Tsi-sa du-ne-tse-lv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Gi-lo tsa-s-ga-nv-go-i a-s-ga-ni u-na-tla-i ge-so-i.

040835.cherokee: ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ; ᎠᎦᏅᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎰᎢ.
040835.english: And the servant abideth not in the house for ever: but the Son abideth ever.
040835.phonetic: A-tsi-na-tla-i-no v-tla a-da-ne-lv ni-go-hi-lv e-hi yi-ge-so-i; A-ga-nv-gi-s-gi-ni ni-go-hi-lv e-ho-i.

040836.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᎦᏅᎩ ᏂᏕᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏱᏂᏨᏁᎸ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏂᏕᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏱᎩ.
040836.english: If the Son therefore shall make you free, ye shall be free indeed.
040836.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no A-ga-nv-gi ni-de-tsi-na-tla-v-na yi-ni-tsv-ne-lv u-do-hi-yu-sv ni-de-tsi-na-tla-v-na yi-gi.

040837.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏚᎵ ᏍᎩᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏥᏁᎬ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᏫᎾᏴᎯᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040837.english: I know that ye are Abraham's seed; but ye seek to kill me, because my word hath no place in you.
040837.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-hi E-qua-ha-mi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv-i; a-se-no i-tsa-du-li s-gi-i-s-di-yi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsi-ne-gv de-tsa-da-nv-dv wi-na-yv-hi-hv-na ge-sv-i.

040838.cherokee: ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᎩᎪᎲ ᎡᏙᏙᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏁᎪᎢ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏥᎪᎲ ᎢᏥᏙᏙᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
040838.english: I speak that which I have seen with my Father: and ye do that which ye have seen with your father.
040838.phonetic: Nu-s-dv a-gi-go-hv E-do-do-yi na-s-gi tsi-ne-go-i; ni-hi-no nu-s-dv i-tsi-go-hv i-tsi-do-do-yi na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-ho-i.

040839.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎣᎩᏙᏓ.  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ, ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ.
040839.english: They answered and said unto him, Abraham is our father. Jesus saith unto them, If ye were Abraham's children, ye would do the works of Abraham.
040839.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; E-qua-ha-mi o-gi-do-da.  Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no ni-hi E-qua-ha-mi tsu-we-tsi yi-gi, E-qua-ha-mi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv yi-di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha.

040840.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏣᏚᎵ ᏍᎩᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎾᏛᏁᎮ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ.
040840.english: But now ye seek to kill me, a man that hath told you the truth, which I have heard of God: this did not Abraham.
040840.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsa-du-li s-gi-i-s-di-yi a-yv du-yu-go-dv i-tsv-no-ne-lv-hi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i; v-tla na-s-gi yi-na-dv-ne-he E-qua-ha-mi.

040841.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏅᎯ ᎣᎩᎾᏄᎪᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᏌᏉ ᎡᎭ ᎣᎩᏙᏓ-ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
040841.english: Ye do the deeds of your father. Then said they to him, We be not born of fornication; we have one Father, even God.
040841.phonetic: I-tsi-do-da tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i.  Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; v-tla u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-nv-hi o-gi-na-nu-go-tsv-hi yi-gi; sa-quo e-ha O-gi-do-da---na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi.

040842.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᏱᎩ, ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏱᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱᏰᏃ ᏗᏆᏓᎴᏅ ᎠᎩᎷᏥᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏯᎩᎷᏥᎸ, ᏗᎩᏅᏒᏍᎩᏂ.
040842.english: Jesus said unto them, If God were your Father, ye would love me: for I proceeded forth and came from God; neither came I of myself, but he sent me.
040842.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no U-ne-la-nv-hi I-tsi-do-da yi-gi, s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu yi-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi-ye-no di-qua-da-le-nv a-gi-lu-tsi-lv; a-le v-tla a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-da-nv-te-dv-ya-gi-lu-tsi-lv, di-gi-nv-sv-s-gi-ni.

040843.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏱᏦᎵᎦ ᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ?  ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏁᎬ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏣᏛᎪᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040843.english: Why do ye not understand my speech? even because ye cannot hear my word.
040843.phonetic: Ga-do-no tla yi-tso-li-ga tsi-wo-ni-s-gv-i?  Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gi-ni tsi-ne-gv ye-li ge-tsa-dv-go-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

040844.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎤᏲ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᎭ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎯᎯ ᏂᎨᏐ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏳᏪᎭ.  ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎧᏁᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦᏉ ᎧᏁᎪᎢ; ᎦᏰᎪᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040844.english: Ye are of your father the devil, and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it.
040844.phonetic: I-tsi-do-da a-s-gi-na nv-da-tsa-da-le-nv-hi ni-hi, a-le i-tsi-do-da u-yo du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi i-tsa-du-li-ha.  Na-s-gi yv-wi di-hi-hi ni-ge-so di-da-le-ni-s-gv-i, a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv v-tla yi-du-ka-hna-wa-dv-se-i, v-tla-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv yu-we-ha.  Ga-ye-go-gi ka-ne-gi u-tse-li-ga-quo ka-ne-go-i; ga-ye-go-gi-ye-no na-s-gi, a-le u-ga-yv-li-ge ga-ye-go-gi ge-sv-i.

040845.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏥᏁᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᎲᏍᎦ.
040845.english: And because I tell you the truth, ye believe me not.
040845.phonetic: A-se-no du-yu-go-dv tsi-ne-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-tla yi-s-gi-yo-i-yu-hv-s-ga.

040846.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗ ᎠᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏱᏥᏁᎦ, ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏱᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᎲᏍᎦ?
040846.english: Which of you convinceth me of sin? And if I say the truth, why do ye not believe me?
040846.phonetic: Ga-go u-da-su-ya hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-wa-ne-di a-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-sv-i?  I-yu-no du-yu-go-dv yi-tsi-ne-ga, ga-do-no tla yi-s-gi-yo-i-yu-hv-s-ga?

040847.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᎩᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040847.english: He that is of God heareth God's words: ye therefore hear them not, because ye are not of God.
040847.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv na-s-gi a-dv-gi-s-go U-ne-la-nv-hi ka-ne-gv-i; ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-gi-s-gv-na tsi-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-tsa-da-le-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

040848.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏂᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏲᏥᏁᎦ, ᏌᎺᎵᏱ ᎮᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏣᏯᎢ, ᏥᏨᏲᏎᎭ?
040848.english: Then answered the Jews, and said unto him, Say we not well that thou art a Samaritan, and hast a devil?
040848.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si U-ni-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi; Tla-s-go du-yu-go-dv yo-tsi-ne-ga, Sa-me-li-yi he-hi a-le a-s-gi-na tsa-ya-i, tsi-tsv-yo-se-ha?

040849.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏯᎩᏯᎠ, ᏥᎸᏉᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏙᏓ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏍᎩᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᎭ.
040849.english: Jesus answered, I have not a devil; but I honour my Father, and ye do dishonour me.
040849.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla a-s-gi-na ya-gi-ya-a, tsi-lv-quo-di-quo-s-gi-ni E-do-da; ni-hi-no a-yv ge-s-gi-so-tlv-i-s-di-ha.

040850.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎩᏲᎭ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏗᏱ; ᎡᎭ ᎤᏲᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩ.
040850.english: And I seek not mine own glory: there is one that seeketh and judgeth.
040850.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla ya-gi-yo-ha a-quv-sv v-gi-lv-quo-di-yi; e-ha u-yo-hi a-le di-gu-go-di-s-gi.

040851.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040851.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, If a man keep my saying, he shall never see death.
040851.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, I-yu-no gi-lo a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-ge-s-di tsi-ne-gv-i, na-s-gi v-tla i-lv-hi-yu a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-go-wa-dv-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

040852.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎣᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏣᏯᎥᎢ.  ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎯᏪᎭ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
040852.english: Then said the Jews unto him, Now we know that thou hast a devil. Abraham is dead, and the prophets; and thou sayest, If a man keep my saying, he shall never taste of death.
040852.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ni-tsu-si hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Hna-quo o-tsa-do-le-ho-hi a-s-gi-na tsa-ya-v-i.  E-qua-ha-mi u-yo-hu-sv, a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, ni-hi-no hi-a ni-hi-we-ha; I-yu-no gi-lo a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-ge-s-di tsi-ne-gv-i, na-s-gi v-tla i-lv-hi-yu a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-do-le-ho-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

040853.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎣᎩᏙᏓ, ᏧᏲᎱᏒ?  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒ.  ᎦᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎭᏤᎸᏍᎦ?
040853.english: Art thou greater than our father Abraham, which is dead? and the prophets are dead: whom makest thou thyself?
040853.phonetic: Tsi-go ni-hi u-tli e-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo E-qua-ha-mi o-gi-do-da, tsu-yo-hu-sv?  A-le na-s-quo a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi du-ni-yo-hu-sv.  Ga-go ni-hi ha-tse-lv-s-ga?

040854.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏋᏒ ᏱᎦᏓᎸᏉᏗᎭ, ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᎩ; ᎡᏙᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏣᏗᎭ.
040854.english: Jesus answered, If I honour myself, my honour is nothing: it is my Father that honoureth me; of whom ye say, that he is your God:
040854.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no a-quv-sv yi-ga-da-lv-quo-di-ha, v-gi-lv-quo-di-yu a-se-quo-quo yi-gi; E-do-da-s-gi-ni a-gi-lv-quo-di-s-gi, na-s-gi a-yv O-ga-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-tsa-di-ha.

040855.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏰᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏱᏚᏗᎭ ᏥᏰᎪᎩᏉ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᏥᏂᏣᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ.
040855.english: Yet ye have not known him; but I know him: and if I should say, I know him not, I shall be a liar like unto you: but I know him, and keep his saying.
040855.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla ye-tsi-ga-ta-ha, a-yv-s-gi-ni tsi-ga-ta-ha; i-yu-no v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha yi-du-di-ha tsi-ye-go-gi-quo yi-gi, ni-hi tsi-ni-tsa-s-di na-s-gi-ya-i; a-se-no tsi-ga-ta-ha, a-le u-ne-tsv a-gi-s-qua-ni-go-di.

040856.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎨᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᎲᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏛᎩ.
040856.english: Your father Abraham rejoiced to see my day: and he saw it, and was glad.
040856.phonetic: I-tsi-do-da E-qua-ha-mi a-li-he-li-s-di u-du-gi u-wa-sv u-go-wa-dv-di-yi go-hi ge-sv a-yv ge-v-i, a-le u-go-hv-gi a-le o-si-yu u-da-nv-da-dv-gi.

040857.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᎯᏍᎩᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏣᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏱᎩ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎪᎥᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ?
040857.english: Then said the Jews unto him, Thou art not yet fifty years old, and hast thou seen Abraham?
040857.phonetic: Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si hi-a nv-gv-we-se-lv-gi; v-tla a-si hi-s-gi-s-go-hi i-tsa-de-ti-yv-dv yi-gi; Tsi-sa-no hi-go-v-hi i-gi E-qua-ha-mi?

040858.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎠᏏᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᏂᎨᎣᎢ.
040858.english: Jesus said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Before Abraham was, I am.
040858.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; A-si-quo E-qua-ha-mi ne-hv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi, A-yv ni-ge-o-i.

040859.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏅᏯ ᏚᏂᎩᏒᎩ, ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏗᏍᎦᎳᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥ ᎤᎦᏛᎴᏒᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎶᏐᏅᎩ.
040859.english: Then took they up stones to cast at him: but Jesus hid himself, and went out of the temple, going through the midst of them, and so passed by.
040859.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nv-ya du-ni-gi-sv-gi, di-gv-wa-ni-s-do-di, a-se-no Tsi-sa u-di-s-ga-la-nv-gi, a-le u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi u-nu-go-tsv-gi, a-ye-li a-ni-do-na-v u-ga-dv-le-sv-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le u-lo-so-nv-gi.

040901.cherokee: [ᏥᏌᏃ] ᎤᎶᏒ ᎤᎪᎲᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏫ ᏂᎨᏎ ᎤᏕᏅ.
040901.english: And as Jesus passed by, he saw a man which was blind from his birth.
040901.phonetic: [Tsi-sa-no] u-lo-sv u-go-hv-gi a-s-ga-ya, na-s-gi di-ge-wi ni-ge-se u-de-nv.

040902.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏤᎢ, ᎯᎠᏍᎪ, ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢᎨ, ᏗᎨᏫ ᏧᏕᏁᎢ?
040902.english: And his disciples asked him, saying, Master, who did sin, this man, or his parents, that he was born blind?
040902.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no gv-wa-dv-dv-nv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, ga-go u-s-ga-nv-tse-i, hi-a-s-go, tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-i-ge, di-ge-wi tsu-de-ne-i?

040903.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠ ᏳᏍᎦᏅᏨ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
040903.english: Jesus answered, Neither hath this man sinned, nor his parents: but that the works of God should be made manifest in him.
040903.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla hi-a yu-s-ga-nv-tsv, v-tla a-le tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo-s-gi-ni tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi a-gv-di-s-gv-i.

040904.cherokee: ᎠᏎ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎩ; ᏒᏃᏱ ᏓᏯᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏰᎵ ᎩᎶ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
040904.english: I must work the works of him that sent me, while it is day: the night cometh, when no man can work.
040904.phonetic: A-se di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv a-si-quo i-ga tsi-gi; sv-no-yi da-ya-i, na-hi-yu ye-li gi-lo di-gv-wa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na.

040905.cherokee: ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᏙᎲᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏥᏯᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
040905.english: As long as I am in the world, I am the light of the world.
040905.phonetic: Ni-go-hi-lv e-lo-hi ge-do-hv-i, a-yv e-lo-hi i-ga ga-tsi-ya-ti-s-da-ne-hi.

040906.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎤᎵᏥᏍᏋᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏝᏬᏔ ᎤᏬᏢᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᎵᏥᏍᏋᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏝᏬᏔ ᏚᏅᎵᏰᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᏗᎨᏫ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ,
040906.english: When he had thus spoken, he spat on the ground, and made clay of the spittle, and he anointed the eyes of the blind man with the clay,
040906.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-we-sv ga-do-hi u-li-tsi-s-quv-gi, a-le na-s-gi tla-wo-ta u-wo-tlv-ta-nv-gi u-li-tsi-s-quv-hi, a-le na-s-gi tla-wo-ta du-nv-li-ye-da-ne-lv-gi di-ge-wi di-ga-do-li,

040907.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎮᎾ ᏩᏙᏑᎵ ᏌᎶᎻ ᏨᏓᎸᎢ,^ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎦᏛᎦ.  ᎤᏪᏅᏒᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏭᏙᏑᎴᎥᎩ, ᎤᎷᏨᏃ ᎠᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩ.
040907.english: And said unto him, Go, wash in the pool of Siloam, (which is by interpretation, Sent.) He went his way therefore, and washed, and came seeing.
040907.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; He-na wa-do-su-li Sa-lo-mi tsv-da-lv-i,^na-s-gi a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi A-tsi-nv-si-dv ga-dv-ga.  U-we-nv-sv-gi-no a-le wu-do-su-le-v-gi, u-lu-tsv-no a-go-wa-ti-s-gv-gi.

040908.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ Ꮎ ᎾᎥ ᏗᏂᏁᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎪᎯᏙᎸᎯ ᏗᎨᏫ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏬᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏚᎳᏗᏍᎬᎩ?
040908.english: The neighbours therefore, and they which before had seen him that he was blind, said, Is not this he that sat and begged?
040908.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na na-v di-ni-ne-la, a-le u-ni-go-hi-do-lv-hi di-ge-wi ge-sv-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Tla-s-go hi-a na-s-gi yi-gi na tsu-wo-lv a-le tsa-du-la-di-s-gv-gi?

040909.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎩ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ, ᏓᎾᏤᎸ ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎩ.  ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
040909.english: Some said, This is he: others said, He is like him: but he said, I am he.
040909.phonetic: I-ga-dv, na-s-gi, u-na-dv-nv-gi; i-ga-dv-no, da-na-tse-lv u-na-dv-nv-gi.  U-wa-sv-s-gi-ni, A-yv na-s-gi, u-dv-nv-gi.

040910.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏔᏁ ᏘᎦᏙᎵ ᏚᎵᏍᏚᎢᏎᎢ?
040910.english: Therefore said they unto him, How were thine eyes opened?
040910.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi, Ga-do u-li-s-do-ta-ne ti-ga-do-li du-li-s-du-i-se-i?

040911.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏥᏌ ᏥᏚᏙᎥ ᏝᏬᏔ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏅᎵᏰᎥ ᏗᏥᎦᏙᎵ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏌᎶᎻ ᏨᏓᎸᎢ ᎮᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏩᏙᏑᎵ; ᎠᏇᏅᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏩᏆᏙᏑᎴᎢ ᏰᎵ ᎬᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
040911.english: He answered and said, A man that is called Jesus made clay, and anointed mine eyes, and said unto me, Go to the pool of Siloam, and wash: and I went and washed, and I received sight.
040911.phonetic: U-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; A-s-ga-ya Tsi-sa tsi-du-do-v tla-wo-ta u-wo-tlv-nv-gi, a-le du-nv-li-ye-v di-tsi-ga-do-li; hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi; Sa-lo-mi tsv-da-lv-i he-na a-le wa-do-su-li; a-que-nv-no a-le wa-qua-do-su-le-i ye-li gv-gi-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi.

040912.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎭᏢ ᎡᏙᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᏅᏛᏅᎩ.
040912.english: Then said they unto him, Where is he? He said, I know not.
040912.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ha-tlv e-do-ha?  V-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, nv-dv-nv-gi.

040913.english: They brought to the Pharisees him that aforetime was blind.

040914.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ ᏝᏬᏔ ᎤᏬᏢᏅ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᏚᏍᏚᎢᏒ.
040914.english: And it was the sabbath day when Jesus made the clay, and opened his eyes.
040914.phonetic: U-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-no i-ga ge-sv-gi Tsi-sa tla-wo-ta u-wo-tlv-nv a-le di-ga-do-li du-s-du-i-sv.

040915.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᎬᏩᏛᏛᏅᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏗᏥᎦᏙᎵ ᏝᏬᏔ ᏚᏅᎵᏰᎥᎩ, ᎠᏆᏙᏑᎴᎥᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ.
040915.english: Then again the Pharisees also asked him how he had received his sight. He said unto them, He put clay upon mine eyes, and I washed, and do see.
040915.phonetic: A-le hna-quo A-ni-qua-li-si na-s-quo v-gv-wa-dv-dv-nv-gi nu-li-s-do-ta-nv gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-i.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Di-tsi-ga-do-li tla-wo-ta du-nv-li-ye-v-gi, a-qua-do-su-le-v-gi-no a-le i-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha.

040916.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏝᏰᏃ ᏯᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᎭ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏱᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ?  ᏔᎵᏃ ᏄᎾᏓᏛᎩ.
040916.english: Therefore said some of the Pharisees, This man is not of God, because he keepeth not the sabbath day. Others said, How can a man that is a sinner do such miracles? And there was a division among them.
040916.phonetic: Hna-quo-no i-ga-dv A-ni-qua-li-si hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Na-s-gi hi-a a-s-ga-ya v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-gi, tla-ye-no ya-s-qua-ni-go-di-ha u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv-i.  I-ga-dv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yv-wi a-s-ga-na-i na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-s-qua-ni-go-di yi-du-lv-wi-s-da-si?  Ta-li-no nu-na-da-dv-gi.

040917.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏗᎨᏫ; ᎦᏙ ᏂᎯ ᎭᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ ᏥᏕᏣᏍᏚᎢᎡᎸ ᏘᎦᏙᎵ?  ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
040917.english: They say unto the blind man again, What sayest thou of him, that he hath opened thine eyes? He said, He is a prophet.
040917.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi di-ge-wi; Ga-do ni-hi ha-di-ha na-s-gi hi-no-he-s-gv-i tsi-de-tsa-s-du-i-e-lv ti-ga-do-li?  A-do-le-ho-s-gi, u-dv-nv-gi.

040918.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨ ᏗᎨᏫ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᏫᏚᏂᏯᏅᎲ ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ.
040918.english: But the Jews did not believe concerning him, that he had been blind, and received his sight, until they called the parents of him that had received his sight.
040918.phonetic: A-se-no A-ni-tsu-si v-tla ya-no-hi-yu-hv-s-ge di-ge-wi i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv a-le gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-i, gv-ni wi-du-ni-ya-nv-hv tsu-ga-yv-li-ge na-s-gi na gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di i-yu-li-s-da-ne-lv-hi.

040919.cherokee: ᏚᎾᏛᏛᏅᎩᏃ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎠᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏍᏕᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏫ ᎤᏕᏅᎩ ᏥᏍᏓᏗᎭ?  ᎦᏙᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎪᎯ ᏣᎪᏩᏘᎭ?
040919.english: And they asked them, saying, Is this your son, who ye say was born blind? how then doth he now see?
040919.phonetic: Du-na-dv-dv-nv-gi-no, na-s-gi hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Hi-a-s-go ni-hi i-s-de-tsi, na-s-gi di-ge-wi u-de-nv-gi tsi-s-da-di-ha?  Ga-do-no u-li-s-do-ta-nv go-hi tsa-go-wa-ti-ha?

040920.cherokee: ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏚᏂᏁᏤᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎣᏍᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎣᎩᏁᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏫ ᎤᏕᏅᎢ;
040920.english: His parents answered them and said, We know that this is our son, and that he was born blind:
040920.phonetic: Tsu-ga-yv-li-ge du-ni-ne-tse-lv hi-a ni-du-ni-we-se-lv-gi; O-s-di-ga-ta-ha hi-a o-gi-ne-tsi ge-sv-i, a-le di-ge-wi u-de-nv-i;

040921.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎢ ᎪᎯ ᏣᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏲᏍᏗᎦᏔᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏲᏍᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏍᏚᎢᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ.  ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏗᏃᎾ ᎤᏛᎾ, ᎡᏣᏛᏛᎲᎦ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᏓᎧᏃᎮᎵ.
040921.english: But by what means he now seeth, we know not; or who hath opened his eyes, we know not: he is of age; ask him: he shall speak for himself.
040921.phonetic: A-se-no nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv-i go-hi tsa-go-wa-ti-ha v-tla yo-s-di-ga-ta-ha; a-le a-yv v-tla yo-s-di-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi na tsu-s-du-i-e-lv-hi ge-sv di-ga-do-li.  Hna-quo a-di-no-na u-dv-na, e-tsa-dv-dv-hv-ga, u-wa-sv da-ka-no-he-li.

040922.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏓᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ; ᎦᏳᎳᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᏄᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏁᏨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
040922.english: These words spake his parents, because they feared the Jews: for the Jews had agreed already, that if any man did confess that he was Christ, he should be put out of the synagogue.
040922.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-ni-we-sv-gi tsu-ga-yv-li-ge-i, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi da-ni-s-ga-i-hv A-ni-tsu-si; ga-yu-la-ye-no a-ni-tsu-si tsu-nu-go-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi i-yu gi-lo yu-ne-tsv na-s-gi ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv a-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

040923.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᏧᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏛᎾ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎡᏣᏛᏛᎲᎦ.
040923.english: Therefore said his parents, He is of age; ask him.
040923.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi tsu-ga-yv-li-ge hi-a nu-ni-we-sv; Hna-quo u-dv-na, u-wa-sv e-tsa-dv-dv-hv-ga.

040924.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏭᏂᏯᏅᎲᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏗᎨᏫ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎯᎸᏉᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᏴ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
040924.english: Then again called they the man that was blind, and said unto him, Give God the praise: we know that this man is a sinner.
