041410.english: Believest thou not that I am in the Father, and the Father in me? the words that I speak unto you I speak not of myself: but the Father that dwelleth in me, he doeth the works.
041410.phonetic: Tla-s-go yo-hi-yu-hv-s-ga a-yv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i tsi-ya-v-i, a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge a-yv a-gi-ya-v-i?  Ka-no-he-dv tsi-tsv-no-he-he-ho-i, v-tla a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-da-nv-te-dv yi-tsi-ne-go-i, A-ga-yv-li-ge-i-s-gi-ni tsa-gi-ya-a na-s-gi du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i.

041411.cherokee: ᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᎲᎦ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏥᏯᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏯᎥᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᏉ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏍᎩᏲᎢᏳᎲᎦ.
041411.english: Believe me that I am in the Father, and the Father in me: or else believe me for the very works' sake.
041411.phonetic: S-gi-yo-i-yu-hv-ga a-yv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i tsi-ya-v-i, a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-yv a-gi-ya-v-i, i-yu-no ni-s-gi-yo-i-yu-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di, da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-quo wi-ni-ga-li-s-do-da s-gi-yo-i-yu-hv-ga.

041412.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᏥᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᏓᏳᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏙᏓᏳᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎯᎠ; ᎡᏙᏙᏱᏰᏃ ᎦᎢ,
041412.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me, the works that I do shall he do also; and greater works than these shall he do; because I go unto my Father.
041412.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; A-quo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, a-yv tsi-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha na-s-quo-na-s-gi do-da-yu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-li, a-le u-tli u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu do-da-yu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-li e-s-ga-quo hi-a; E-do-do-yi-ye-no ga-i,

041413.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᏉᏙᎥ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041413.english: And whatsoever ye shall ask in my name, that will I do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
041413.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-no go-hu-s-di da-quo-do-v i-tsi-ta-yo-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di ge-se-s-di, A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-tsi-lv-quo-do-di-yi U-we-tsi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

041414.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗ.
041414.english: If ye shall ask any thing in my name, I will do it.
041414.phonetic: I-yu-no go-hu-s-di da-qua-do-v i-tsi-ta-yo-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi a-se i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di.

041415.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏓ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ;
041415.english: If ye love me, keep my commandments.
041415.phonetic: I-yu-no s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-se-s-di, i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-da a-qua-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di;

041416.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏥᏔᏲᏎᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏓᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎵ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎢᏥᏅᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎯ,
041416.english: And I will pray the Father, and he shall give you another Comforter, that he may abide with you for ever;
041416.phonetic: A-le A-ga-yv-li-ge a-yv da-tsi-ta-yo-se-li, na-s-gi-no da-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-li nv-wa-da-le I-tsi-nv-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi, na-s-gi a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na i-tse-la-di-do-hi,

041417.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏳᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎦᏔᎭ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎭᏰᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ.
041417.english: Even the Spirit of truth; whom the world cannot receive, because it seeth him not, neither knoweth him: but ye know him; for he dwelleth with you, and shall be in you.
041417.phonetic: Na-s-gi na ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi e-lo-hi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi yu-go-wa-ti-ha a-le v-tla yu-ga-ta-ha; ni-hi-s-gi-ni e-tsi-ga-ta-ha, i-tse-la-di-do-ha-ye-no, a-le na-s-gi i-tsi-ya-e-s-di.

041418.english: I will not leave you comfortless: I will come to you.

041419.cherokee: ᎠᏏ ᏞᎦ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎬᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᏨᏁᏍᏗ.
041419.english: Yet a little while, and the world seeth me no more; but ye see me: because I live, ye shall live also.
041419.phonetic: A-si tle-ga, hna-quo e-lo-hi v-tla ya-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, ni-hi-s-gi-ni s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, a-yv-ye-no gv-nv, a-le ni-hi na-s-quo de-tsv-ne-s-di.

041420.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᏓᏣᏙᎴᎰᏏ ᎠᏴ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏥᏯᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᏯᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏨᏯᎥᎢ.
041420.english: At that day ye shall know that I am in my Father, and ye in me, and I in you.
041420.phonetic: Na-hi-yu da-tsa-do-le-ho-si a-yv E-do-da tsi-ya-v-i, a-le ni-hi s-gi-ya-v-i, a-le a-yv i-tsv-ya-v-i.

041421.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯ ᎤᎨᏳᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏥᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏥᏯᏛᏁᎵ.
041421.english: He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him.
041421.phonetic: Na-s-gi na di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-qua-tse-li-ga u-s-qua-ni-go-di a-le di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi, na-s-gi a-yv a-gi-ge-yu-hi, a-le a-yv a-gi-ge-yu-hi u-ge-yu-hi ge-se-s-di E-do-da, a-le a-yv tsi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-se-s-di, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-tsi-ya-dv-ne-li.

041422.cherokee: ᏧᏓᏏ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᏍᎦᎳᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏛᏍᎩᏯᏛᏁᎵ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ?
041422.english: Judas saith unto him, not Iscariot, Lord, how is it that thou wilt manifest thyself unto us, and not unto the world?
041422.phonetic: Tsu-da-si, v-tla I-s-ga-la-di, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, ga-do da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni gv-ni-ge-sv a-yv nv-dv-s-gi-ya-dv-ne-li, v-tla-no e-lo-hi?

041423.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ; ᎡᏙᏓᏃ ᎤᎨᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏲᏍᏗᎷᏤᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ ᏓᏲᏍᏓᏁᎳᏗ.
041423.english: Jesus answered and said unto him, If a man love me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.
041423.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no gi-lo a-gi-ge-yu-hi yi-gi, na-s-gi tsu-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-gi-ne-tsv-i; E-do-da-no u-ge-yu-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di, a-le da-yo-s-di-lu-tse-li, a-le ga-ne-lv-i da-yo-s-da-ne-la-di.

041424.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎪ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ.  ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏃ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎠ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
041424.english: He that loveth me not keepeth not my sayings: and the word which ye hear is not mine, but the Father's which sent me.
041424.phonetic: A-gi-ge-yu-hi ni-ge-sv-na v-tla yi-da-ka-hna-wa-de-go a-gi-ne-tsv-i.  Ka-no-he-dv-no tsi-tsa-dv-gi-a, v-tla a-yv a-qua-tse-li-ga yi-gi, a-ga-yv-li-ge-s-gi-ni nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv u-tse-li-ga.

041425.english: These things have I spoken unto you, being yet present with you.

041426.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏅᏓᏳᏅᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏓᏆᏙᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏤᏲᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏣᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏂ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎸᎢ.
041426.english: But the Comforter, which is the Holy Ghost, whom the Father will send in my name, he shall teach you all things, and bring all things to your remembrance, whatsoever I have said unto you.
041426.phonetic: A-da-nv-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi-s-gi-ni, ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i nv-da-yu-nv-s-di tsi-gi da-qua-do-s-dv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv da-tse-yo-ni, a-le da-tsa-nv-da-di-s-ta-ni ni-ga-v i-tsv-ne-tse-lv-i.

041427.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏨᎢᏯᏏ; ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏨᎥᏏ.  ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏣᏓᏁᎰ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᎥᏏ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏳᏕᏯᏔᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏯᏍᎦᎢᎮᏍᏗ.
041427.english: Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.
041427.phonetic: Nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsv-i-ya-si; nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-qua-tse-li-ga i-tsv-v-si.  V-tla e-lo-hi tsa-da-ne-ho na-s-gi i-yu-s-di yi-tsv-v-si; tle-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-do yu-de-ya-ta-ne-he-s-di, a-le tle-s-di ya-s-ga-i-he-s-di.

041428.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ, ᏛᎨᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏛᏨᎷᏤᎵ, ᏥᏨᏲᏎᎸᎩ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᏱᏣᎵᎮᎵᎦ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏘ ᏣᏆᏛᏅᎩ; ᎡᏙᏓᏰᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏴ.
041428.english: Ye have heard how I said unto you, I go away, and come again unto you. If ye loved me, ye would rejoice, because I said, I go unto the Father: for my Father is greater than I.
041428.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi, dv-ge-si a-le dv-tsv-lu-tse-li, tsi-tsv-yo-se-lv-gi.  I-yu-no s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu yi-gi, yi-tsa-li-he-li-ga yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi wi-tsi-ga-ti tsa-qua-dv-nv-gi; E-do-da-ye-no u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo a-yv.

041429.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏍᏆᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏃᎲᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗᏱ.
041429.english: And now I have told you before it come to pass, that, when it is come to pass, ye might believe.
041429.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-si-quo na-s-qua-li-s-gv-na ge-sv i-tsv-no-hv-si, na-s-gi a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha i-tso-hi-yu-di-yi.

041430.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏴᎨᏨᏯᎵᏃᎮᏓ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏓᏯᎢ; ᎥᏝᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏯᏇᎭ.
041430.english: Hereafter I will not talk much with you: for the prince of this world cometh, and hath nothing in me.
041430.phonetic: Go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla u-tsa-ti yv-ge-tsv-ya-li-no-he-da; u-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no hi-a e-lo-hi u-tse-li-ga da-ya-i; v-tla-no go-hu-s-di u-tse-li ya-que-ha.

041431.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏥᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᎩᏁᏤᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎲᎢ.  ᏗᏣᎴᎲᎦ, ᎢᏕᎾ.
041431.english: But that the world may know that I love the Father; and as the Father gave me commandment, even so I do. Arise, let us go hence.
041431.phonetic: A-se-no e-lo-hi u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i tsi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i, a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-gi-ne-tse-lv-i na-s-gi ni-ga-dv-ne-hv-i.  Di-tsa-le-hv-ga, i-de-na.

041501.english: I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman.

041502.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᏓᏋᏂᎦᎸᎢ ᎾᎾᏓᏛᎥᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᏕᎬᏂᎦᎵᏍᎪᎢ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎠᎾᏓᏛᎥᏍᎩ ᏕᎬᏂᎦᎷᏬᏍᎪᎢ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏐᎢ.
041502.english: Every branch in me that beareth not fruit he taketh away: and every branch that beareth fruit, he purgeth it, that it may bring forth more fruit.
041502.phonetic: Ni-ga-v da-quv-ni-ga-lv-i na-na-da-dv-v-s-gv-na tsi-ge-so de-gv-ni-ga-li-s-go-i; ni-ga-dv-no a-na-da-dv-v-s-gi de-gv-ni-ga-lu-wo-s-go-i u-tli i-ga-i u-na-da-dv-di-yi u-ye-lv-so-i.

041503.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᎦᎸᏔᏅ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
041503.english: Now ye are clean through the word which I have spoken unto you.
041503.phonetic: Hna-quo ni-hi i-tsa-da-nv-ga-lv-ta-nv ka-no-he-dv na-s-gi i-tsv-ne-tse-lv-hi tsi-gi.

041504.cherokee: ᏍᎩᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᏯᎡᏍᏗ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏓᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎬᏂ ᎤᏖᎸᎳᏛ ᏧᏩᏂᎦᎶᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵᎦ ᎬᏂ ᎠᏴ ᏱᏍᎩᏯᎠ.
041504.english: Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me.
041504.phonetic: S-gi-ya-e-s-di, a-se-no i-tsv-ya-e-s-di.  Na-s-gi-ya u-wa-ni-ga-lv-i u-wa-sv ye-li gv-wa-da-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-so gv-ni u-te-lv-la-dv tsu-wa-ni-ga-lo-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni ni-hi v-tla ye-li-ga gv-ni a-yv yi-s-gi-ya-a.

041505.cherokee: ᎤᏖᎸᎳᏛᎢ ᎠᏴ, ᏚᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ ᏂᎯ.  ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᏥᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏙ ᎠᎾᏓᏛᎥᏍᎪᎢ.  ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᎨᏣᏛᎦ.
041505.english: I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing.
041505.phonetic: U-te-lv-la-dv-i a-yv, du-wa-ni-ga-lv-i ni-hi.  A-yv a-gi-ya-i, a-yv-no tsi-ya-i, na-s-gi u-tsa-do a-na-da-dv-v-s-go-i.  V-tla-ye-no a-yv v-tla ye-li go-hu-s-di yv-ge-tsa-dv-ga.

041506.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎩᏯᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎦᏓᎡᎪᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏩᏂᎦᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᎡᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏴᏍᎪᎢ; ᏴᏫᏃ ᏓᏂᏟᏏᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏥᎸᏱᏃ ᏫᏚᎾᏕᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎪᎲᏍᎪᎢ.
041506.english: If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast them into the fire, and they are burned.
041506.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo na-gi-ya-v-na tsi-ge-so-i, a-ga-da-e-go-i na-s-gi-ya u-wa-ni-ga-la-nv-hi tsu-na-da-e-go-i, a-le gv-yv-s-go-i; yv-wi-no da-ni-tli-si-s-go-i, a-tsi-lv-yi-no wi-du-na-de-go-i, a-le da-go-hv-s-go-i.

041507.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏁᏨ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏰᏣᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
041507.english: If ye abide in me, and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done unto you.
041507.phonetic: I-yu-no ni-hi s-gi-ya-e-s-di, a-le a-gi-ne-tsv i-tsi-ya-e-s-di, ni-ga-v i-tsa-du-li-s-gv i-tsi-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di, a-le na-s-gi a-se i-ye-tsa-dv-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

041508.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏛᎥᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏓᏰᏥᎸᏉᏔᏂ; ᎰᏩᏃ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
041508.english: Herein is my Father glorified, that ye bear much fruit; so shall ye be my disciples.
041508.phonetic: U-tsa-dv i-tsa-da-dv-v-s-gv na-s-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni E-do-da da-ye-tsi-lv-quo-ta-ni; ho-wa-no s-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ge-se-s-di.

041509.cherokee: ᎡᏙᏓ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏂᎯ.  ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗᏎᏍᏗᏉ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041509.english: As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.
041509.phonetic: E-do-da a-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu ni-hi.  Nv-wa-s-di-di-se-s-di-quo i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i.

041510.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ, ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗᏉ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏣᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗᏉ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041510.english: If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.
041510.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-qua-tse-li-ga, yi-nv-wa-s-di-di-quo i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-ya tsa-gi-s-qua-ni-go-ta-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di E-do-da u-tse-li-ga, a-le tsi-nv-wa-s-di-di-quo a-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i.

041511.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏔᏅ, ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏗᏎᏍᏗᏉ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᎬ ᎠᏇᎵᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏇᎵᏒ.
041511.english: These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full.
041511.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-wo-ne-ta-nv, nv-wa-s-di-di-se-s-di-quo ga-tsi-ya-li-e-li-gv a-que-li-sv, a-le a-na-li-he-li-gv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di a-que-li-sv.

041512.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ, ᏗᏣᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
041512.english: This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you.
041512.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-qua-tse-li-ga hi-a nu-s-di, Di-tsa-da-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv-i.

041513.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏴᎬᎪᎾᏛᏓ ᎤᎵᎢ ᏗᏲᎱᎯᏎᎯ.
041513.english: Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.
041513.phonetic: V-tla gi-lo u-da-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv yv-gv-go-na-dv-da u-li-i di-yo-hu-hi-se-hi.

041514.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎦᎵᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎲ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᏁᎭ.
041514.english: Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you.
041514.phonetic: Ni-hi a-yv i-ga-li-i, i-yu-no ni-ga-v i-tsv-ne-tse-hv yi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-ha.

041515.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏨᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏲᏎᎭ; ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎦᏔᎰ ᎤᎾᏞᎢ ᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ.  ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦᎵᎢ ᎢᏨᏲᏎᎭ; ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏥᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ.
041515.english: Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you.
041515.phonetic: Go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla i-tsv-nv-si-da-s-di yi-tsv-yo-se-ha; a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di-ye-no v-tla ya-ga-ta-ho u-na-tle-i na-dv-ne-hv-i.  Ni-hi-s-gi-ni i-ga-li-i i-tsv-yo-se-ha; ni-ga-v-ye-no go-hu-s-di E-do-da tsi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-i na-s-gi i-tsv-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv.

041516.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏑᏰᏛ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏯᏑᏰᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏨᏯᎧᏅ ᎢᏤᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᎢᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎦᎶᏐᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᏂᎦᎥᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏔᏲᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏁᏗᏱ.
041516.english: Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of the Father in my name, he may give it you.
041516.phonetic: V-tla ni-hi a-yv s-gi-ya-su-ye-dv yi-gi, a-yv-s-gi-ni ni-hi i-tsv-ya-su-ye-dv, a-le de-tsv-ya-ka-nv i-tse-nv-s-di-yi u-ne-quo-tsv-hi i-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi, a-le u-ne-quo-tsv-hi i-tsa-tse-li-ga ga-lo-so-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, ni-ga-v-no go-hu-s-di e-tsi-ta-yo-se-he-s-di A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-yv da-qua-do-v i-tsi-ta-yo-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi i-tsi-ne-di-yi.

041517.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎭ ᏗᏣᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
041517.english: These things I command you, that ye love one another.
041517.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-ne-tse-ha di-tsa-da-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

041518.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎠᎩᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏂᎯ ᎣᏂ.
041518.english: If the world hate you, ye know that it hated me before it hated you.
041518.phonetic: I-yu-no e-lo-hi i-tsi-s-ga-gi-yu yi-gi, i-tsi-ga-ta-ha a-yv i-gv-yi a-gi-s-ga-gi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv ni-hi o-ni.

041519.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᎪᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᎪᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏨᏯᏑᏰᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᎦ.
041519.english: If ye were of the world, the world would love his own: but because ye are not of the world, but I have chosen you out of the world, therefore the world hateth you.
041519.phonetic: I-yu-no e-lo-hi i-tsa-li-go-hi yi-ge-se-i, e-lo-hi tsu-ge-yu-hi-yu yi-ge-se tsu-tse-li-ga.  A-se-no e-lo-hi i-tsa-li-go-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, i-tsv-ya-su-ye-dv-s-gi-ni e-lo-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha e-lo-hi i-tsi-s-ga-ga.

041520.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎤᎾᏝᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎬᎩᏐᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᎨᏥᏐᏢᏔᏂ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏁᏨ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏁᏨ ᏛᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏂ.
041520.english: Remember the word that I said unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord. If they have persecuted me, they will also persecute you; if they have kept my saying, they will keep yours also.
041520.phonetic: I-tsa-nv-te-s-di hi-a tsi-ni-tsv-we-se-lv-gi; A-tsi-na-tla-i v-tla u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu yi-ge-so e-s-ga-quo u-na-tla-i.  I-yu-no a-yv gv-gi-so-tlv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, ni-hi na-s-quo da-ge-tsi-so-tlv-ta-ni.  I-yu-no a-yv a-gi-ne-tsv u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, ni-hi na-s-quo i-tsi-ne-tsv dv-ni-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ni.

041521.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎡᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏅᏓᎨᏨᏁᎵ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏓᏆᏙᎥᎢ, ᏂᎬᏩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ.
041521.english: But all these things will they do unto you for my name's sake, because they know not him that sent me.
041521.phonetic: A-s-e-no na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv nv-da-ge-tsv-ne-li nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di da-qua-do-v-i, ni-gv-wa-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv.

041522.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᎩᎷᏨᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏥᏬᏁᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏱᎬᏩᏁᎮᎢ; ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏁᎭ ᎤᏄᏢᏙᏗ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
041522.english: If I had not come and spoken unto them, they had not had sin: but now they have no cloke for their sin.
041522.phonetic: I-yu-no na-gi-lu-tsv-na a-le ni-ga-tsi-wo-ne-ta-nv-na yi-ge-se-i, v-tla a-s-ga-ni yi-gv-wa-ne-he-i; go-hi-s-gi-ni v-tla yu-ne-ha u-nu-tlv-do-di u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

041523.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎩᏍᎦᎩ ᎠᏴ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᎨᏐ ᎡᏙᏓ.
041523.english: He that hateth me hateth my Father also.
041523.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-gi-s-ga-gi a-yv, na-s-quo a-s-ga-gi-yu ge-so E-do-da.

041524.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏂᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ ᎩᎶ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏱᎬᏩᏁᎮᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎪᎩᏂᎪᎲ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎩᏂᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎠᏴ ᎡᏙᏓᏃ.
041524.english: If I had not done among them the works which none other man did, they had not had sin: but now have they both seen and hated both me and my Father.
041524.phonetic: I-yu-no a-ne-hv ni-da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-na yi-ge-se-i gi-lo tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, v-tla a-s-ga-ni yi-gv-wa-ne-he-i; a-se-no hna-quo i-tsu-la go-gi-ni-go-hv a-le go-gi-ni-s-ga-gi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv i-tsu-la a-yv E-do-da-no.

041525.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ [ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ] ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏒ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ ᏧᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ; "ᎠᏎᏉ ᎬᎩᏍᎦᎬᎩ."
041525.english: But this cometh to pass, that the word might be fulfilled that is written in their law, They hated me without a cause.
041525.phonetic: A-se-no [na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi] u-do-hi-yu-di-yi a-ye-lv-sv u-li-ne-tsv hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la tsu-ni-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi; "A-se-quo gv-gi-s-ga-gv-gi."

041526.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏅᏓᏥᏅᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏅᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᎩᏃᎮᎵ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏋᏁᎵ.
041526.english: But when the Comforter is come, whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of truth, which proceedeth from the Father, he shall testify of me:
041526.phonetic: A-se-no a-da-nv-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi ga-lu-tsv-ha, na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi nv-da-tsi-nv-s-di tsi-gi ni-hi i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi, ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na A-da-nv-do a-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi nv-dv-da-le-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi dv-gi-no-he-li gv-ni-ge-sv nv-dv-quv-ne-li.

041527.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭᏰᏃ ᎢᏕᏓ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
041527.english: And ye also shall bear witness, because ye have been with me from the beginning.
041527.phonetic: Ni-hi-no na-s-quo i-tsi-no-he-s-gi ge-se-s-di, i-tsu-la-ha-ye-no i-de-da di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

041601.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸ, ᏗᏦᏕᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
041601.english: These things have I spoken unto you, that ye should not be offended.
041601.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-no-he-he-lv, di-tso-de-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

041602.cherokee: ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏓᏰᏥᏄᎪᏫᏏ; ᎥᎥ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ, ᎩᎶ ᎢᏥᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᏥᏯᏛᏁᎭ, ᎡᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
041602.english: They shall put you out of the synagogues: yea, the time cometh, that whosoever killeth you will think that he doeth God service.
041602.phonetic: Di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi da-ye-tsi-nu-go-wi-si; v-v, dv-s-qua-lv-hi, gi-lo i-tsi-hi-he-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-tsi-ya-dv-ne-ha, e-li-s-ge-s-di.

041603.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎬᎩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041603.english: And these things will they do unto you, because they have not known the Father, nor me.
041603.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a na-na-dv-ne-he-s-di nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le a-yv ni-gv-gi-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv-i.

041604.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏃᎲᏏ, ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲ ᎢᏣᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏉ ᏱᏨᏃᏁᎴᎢ, ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᏕᏙᎲ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
041604.english: But these things have I told you, that when the time shall come, ye may remember that I told you of them. And these things I said not unto you at the beginning, because I was with you.
041604.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-no-hv-si, a-s-qua-lv-hv i-tsa-nv-da-di-s-di-yi na-s-gi i-tsv-no-ne-lv-i.  A-le v-tla na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi-quo yi-tsv-no-ne-le-i, i-tsu-la-ha i-de-do-hv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi.

041605.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏅᏛᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᏬᎸ ᏫᏥᎦᏘ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᏳᏓᏑᏯ ᏯᏆᏛᏛᎲᏍᎦ, ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏪ; ᎭᏢ ᏫᎦᏘ?
041605.english: But now I go my way to him that sent me; and none of you asketh me, Whither goest thou?
041605.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nv-dv-gi-nv-si-dv tsu-wo-lv wi-tsi-ga-ti, v-tla-no gi-lo ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv yu-da-su-ya ya-qua-dv-dv-hv-s-ga, hi-a yi-ni-ga-we; Ha-tlv wi-ga-ti?

041606.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎧᎵᎸ ᎢᏥᎾᏫ.
041606.english: But because I have said these things unto you, sorrow hath filled your heart.
041606.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi ni-tsv-we-se-lv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, u-yo a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv u-ka-li-lv i-tsi-na-wi.

041607.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎭ; ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏨᏓᎨᏏ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏇᏅᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏓᏅᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎨᏥᎷᏥᏏ; ᏯᏇᏅᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏓᏥᏅᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ.
041607.english: Nevertheless I tell you the truth; It is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Comforter will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you.
041607.phonetic: A-se-no u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsv-no-ne-ha; o-si-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di tsv-da-ge-si; i-yu-ye-no na-que-nv-sv-na yi-gi, a-da-nv-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi v-tla yv-ge-tsi-lu-tsi-si; ya-que-nv-s-gi-ni nv-da-tsi-nv-s-di ge-se-s-di i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi.

041608.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏁᎵ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041608.english: And when he is come, he will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment:
041608.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ga-lu-tsv-ha gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-gv-ne-li e-lo-hi a-s-ga-ni ge-sv-i, a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, a-le di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv-i.

041609.english: Of sin, because they believe not on me;

041610.cherokee: ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᏙᏙᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ;
041610.english: Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more;
041610.phonetic: Du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, E-do-do-yi wi-tsi-ga-dv-i, a-le hna-quo ni-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di;

041611.cherokee: ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏣᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
041611.english: Of judgment, because the prince of this world is judged.
041611.phonetic: Di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv-i, u-gv-wi-yu-hi hi-a e-lo-hi u-tse-li-ga tsa-gu-go-da-ne-di ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

041612.cherokee: ᎠᏏ ᎤᏣᏔ ᎠᎩᎷᎳ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏛᎪᏗ ᏱᎩ;
041612.english: I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now.
041612.phonetic: A-si u-tsa-ta a-gi-lu-la go-hu-s-di i-tsv-no-ne-di, a-se-no go-hi ge-sv v-tla ye-li na-s-gi ge-tsa-dv-go-di yi-gi;

041613.cherokee: ᎦᎷᏨᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᏣᏘᏂᏙᎵ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏱᎧᏁᎨᏍᏗ, ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏁᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏓᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᏂ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041613.english: Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.
041613.phonetic: Ga-lu-tsv-ha-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na A-da-nv-do, ni-ga-v u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv do-da-tsa-ti-ni-do-li, v-tla-ye-no u-wa-sv-quo u-da-nv-te-dv yi-ka-ne-ge-s-di, ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni a-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi ka-ne-ge-s-di; A-le da-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-li tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-ni i-yu-li-s-ta-ni-da-s-di ge-sv-i.

041614.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᎩᎸᏉᏔᏂ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᏆᏤᎵᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏛᎩᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ.
041614.english: He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
041614.phonetic: Na-s-gi dv-gi-lv-quo-ta-ni a-yv, a-qua-tse-li-ye-no ge-sv dv-gi-si a-le da-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-li.

041615.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᎲ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏫ, ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒ ᏛᎩᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ.
041615.english: All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
041615.phonetic: Ni-ga-v A-ga-yv-li-ge u-hv a-qua-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-wi, a-qua-tse-li-ga ge-sv dv-gi-si a-le da-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-li.

041616.cherokee: ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎢᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏛᎢ.
041616.english: A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me, because I go to the Father.
041616.phonetic: Ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo hna-quo v-tla yi-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di; a-le hna-quo ta-li-ne ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo i-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi wi-tsi-ga-dv-i.

041617.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎦᏛᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎩᏪᏎᎭ; ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎢᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ?  ᎠᎴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏛᎢ?
041617.english: Then said some of his disciples among themselves, What is this that he saith unto us, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me: and, Because I go to the Father?
041617.phonetic: Hna-quo-no i-ga-dv gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do ga-dv-ga hi-a tsi-ni-gi-we-se-ha; Ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo hna-quo v-tla yi-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, a-le hna-quo ta-li-ne ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo i-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di?  a-le Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi wi-tsi-ga-dv-i?

041618.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎦᏛᎦ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᏣᏗᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᏲᏦᎵᎦ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏛᎬᎢ.
041618.english: They said therefore, What is this that he saith, A little while? we cannot tell what he saith.
041618.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi, Ga-do ga-dv-ga Ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo tsa-di-ha?  V-tla yo-tso-li-ga nu-s-dv ga-dv-gv-i.

041619.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎩ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᏕᏣᏓᏛᏛᎲᏍᎦ ᎦᏛᎬᎢ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎾᎩᏪᏒᎩ; ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎢᏍᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ?
041619.english: Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them, Do ye inquire among yourselves of that I said, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me?
041619.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no a-ga-ta-hv-gi u-na-du-li-s-gv gv-wa-dv-dv-di-yi, Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; tsi-go-de-tsa-da-dv-dv-hv-s-ga ga-dv-gv-i hi-a tsi-na-gi-we-sv-gi; ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo hna-quo v-tla yi-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di, a-le hna-quo ta-li-ne ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo i-s-gi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di?

041620.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏂᎯ ᏕᏥᏴᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏍᎪᏂᎮᏍᏗ, ᎡᎶᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ; ᏂᎯᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᏮᏛᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏔᏂ.
041620.english: Verily, verily, I say unto you, That ye shall weep and lament, but the world shall rejoice: and ye shall be sorrowful, but your sorrow shall be turned into joy.
041620.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; ni-hi de-tsi-yv-ge-s-di a-le i-tsi-s-go-ni-he-s-di, e-lo-hi-s-gi-ni a-li-he-li-ge-s-di; ni-hi-no u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di, a-se-no u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-dv u-li-he-li-s-di wv-dv-da-ne-tli-yv-s-ta-ni.

041621.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏣᏕᎲᏍᎪ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎡᎸ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏩ ᎠᏲᎵ, ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎪ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏛᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᏒᎶᎯ.
041621.english: A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the world.
041621.phonetic: A-ge-yv u-yo u-da-nv-do tsa-de-hv-s-go a-yo-li, u-s-qua-lv-e-lv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go-i; a-se-no hna-quo ga-na-nu-go-wa a-yo-li, v-tla hna-quo ya-nv-da-di-s-go e-hi-s-di u-da-nv-da-dv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go a-li-he-li-gv yv-wi u-na-nu-go-wi-sv sv-lo-hi.

041622.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏔ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏛᏨᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎾᏫ ᏛᎵᎮᎵᏥ, ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏴᎨᏥᎩᏏ.
041622.english: And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man taketh from you.
041622.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi go-hi ge-sv u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-ta; a-se-no ta-li-ne dv-tsv-go-i, a-le i-tsi-na-wi dv-li-he-li-tsi, i-tsa-li-he-li-gv-no v-tla gi-lo yv-ge-tsi-gi-si.

041623.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏍᎩᏯᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎡᏥᏔᏲᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎ ᎡᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
041623.english: And in that day ye shall ask me nothing. Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall ask the Father in my name, he will give it you.
041623.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no i-ga v-tla go-hu-s-di yi-s-gi-ya-dv-dv-hv-s-ge-s-di.  U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha; Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di A-ga-yv-li-ge e-tsi-ta-yo-se-he-s-di, da-qua-do-v i-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di, a-se e-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

041624.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏔᏲᏍᏔᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏉᏙᎥᎢ.  ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎭ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᎵᏃ, ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎤᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
041624.english: Hitherto have ye asked nothing in my name: ask, and ye shall receive, that your joy may be full.
041624.phonetic: Go-hi i-ya-s-di v-tla go-hu-s-di yi-tsi-ta-yo-s-ta-no a-yv da-quo-do-v-i.  I-tsi-ta-yo-ha da-ye-tsi-ne-li-no, i-tsa-li-he-li-gv u-ka-li-i-s-di-yi.

041625.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᎤᏦᏍᏗ ᎪᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏋᏔᏅ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏨᏯᎵᏃᎮᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏦᏍᏗ ᎪᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏗ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏓᏨᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
041625.english: These things have I spoken unto you in proverbs: but the time cometh, when I shall no more speak unto you in proverbs, but I shall shew you plainly of the Father.
041625.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-no-he-he-lv u-tso-s-di go-li-s-di-yi a-quv-ta-nv; a-se-no dv-s-qua-lv-hi hna-quo v-tla yi-tsv-ya-li-no-he-di-s-ge-s-di u-tso-s-di go-li-s-di-yi gv-di, gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu-s-gi-ni da-tsv-na-nu-go-wi-se-li A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

041626.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏓᏆᏙᎥ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏃ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏓᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏱᏨᏲᏎᎭ;
041626.english: At that day ye shall ask in my name: and I say not unto you, that I will pray the Father for you:
041626.phonetic: Na-hi-yu i-ga da-qua-do-v i-tsi-ta-yo-s-di-s-ge-s-di; v-tla-no A-ga-yv-li-ge da-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-li ni-hi i-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi yi-tsv-yo-se-ha;

041627.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᎭ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041627.english: For the Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me, and have believed that I came out from God.
041627.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no u-wa-sv i-tsi-ge-yu-ha, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i, a-le i-tso-hi-yu-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

041628.cherokee: ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏗᏆᏓᎴᏅ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎩᎷᏥᎸ; ᏔᎵᏁ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏛᎦᏓᏅᏏ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏮᏛᏥᎶᏏ.
041628.english: I came forth from the Father, and am come into the world: again, I leave the world, and go to the Father.
041628.phonetic: A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi di-qua-da-le-nv, e-lo-hi a-gi-lu-tsi-lv; ta-li-ne e-lo-hi dv-ga-da-nv-si, A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi wv-dv-tsi-lo-si.

041629.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ ᎯᏁᎦ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎤᏦᏍᏗ ᎪᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏁᎦ.
041629.english: His disciples said unto him, Lo, now speakest thou plainly, and speakest no proverb.
041629.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo hna-quo gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu hi-ne-ga, v-tla-no u-tso-s-di go-li-s-di-yi yi-ne-ga.

041630.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎯᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏨᏛᏛᎲᏍᎦ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎣᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041630.english: Now are we sure that thou knowest all things, and needest not that any man should ask thee: by this we believe that thou camest forth from God.
041630.phonetic: Hna-quo o-tsi-ga-ta-ha ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di hi-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv-i, a-le a-se-quo-quo ge-sv gi-lo yi-tsv-dv-dv-hv-s-ga.  Na-s-gi u-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha o-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi nv-da-tsa-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

041631.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ?
041631.english: Jesus answered them, Do ye now believe?
041631.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go hna-quo i-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga?

041632.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ, ᎥᎥ, ᎿᎭᏉᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ, ᎢᏣᏗᎦᎴᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏙᏗᏤᏅᏒ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏍᎩᏴᏕᏥ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏋᎡ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏰᏃ ᏔᎵ ᏅᏛᏗᏕᎦ.
041632.english: Behold, the hour cometh, yea, is now come, that ye shall be scattered, every man to his own, and shall leave me alone: and yet I am not alone, because the Father is with me.
041632.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo dv-s-qua-lv-hi, v-v, hna-quo-u-s-qua-lv-hv, i-tsa-di-ga-le-yo-i-s-di-yi, ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha do-di-tse-nv-sv i-di-tlv, a-le da-s-gi-yv-de-tsi a-quv-sv-quo ge-se-s-di; v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-quv-e yi-gi, A-ga-yv-li-ge-ye-no ta-li nv-dv-di-de-ga.

041633.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏨᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ.  ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏓᏥᏩᏛᎯ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗᏉ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ; ᎠᏴ ᏥᏎᎪᎩᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ.
041633.english: These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the world ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the world.
041633.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-s-di hi-a i-tsv-no-he-he-lv a-yv nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsv-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-do-di-yi.  E-lo-hi u-de-ya-do-di da-tsi-wa-dv-hi; a-se-no u-ga-li-s-di-quo i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di; a-yv tsi-se-go-gi-sv e-lo-hi.

041701.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏌᎳᏓᏅᎩ ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏫᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲ; ᎯᎸᏉᏓ ᏤᏥ, ᏤᏥ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏣᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ.
041701.english: These words spake Jesus, and lifted up his eyes to heaven, and said, Father, the hour is come; glorify thy Son, that thy Son also may glorify thee:
041701.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-we-sv-gi Tsi-sa, a-le du-sa-la-da-nv-gi di-ga-do-li ga-lv-la-di wi-du-ka-hna-nv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; E-do-da, hna-quo u-s-qua-lv-hv; hi-lv-quo-da Tse-tsi, Tse-tsi na-s-quo ni-hi tsa-lv-quo-do-di-yi.

041702.cherokee: ᎯᏯᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ, ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏖᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041702.english: As thou hast given him power over all flesh, that he should give eternal life to as many as thou hast given him.
041702.phonetic: Hi-ya-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-ye-no ni-ga-v u-que-da-li, tsu-ne-di-yi na-li-s-qua-di-s-gv-na gv-ni-dv na-ni-v te-ka-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

041703.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎾᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎾ-ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᏨᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎯᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᎩ.
041703.english: And this is life eternal, that they might know thee the only true God, and Jesus Christ, whom thou hast sent.
041703.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi nu-s-di gv-ni-dv na-li-s-qua-di-s-gv-na--na-s-gi ge-tsa-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi ni-hi tsv-sv-hi-yu u-do-hi-yu-sv Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le u-ni-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-gi na hi-nv-si-dv tsi-gi.

041704.cherokee: ᎬᎸᏉᏔᏅ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏍᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
041704.english: I have glorified thee on the earth: I have finished the work which thou gavest me to do.
041704.phonetic: Gv-lv-quo-ta-nv e-lo-hi; a-gi-s-qua-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di s-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi.

041705.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ, ᏂᎯ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᏍᎩᎸᏉᏓ ᏨᏒ ᏗᏦᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᏗᏦᎸ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎾᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
041705.english: And now, O Father, glorify thou me with thine own self with the glory which I had with thee before the world was.
041705.phonetic: Hna-quo-no, ni-hi E-do-da, s-gi-lv-quo-da tsv-sv di-tso-lv-i, na-s-gi-ya v-gi-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-ge-sv-gi di-tso-lv a-si-quo ni-gv-na-dv na-da-le-ni-s-gv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi.

041706.cherokee: ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏔᏑᏰᏛ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.  ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏅ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ.
041706.english: I have manifested thy name unto the men which thou gavest me out of the world: thine they were, and thou gavest them me; and they have kept thy word.
041706.phonetic: De-tsa-do-v gv-ni-ge-sv ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv a-ni-s-ga-ya e-lo-hi ta-su-ye-dv di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi.  Di-tsa-tse-li-ga ge-sv-gi, a-le de-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-gi; a-le u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-ta-nv ka-no-he-dv tsa-tse-li-ga.

041707.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏍᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᎲᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041707.english: Now they have known that all things whatsoever thou hast given me are of thee.
041707.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ni-ga-ta-hi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv, ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di s-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, ni-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-hv-hi ge-sv-i.

041708.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏁᎸᏰᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎾᏓᏂᎸᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏂᎯ ᏖᎲ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏅ ᏂᎯ ᏅᏓᏍᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041708.english: For I have given unto them the words which thou gavest me; and they have received them, and have known surely that I came out from thee, and they have believed that thou didst send me.
041708.phonetic: De-tsi-ne-lv-ye-no ka-no-he-dv na-s-gi s-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi; a-le na-s-gi du-na-da-ni-lv-tsv, a-le u-ni-ga-do-v-sv u-do-hi-yu-sv ni-hi te-hv nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i; a-le u-no-hi-yu-nv ni-hi nv-da-s-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i.

041709.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ; ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏱᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ.
041709.english: I pray for them: I pray not for the world, but for them which thou hast given me; for they are thine.
041709.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha; v-tla e-lo-hi yi-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha, na-s-gi-quo-s-gi-ni na di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi; ni-hi-ye-no di-tsa-tse-li-ga.

041710.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏗᎭ.
041710.english: And all mine are thine, and thine are mine; and I am glorified in them.
041710.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-no a-qua-tse-li-ga ni-hi tsa-tse-li-ga, ni-hi-no tsa-tse-li-ga a-yv a-qua-tse-li-ga; a-le na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-gi-lv-quo-di-ha.

041711.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏱᎨᎠ, ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎭ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᏗᏦᎸ ᏫᏥᎦᏘ.  ᎡᏣᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᏨᏒ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᎯᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕᏍᏗ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ, ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏴᏃ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏥᎩ.
041711.english: And now I am no more in the world, but these are in the world, and I come to thee. Holy Father, keep through thine own name those whom thou hast given me, that they may be one, as we are.
041711.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-yv v-tla e-lo-hi yi-ge-a, hi-a-s-gi-ni e-lo-hi a-ne-ha, a-yv-no di-tso-lv wi-tsi-ga-ti.  E-tsa-lv-quo-di-yu E-do-da, tsv-sv de-tsa-do-v hv-di-s-ge-s-di de-hi-s-qua-ni-go-de-s-di di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi, sa-quo-quo i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya ni-hi a-yv-no sa-quo-quo tsi-gi.

041712.cherokee: ᎠᏏ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᎦᏥᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ, ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᏕᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏛᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎦᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏳᏲᎱᏒ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
041712.english: While I was with them in the world, I kept them in thy name: those that thou gavest me I have kept, and none of them is lost, but the son of perdition; that the scripture might be fulfilled.
041712.phonetic: A-si e-lo-hi tsi-ga-tsi-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi, de-tsa-do-v de-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-do-dv-gi; na-s-gi di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi ga-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-ta-nv, a-le v-tla a-si-yv-wi yu-yo-hu-sv na u-wa-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di u-we-tsi, u-do-hi-yu-di-yi go-we-lv-i.

041713.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏗᏦᎸ ᏫᏥᎦᏘ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎠ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎬᏉᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎤᏂᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
041713.english: And now come I to thee; and these things I speak in the world, that they might have my joy fulfilled in themselves.
041713.phonetic: Hna-quo-no di-tso-lv wi-tsi-ga-ti, na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-tsi-we-a a-ni e-lo-hi, gv-quo-li-he-li-gv u-ni-ka-li-i-s-di-yi u-na-da-nv-dv-i.

041714.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏁᎸ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ; ᎡᎶᎯᏃ ᏗᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
041714.english: I have given them thy word; and the world hath hated them, because they are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.
041714.phonetic: De-tsi-ne-lv ka-no-he-dv tsa-tse-li-ga; e-lo-hi-no di-s-ga-gi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv, e-lo-hi a-ne-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi-ya a-yv e-lo-hi ge-i ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

041715.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏗᎧᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏥᏔᏲᎯᎭ, ᏘᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᏗᏱᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041715.english: I pray not that thou shouldest take them out of the world, but that thou shouldest keep them from the evil.
041715.phonetic: V-tla e-lo-hi di-ka-hv-s-di-yi yi-tsi-ta-yo-hi-ha, ti-yo-s-do-da-ne-di-yi-quo-s-gi-ni u-yo ge-sv-i.

041716.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
041716.english: They are not of the world, even as I am not of the world.
041716.phonetic: V-tla e-lo-hi a-ne-hi yi-gi, na-s-gi-ya a-yv e-lo-hi ge-i ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

041717.cherokee: ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᏖᏅᎦᎸᏓ; ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
041717.english: Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word is truth.
041717.phonetic: Ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsa-tse-li-ga te-nv-ga-lv-da; ka-no-he-dv tsa-tse-li-ga na-s-gi ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

041718.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏍᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎦᏥᏅᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ.
041718.english: As thou hast sent me into the world, even so have I also sent them into the world.
041718.phonetic: Ni-hi e-lo-hi a-gi-lu-hi-s-di-yi s-gi-nv-si-dv tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv e-lo-hi ga-tsi-nv-li na-s-gi.

041719.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎦᏓᏅᎦᎵᎠ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᎾᎿᎭᏅᎦᎸᏙᏗᏱ.
041719.english: And for their sakes I sanctify myself, that they also might be sanctified through the truth.
041719.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ga-da-nv-ga-li-a, na-s-quo u-nv-sv ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na u-na-hna-nv-ga-lv-do-di-yi.

041720.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠᏉ Ꮎ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏱᎦᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬ ᎬᏉᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ;
041720.english: Neither pray I for these alone, but for them also which shall believe on me through their word;
041720.phonetic: A-le v-tla hi-a-quo na u-nv-sv yi-ga-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni na a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv gv-quo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi ga-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-ha;

041721.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏙᏓ ᏥᏍᎩᏯᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏥᎬᏯᎠ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᏅᏓᏍᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041721.english: That they all may be one; as thou, Father, art in me, and I in thee, that they also may be one in us: that the world may believe that thou hast sent me.
041721.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-ga-dv sa-quo-quo i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya ni-hi E-do-da tsi-s-gi-ya-a, a-le a-yv tsi-gv-ya-a, na-s-gi na-s-quo sa-quo-quo i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi; na-s-gi-no e-lo-hi u-wo-hi-yu-di-yi ni-hi nv-da-s-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i.

041722.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏁᎸ, ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏴᏃ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏥᎩ;
041722.english: And the glory which thou gavest me I have given them; that they may be one, even as we are one:
041722.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi v-gi-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv ni-hi s-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi ga-tsi-ne-lv, sa-quo i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya ni-hi a-yv-no sa-quo-quo tsi-gi;

041723.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏳᎪᏗᏯ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᏍᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏘᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏥᎩ.
041723.english: I in them, and thou in me, that they may be made perfect in one; and that the world may know that thou hast sent me, and hast loved them, as thou hast loved me.
041723.phonetic: A-yv na-s-gi ga-tsi-ya-v-i, a-le ni-hi a-yv s-gi-ya-v-i, na-s-gi tsu-yu-go-di-ya sa-quo-quo i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi-no e-lo-hi u-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi nv-da-s-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi ti-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu tsi-gi.

041724.cherokee: ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎠᏆᏚᎵ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᏴ ᎨᎥᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᎦᏕᏗᏱ, -ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏂᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎥᎩᎸᏉᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎠᏏ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎾᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
041724.english: Father, I will that they also, whom thou hast given me, be with me where I am; that they may behold my glory, which thou hast given me: for thou lovedst me before the foundation of the world.
041724.phonetic: E-do-da, a-qua-du-li na-s-quo di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi a-yv ge-v-i na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha o-ga-de-di-yi, ---na-s-gi-no u-ni-go-wa-dv-di-yi v-gi-lv-quo-dv-i, na-s-gi s-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi; s-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu-ye-no ge-sv-gi a-si e-lo-hi na-da-le-ni-s-gv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi.

041725.cherokee: ᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᎡᏙᏓ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏣᎦᏔᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᏔᎯᏳ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᏍᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041725.english: O righteous Father, the world hath not known thee: but I have known thee, and these have known that thou hast sent me.
041725.phonetic: Tsa-da-nv-ti E-do-da, e-lo-hi v-tla tsa-ga-ta-hi yi-gi, a-yv-s-gi-ni gv-wa-ta-hi-yu, a-le hi-a a-ni-ga-ta-hi-yu s-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i.

041726.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏃ ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎦᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᏓᎦᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ, ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᎢ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
041726.english: And I have declared unto them thy name, and will declare it: that the love wherewith thou hast loved me may be in them, and I in them.
041726.phonetic: A-yv-no de-tsa-do-v ga-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv, a-le a-se da-ga-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-li, u-ne-la-di-s-do-di-yi a-yv s-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i, a-le a-yv na-s-gi ga-tsi-ya-i i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

041801.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏚᏘᏅᏒᎩ, ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᏚᏪᏐᏨᎩ ᎩᏠᏂ ᎤᏪᏴᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏫᏒᏗᏱ ᎪᏢᏒᎩ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏴᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.
041801.english: When Jesus had spoken these words, he went forth with his disciples over the brook Cedron, where was a garden, into the which he entered, and his disciples.
041801.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a Tsi-sa nu-we-sv, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi du-ti-nv-sv-gi, u-nu-go-tsv-gi du-we-so-tsv-gi Gi-tlo-ni u-we-yv-i, na-hna a-wi-sv-di-yi go-tlv-sv-gi, na-hna u-yv-lv-gi, a-le na-s-quo gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.

041802.cherokee: ᏧᏓᏏᏃ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᏥᏌᏰᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏂᎳᏫᎬᎩ.
041802.english: And Judas also, which betrayed him, knew the place: for Jesus ofttimes resorted thither with his disciples.
041802.phonetic: Tsu-da-si-no u-tlu-di-s-gi na-s-quo a-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv-gi na-hna-ni, Tsi-sa-ye-no a-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ya-no-gi-yu na-hna da-ni-la-wi-gv-gi.

041803.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏧᏓᏏ ᏚᏘᏁᏅ ᏑᎾᏓᏡᎩ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ, ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏉᎵᏏ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᏓᏂᏁᎲᎩ ᏗᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙᎢ.
041803.english: Judas then, having received a band of men and officers from the chief priests and Pharisees, cometh thither with lanterns and torches and weapons.
041803.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsu-da-si du-ti-ne-nv su-na-da-tlu-gi a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi, a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi, nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le A-ni-quo-li-si nv-da-yu-na-da-le-nv-hi, na-hna u-lu-tsv-gi, da-ni-ne-hv-gi di-tsv-s-do-di a-le di-li-s-ga-s-do-do-i.

041804.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏪᏅᏒᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᎪ ᎡᏥᏲᎭ?
041804.english: Jesus therefore, knowing all things that should come upon him, went forth, and said unto them, Whom seek ye?
041804.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no a-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-v i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, u-we-nv-sv-gi hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-go e-tsi-yo-ha?

041805.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ.  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ.  ᏧᏓᏏᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥᎢ.
041805.english: They answered him, Jesus of Nazareth. Jesus saith unto them, I am he. And Judas also, which betrayed him, stood with them.
041805.phonetic: Hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi.  Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; A-yv na-s-gi.  Tsu-da-si-no na-s-gi u-tlu-di-s-gi na-s-quo ga-do-gv-gi a-ni-do-na-v-i.

041806.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᏚᏬᏎᎸ, ᎤᎾᏏᏅᏒᎩ, ᎡᎳᏗ ᏫᏚᏂᏅᏨᎩ.
041806.english: As soon then as he had said unto them, I am he, they went backward, and fell to the ground.
041806.phonetic: Hna-quo-no, A-yv na-s-gi, du-wo-se-lv, u-na-si-nv-sv-gi, e-la-di wi-du-ni-nv-tsv-gi.

041807.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏙᎤᏛᏛᏅᎩ, ᎦᎪ ᎡᏥᏲᎭ?  ᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎯᎠᏃ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ.
041807.english: Then asked he them again, Whom seek ye? And they said, Jesus of Nazareth.
041807.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ta-li-ne do-u-dv-dv-nv-gi, Ga-go e-tsi-yo-ha?  Du-we-se-lv-gi hi-a-no nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi.

041808.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏲᎮᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏩᎾᏓᏅᎾ;
041808.english: Jesus answered, I have told you that I am he: if therefore ye seek me, let these go their way:
041808.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi, Ga-yu-la i-tsv-no-ne-lv a-yv na-s-gi ge-sv-i.  I-yu-no a-yv s-gi-yo-he-s-di, hi-a u-na-ne-la-gi wa-na-da-nv-na;

041809.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ; "ᏗᏍᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏍᎩᏲᎱᏎᎸ."
041809.english: That the saying might be fulfilled, which he spake, Of them which thou gavest me have I lost none.
041809.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-di-yi u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-sv-i; "Di-s-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi v-tla a-si-yv-wi s-gi-yo-hu-se-lv."

041810.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏌᏩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎦᏁᎲᎢ, ᎤᎸᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎷᏴᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎦᎴᏂ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᏍᏔᏅᎩ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎹᎵᎦ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ.
041810.english: Then Simon Peter having a sword drew it, and smote the high priest's servant, and cut off his right ear. The servant's name was Malchus.
041810.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Sa-wa-ni Qui-da a-ye-la-s-di-ga-nv-hi-dv ga-ne-hv-i, u-lv-hv-gi, a-le u-lu-yv-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le na-s-gi a-ga-ti-si ga-le-ni u-li-s-de-s-ta-nv-gi.  Na-s-gi a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di Ma-li-ga tsu-do-i-dv ge-sv-gi.

041811.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏈᏓ; ᏥᎯᎳᏓ ᏣᏤᎵ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎦᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎡᏙᏓ ᎠᎩᏁᎸᎯ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏴᏓᎦᏗᏔᎯ?
041811.english: Then said Jesus unto Peter, Put up thy sword into the sheath: the cup which my Father hath given me, shall I not drink it?
041811.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi Qui-da; Tsi-hi-la-da tsa-tse-li a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv ga-la-di-s-di-yi; u-li-s-qui-di e-do-da a-gi-ne-lv-hi, tla-s-go Yv-da-ga-di-ta-hi?

041812.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏑᎾᏓᏡᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᏗᏘᏂᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᏂᏁᏤᎸᎯ, ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎸᎸᎩ.
041812.english: Then the band and the captain and officers of the Jews took Jesus, and bound him,
041812.phonetic: Hna-quo-no su-na-da-tlu-gi, a-le a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi di-ti-ni-do-hi, a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi A-ni-tsu-si tsu-ni-ne-tse-lv-hi, gv-wa-ni-yv-hv-gi Tsi-sa, a-le gv-wa-lv-lv-gi.

041813.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᎾ ᏧᏬᎸᎢ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏫᎬᏩᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎧᏱᏆ ᎤᎿᎭᏥᏴᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏘᏴᏌᏗᏒᎢ.
041813.english: And led him away to Annas first; for he was father in law to Caiaphas, which was the high priest that same year.
041813.phonetic: A-le E-na tsu-wo-lv-i i-gv-yi wi-gv-wa-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no Ka-yi-qua u-hna-tsi-yv-gi, a-le na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ge-sv-gi na-hi-yu u-de-ti-yv-sa-di-sv-i.

041814.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎧᏱᏆ ᏥᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎤᏟ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏱᏚᏲᎱᎯᎭᎸ ᏴᏫ.
041814.english: Now Caiaphas was he, which gave counsel to the Jews, that it was expedient that one man should die for the people.
041814.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a Ka-yi-qua tsi-du-ne-tse-le A-ni-tsu-si, hi-a tsi-ni-du-we-se-le-i; u-tli o-si-yu i-ga-li-s-da-ne-di a-si-yv-wi yi-du-yo-hu-hi-ha-lv yv-wi.

041815.cherokee: ᏌᏩᏂᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᎦᏔᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎢᏧᎳᎭᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏂᏴᎸᎩ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ.
041815.english: And Simon Peter followed Jesus, and so did another disciple: that disciple was known unto the high priest, and went in with Jesus into the palace of the high priest.
041815.phonetic: Sa-wa-ni-no Qui-da u-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi Tsi-sa, a-le na-s-quo nv-wa-da-le a-da-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.  Na-s-gi a-da-s-da-wa-di-do-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-ga-ta-hi ge-sv-gi; i-tsu-la-ha-no Tsi-sa u-ni-yv-lv-gi u-dla-nv-dv-i nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ga-ne-lv-i.

041816.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏍᎩᏂ ᏙᏱᏗᏢᏉ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎴᏅᎩ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏐᎢ ᎠᏓᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᎦᏔᎯ, ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᏭᎵᏃᎮᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏛ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏘᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏴᏔᏅᎩ ᏈᏓ.
041816.english: But Peter stood at the door without. Then went out that other disciple, which was known unto the high priest, and spake unto her that kept the door, and brought in Peter.
041816.phonetic: Qui-da-s-gi-ni do-yi-di-tlv-quo ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi u-le-nv-gi.  Hna-quo-no na-s-gi na so-i a-da-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-ga-ta-hi, u-nu-go-tsv-gi, wu-li-no-he-ta-nv-gi a-dv ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-ga-ti-ya, a-le u-yv-ta-nv-gi Qui-da.

041817.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏛ, ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏘᏯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸ ᏈᏓ; ᏂᎯᎧ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎯᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ?  ᎥᏝ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
041817.english: Then saith the damsel that kept the door unto Peter, Art not thou also one of this man's disciples? He saith, I am not.
041817.phonetic: Hna-quo-no na-s-gi a-dv, ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-ga-ti-ya, hi-a nu-we-se-lv Qui-da; Ni-hi-ka na-s-quo hi-a a-s-ga-ya hi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi?  V-tla, u-dv-nv-gi.

041818.cherokee: ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎾᏙᎾᎥᎩ, ᎧᏃᏍᎦ ᎤᏃᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, -ᎤᏴᏢᎩᏰᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎦᎾᏬᏍᎬᎩ.  ᏈᏓᏃ ᎨᎸᎩ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎾᏬᏍᎬᎩ.
041818.english: And the servants and officers stood there, who had made a fire of coals; for it was cold: and they warmed themselves: and Peter stood with them, and warmed himself.
041818.phonetic: Ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di-no a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi na-hna a-na-do-na-v-gi, ka-no-s-ga u-no-do-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-gi, ---u-yv-tlv-gi-ye-no, a-le u-ni-ga-na-wo-s-gv-gi.  Qui-da-no ge-lv-gi ga-do-gv-gi a-le u-ga-na-wo-s-gv-gi.

041819.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏛᏛᏅᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
041819.english: The high priest then asked Jesus of his disciples, and of his doctrine.
041819.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-dv-dv-nv-gi Tsi-sa, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi a-le nu-s-dv da-de-yo-hv-s-gv u-gv-wa-li.

041820.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎦᏥᏬᏁᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ; ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᏕᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏧᏂᎳᏫᏦᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏕᎵᏛᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.
041820.english: Jesus answered him, I spake openly to the world; I ever taught in the synagogue, and in the temple, whither the Jews always resort; and in secret have I said nothing.
041820.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-ge-sv ga-tsi-wo-ne-di-s-gv-gi e-lo-hi; ya-no-gi-yu de-ga-de-yo-hv-s-gv di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv-i, a-le u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, na-hna A-ni-tsu-si ni-go-hi-lv tsu-ni-la-wi-tso-hi-s-di-yi tsi-gi, u-de-li-dv-no v-tla go-hu-s-di a-qua-dv-nv-hi yi-gi.

041821.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏍᏆᏛᏛᎲᏍᎦ?  ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏔᏛᏛᎲᎦ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏥᏪᏎᎸᎢ.  ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᎩᏪᏒᎢ.
041821.english: Why askest thou me? ask them which heard me, what I have said unto them: behold, they know what I said.
041821.phonetic: Ga-do-no a-yv i-s-qua-dv-dv-hv-s-ga?  Na-s-gi na ta-dv-dv-hv-ga u-na-dv-ga-nv-hi na-s-gi ni-ga-tsi-we-se-lv-i.  Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni-ga-ta-ha na-gi-we-sv-i.

041822.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏗᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎾᎥ ᎦᏙᎩ ᎤᏏᏛᏂᎸᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎪ ᏂᏪᏎ ᎯᏁᏤᎭ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ?
041822.english: And when he had thus spoken, one of the officers which stood by struck Jesus with the palm of his hand, saying, Answerest thou the high priest so?
041822.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-we-sv, a-si-yv-wi di-da-ni-yi-s-gi na-v ga-do-gi u-si-dv-ni-lv-gi Tsi-sa, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Na-s-gi-s-go ni-we-se hi-ne-tse-ha nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi?

041823.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎠᎩᏁᏤᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎦᏔᎯ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎠᎩᏁᏨᎢ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᎩᏁᏤᏍᏗ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᏥᏍᏋᏂᎭ?
041823.english: Jesus answered him, If I have spoken evil, bear witness of the evil: but if well, why smitest thou me?
041823.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no u-so-nv a-gi-ne-tse-s-di, na-s-gi hi-ga-ta-hi wi-ni-ga-li-s-da u-so-nv a-gi-ne-tsv-i; i-yu-s-gi-ni o-si-yu a-gi-ne-tse-s-di, ga-do-no tsi-s-quv-ni-ha?

041824.cherokee: ᎡᎾᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎠᎦᎸᎢᏛ ᎠᎦᏘᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎧᏱᏆ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᏧᏪᏅᏒᎢ.
041824.english: Now Annas had sent him bound unto Caiaphas the high priest.
041824.phonetic: E-na-ye-no u-ne-tsv-hi ge-sv-gi a-ga-lv-i-dv a-ga-ti-nv-s-di-yi Ka-yi-qua nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi tsu-we-nv-sv-i.

041825.cherokee: ᏌᏩᏂᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ ᎤᎦᎾᏬᏍᎬᎩ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏂᎯᎧ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎯᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ?  ᎤᏓᏱᎸᎩ, ᎥᏝ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
041825.english: And Simon Peter stood and warmed himself. They said therefore unto him, Art not thou also one of his disciples? He denied it, and said, I am not.
041825.phonetic: Sa-wa-ni-no Qui-da ga-do-gv-gi u-ga-na-wo-s-gv-gi.  Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Ni-hi-ka na-s-quo hi-a hi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi?  U-da-yi-lv-gi, V-tla, u-dv-nv-gi.

041826.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᎾ ᏈᏓ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᏒᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᎬᎪᎡ ᏥᏍᏕᏙᎲᎩ ᎠᏫᏒᏗᏱ?
041826.english: One of the servants of the high priest, being his kinsman whose ear Peter cut off, saith, Did not I see thee in the garden with him?
041826.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, go-hu-s-di u-wa-na Qui-da u-li-s-de-sv-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tla-s-go yi-gv-go-e tsi-s-de-do-hv-gi a-wi-sv-di-yi?

041827.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏓᏱᎸᎩ.  ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏣᏔᎦ ᎤᏴᎳᏒᎩ.
041827.english: Peter then denied again: and immediately the cock crew.
041827.phonetic: Qui-da-no ta-li-ne u-da-yi-lv-gi.  Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv tsa-ta-ga u-yv-la-sv-gi.

041828.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉ ᎧᏱᏆ ᎦᏁᎸ ᎤᎾᏘᎿᎭᏫᏛᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏭᎾᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏑᎾᎴ ᎨᏒᎩ.  ᎤᏅᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏳᏁᏅᏎᎢ, ᎦᏓᎭ ᏱᏃᏣᎵᏍᏓ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎬᎩ, ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏒᎩ.
041828.english: Then led they Jesus from Caiaphas unto the hall of judgment: and it was early; and they themselves went not into the judgment hall, lest they should be defiled; but that they might eat the passover.
041828.phonetic: Hna-quo Ka-yi-qua ga-ne-lv u-na-ti-hna-wi-dv-hv-gi Tsi-sa, di-gu-go-do-di-yi wu-na-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi; a-le su-na-le ge-sv-gi.  U-nv-sv-s-gi-ni v-tla di-gu-go-do-di-yi yu-ne-nv-se-i, ga-da-ha yi-no-tsa-li-s-da a-ne-li-s-gv-gi, ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi tsu-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi u-ni-ye-lv-sv-gi.

041829.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᏓᏳᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎡᏧᎢᏍᏗᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ?
041829.english: Pilate then went out unto them, and said, What accusation bring ye against this man?
041829.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no da-yu-nu-go-tsv-gi a-ni-do-na-v u-lu-tsv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ga-do e-tsu-i-s-di-ha hi-a a-s-ga-ya?

041830.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎨᏨᏲᎯᏎᎴᎢ.
041830.english: They answered and said unto him, If he were not a malefactor, we would not have delivered him up unto thee.
041830.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv-gi hi-a u-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; I-yu-no u-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ni-ge-sv-na yi-ge-se-i v-tla yi-do-ge-tsv-yo-hi-se-le-i.

041831.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎡᏣᏘᎿᎭᏫᏛ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏓ ᎡᏥᏱᎵᏓ.  ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᎵᏁᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎣᏥᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
041831.english: Then said Pilate unto them, Take ye him, and judge him according to your law. The Jews therefore said unto him, It is not lawful for us to put any man to death:
041831.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; E-tsa-ti-hna-wi-dv, i-tsv-sv di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-tsv-da e-tsi-yi-li-da.  Hna-quo-no A-ni-tsu-si hi-a nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla u-li-ne-tsv-hi yi-gi yv-wi o-tsi-hi-s-di-yi.

041832.cherokee: [ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ] ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ, ᎦᏛᎬ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
041832.english: That the saying of Jesus might be fulfilled, which he spake, signifying what death he should die.
041832.phonetic: [Na-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi] u-do-hi-yu-di-yi Tsi-sa u-ne-tsv-i, ga-dv-gv i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di-yi u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi.

041833.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏱ ᎤᏴᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏭᏯᏅᎲᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ?
041833.english: Then Pilate entered into the judgment hall again, and called Jesus, and said unto him, Art thou the King of the Jews?
041833.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di ta-li-ne di-gu-go-di-yi u-yv-lv-gi, a-le Tsi-sa wu-ya-nv-hv-gi, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi, Ni-hi-s-go Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga?

041834.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᏨᏒ ᏣᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏪᎠ, ᎩᎶᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏃᎮᎮᎴᎢ?
041834.english: Jesus answered him, Sayest thou this thing of thyself, or did others tell it thee of me?
041834.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsi-go tsv-sv tsa-da-nv-te-dv na-s-gi tsi-ni-we-a, gi-lo-ge na-s-gi ge-tsa-no-he-he-le-i?

041835.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏥᎪ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏧᏏ?  ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏕᎨᏣᏲᏒ ᎦᏙ ᏣᏛᏁᎸ.
041835.english: Pilate answered, Am I a Jew? Thine own nation and the chief priests have delivered thee unto me: what hast thou done?
041835.phonetic: Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tsi-go a-yv Tsi-tsu-si?  Di-tsa-tse-li-ga yv-wi, a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi de-ge-tsa-yo-sv ga-do tsa-dv-ne-lv.

041836.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᏱᎩ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᏗᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᏱᏚᎾᏟᏴᎮᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏗᎨᏥᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᏳᏁᎵᏎᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041836.english: Jesus answered, My kingdom is not of this world: if my kingdom were of this world, then would my servants fight, that I should not be delivered to the Jews: but now is my kingdom not from hence.
041836.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; A-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv v-tla a-ni e-lo-hi e-hi yi-gi.  I-yu-no a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv a-ni e-lo-hi e-hi yi-ge-se-i, di-qua-tse-li-ga yi-du-na-tli-yv-he-i, tle-s-di A-ni-tsu-si di-ge-tsi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, yu-ne-li-se-i.  A-se-no v-tla a-ni u-da-le-nv-hi yi-gi a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

041837.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᎧᏂ?  ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏰᎵ ᏂᏫ, ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ.  ᏥᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏕᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸᎩ.  ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᏂᎨᏳᎯ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎪ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ.
041837.english: Pilate therefore said unto him, Art thou a king then? Jesus answered, Thou sayest that I am a king. To this end was I born, and for this cause came I into the world, that I should bear witness unto the truth. Every one that is of the truth heareth my voice.
041837.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-ka-ni?  Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Ye-li ni-wi, a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no a-yv.  Tsi-no-he-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-sv i-ya-qua-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-qua-de-nv-gi, a-le na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi e-lo-hi a-gi-na-nu-go-tsi-lv-gi.  Na-ni-v u-do-hi-yu-sv u-ni-ge-yu-hi a-na-dv-gi-s-go tsi-ne-gv-i.

041838.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥ ᏭᎶᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏘᎭ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
041838.english: Pilate saith unto him, What is truth? And when he had said this, he went out again unto the Jews, and saith unto them, I find in him no fault at all.
041838.phonetic: Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Ga-do u-s-di u-do-hi-yu-sv ge-sv-i?  Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-sv, ta-li-ne u-nu-go-tsv-gi A-ni-tsu-si a-ni-do-na-v wu-lo-sv-gi, a-le hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla yi-tsi-wa-ti-ha u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

041839.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎭ, ᏗᏨᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᏗᏨᏲᏎᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ?
041839.english: But ye have a custom, that I should release unto you one at the passover: will ye therefore that I release unto you the King of the Jews?
041839.phonetic: A-se-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-tsi-ha, di-tsv-yo-hi-se-di-yi a-si-yv-wi ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-s-qua-li-s-gv i-yu-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsa-du-li-s-go di-tsv-yo-se-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga?

041840.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᏆᎳᏆᏍᎩᏂ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏆᎳᏆ ᎠᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎩ.
041840.english: Then cried they all again, saying, Not this man, but Barabbas. Now Barabbas was a robber.
041840.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ni-ga-dv ta-li-ne u-ne-lu-nv-gi, Hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; v-tla-s-di hi-a a-s-ga-ya, Qua-la-qua-s-gi-ni.  Na-s-gi Qua-la-qua a-da-na-sa-hv-s-gi ge-sv-gi.

041901.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎤᏂᏴᎲᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎥᏂᎸᎩ.
041901.english: Then Pilate therefore took Jesus, and scourged him.
041901.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di u-ni-yv-hv-gi Tsi-sa a-le u-li-v-ni-lv-gi.

041902.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏂᏍᏕᏲᎸ ᏧᏣᏲᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᎤᏃᏢᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏚᎳᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎦᎨ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎬᏩᏄᏬᎥᎩ,
041902.english: And the soldiers platted a crown of thorns, and put it on his head, and they put on him a purple robe,
041902.phonetic: A-ni-ya-wi-s-gi-no u-ni-s-de-yo-lv tsu-tsa-yo-s-di a-li-s-du-lo u-no-tlv-nv-gi a-le gv-wa-s-du-la-nv-gi, a-le gi-ga-ge a-nu-wo gv-wa-nu-wo-v-gi,

041903.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏨᏲᎵᎦ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.  ᎠᎴ ᏕᎬᏩᏏᏛᏂᎸᎩ.
041903.english: And said, Hail, King of the Jews! and they smote him with their hands.
041903.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; I-tsv-yo-li-ga Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga.  A-le de-gv-wa-si-dv-ni-lv-gi.

041904.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎢᏨᎾᏄᎪᏫᏏ, ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎾᎩᏩᏛᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
041904.english: Pilate therefore went forth again, and saith unto them, Behold, I bring him forth to you, that ye may know that I find no fault in him.
041904.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di ta-li-ne u-nu-go-tsv-gi, hi-a wi-ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo i-tsv-na-nu-go-wi-si, i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi u-s-ga-nv-tsv na-gi-wa-dv-hv-na ge-sv-i.

041905.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏓᏳᎾᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎸᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᏧᏣᏲᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏄᏮᎩ ᎩᎦᎨ ᎠᏄᏬ.  ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ.
041905.english: Then came Jesus forth, wearing the crown of thorns, and the purple robe. And Pilate saith unto them, Behold the man!
041905.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no da-yu-na-nu-go-tsv-gi, u-li-s-du-lv-gi a-li-s-du-lo tsu-tsa-yo-s-di go-tlv-ta-nv-hi, a-le u-nu-wv-gi gi-ga-ge a-nu-wo.  Qua-le-di-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Gv-ni-yu-quo hi-a na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya.

041906.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏂᏱᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᎪᎲ, ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᏯᏛᎥᎦ!  ᎯᏯᏛᎥᎦ! ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏂᎯ ᎡᏣᏗᎿᎭᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏣᏛᎥᎦ; ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏩᏘᎭ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
041906.english: When the chief priests therefore and officers saw him, they cried out, saying, Crucify him, crucify him. Pilate saith unto them, Take ye him, and crucify him: for I find no fault in him.
041906.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-na-da-ni-yi-s-gi gv-wa-go-hv, u-ne-lu-nv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Hi-ya-dv-v-ga!  hi-ya-dv-v-ga! Qua-le-di hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Ni-hi e-tsa-di-hna-wi-dv, a-le e-tsa-dv-v-ga; a-yv-ye-no v-tla yi-tsi-wa-ti-ha u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

041907.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᎠ ᏫᏅᎬᏩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎣᎩᎭ, ᏦᎩᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎸᏅᎩ.
041907.english: The Jews answered him, We have a law, and by our law he ought to die, because he made himself the Son of God.
041907.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si hi-a wi-nv-gv-wa-we-se-lv-gi; Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di o-gi-ha, tso-gi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-no ni-gv-nv ye-li-quo gv-wa-yo-hu-hi-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no U-we-tsi u-tse-lv-nv-gi.

041908.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏍᎦᎸᎩ;
041908.english: When Pilate therefore heard that saying, he was the more afraid;
041908.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di na-s-gi u-dv-ga-nv u-tli i-ga-i u-s-ga-lv-gi;

041909.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏴᎸᎩ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᏫᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏥᏌ; ᎭᏢ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ?  ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏁᏤᎴᎢ.
041909.english: And went again into the judgment hall, and saith unto Jesus, Whence art thou? But Jesus gave him no answer.
041909.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne u-yv-lv-gi di-gu-go-do-di-yi, hi-a wi-nu-we-se-lv-gi Tsi-sa; Ha-tlv nv-da-tsa-da-le-nv-hi?  A-se-no Tsi-sa v-tla yu-ne-tse-le-i.

041910.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏍᎩᏁᏤᎭ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᎦᏔᎭ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎦᎬᏯᏛᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎦᎬᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
041910.english: Then saith Pilate unto him, Speakest thou not unto me? knowest thou not that I have power to crucify thee, and have power to release thee?
041910.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; Tla-s-go yi-s-gi-ne-tse-ha?  Tla-s-go yi-ga-ta-ha ye-li-quo ga-gv-ya-dv-di ge-sv-i, a-le ye-li-quo di-ga-gv-yo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i?

041911.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᏣᎭ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏍᏋᏁᏗᏱ, ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏰᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᏗᎩᏲᏒᎯ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏣᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎡᏉᎯᏳ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ.
041911.english: Jesus answered, Thou couldest have no power at all against me, except it were given thee from above: therefore he that delivered me unto thee hath the greater sin.
041911.phonetic: Tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla yi-ge-tsa-ha ye-li a-yv go-hu-s-di s-quv-ne-di-yi, ga-lv-la-di nv-da-ye-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, a-yv di-gi-yo-sv-hi ni-hi di-tsa-yo-hi-se-lv-hi u-tli e-quo-hi-yu u-s-ga-nv-tsv.

041912.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎤᏲᎸᎩ ᎥᎤᏪᎪᏗᏱ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎢᎯᏯᎧᏅᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏏᏌ ᎢᏍᏓᎵᎢ ᏱᎦᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᎩᎶ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏤᎸᏍᎩ, ᎧᏁᎬ ᏏᏌ ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
041912.english: And from thenceforth Pilate sought to release him: but the Jews cried out, saying, If thou let this man go, thou art not Caesar's friend: whosoever maketh himself a king speaketh against Caesar.
041912.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-no i-yu-da-le-nv-dv Qua-le-di u-yo-lv-gi v-u-we-go-di-yi.  A-se-no A-ni-tsu-si u-ne-lu-nv-gi, hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; I-yu-no hi-a a-s-ga-ya i-hi-ya-ka-nv-ha v-tla Si-sa i-s-da-li-i yi-ga-ge-se-s-di.  Gi-lo u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-tse-lv-s-gi, ka-ne-gv Si-sa a-tlu-di-s-go-i.

041913.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏄᎪᏫᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏅᎩ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᏅᏯ-ᎠᏰᏍᏓᎥ ᏕᎤᏙᎥᎢ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎨᏆᏓ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ.
041913.english: When Pilate therefore heard that saying, he brought Jesus forth, and sat down in the judgment seat in a place that is called the Pavement, but in the Hebrew, Gabbatha.
041913.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di Qua-le-di na-s-gi u-dv-ga-nv u-nu-go-wi-sv-gi Tsi-sa, a-le u-we-nv-gi di-gu-go-do-di-yi ga-s-gi-lv-i, Nv-ya--a-ye-s-da-v de-u-do-v-i, A-ni-tsu-si-s-gi-ni u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv Ge-qua-da de-u-do-v.

041914.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩᏃ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ!
041914.english: And it was the preparation of the passover, and about the sixth hour: and he saith unto the Jews, Behold your King!
041914.phonetic: Ka-no-hi-ye-gi-no di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi i-ga ge-sv-gi, a-le ta-la-du i-yu-tli-lo-dv i-yv-dv ka-la-wa-di-sv ge-sv-gi, Qua-le-di-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi A-ni-tsu-si; Gv-ni-yu-quo U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsa-tse-li-ga!

041915.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᏉ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏒᎩ; ᎯᎷᎦ!  ᎯᎷᎦ!  ᎯᏯᏛᎥᎦ!  ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏓᏥᏯᏛᏂᏍᎪ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ?  ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᏲᎩᎧᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏏᏌ ᎤᏩᏒ!
041915.english: But they cried out, Away with him, away with him, crucify him. Pilate saith unto them, Shall I crucify your King? The chief priest answered, We have no king but Caesar.
041915.phonetic: A-se-no u-ne-lu-nv-quo hi-a nu-ni-we-sv-gi; Hi-lu-ga!  hi-lu-ga!  hi-ya-dv-v-ga!  Qua-le-di hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi; Da-tsi-ya-dv-ni-s-go i-tsa-tse-li-ga U-gv-wi-yu-hi?  Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi; V-tla yo-gi-ka-ha u-gv-wi-yu-hi, Si-sa u-wa-sv!

041916.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᎾᏛᏗᏱ.  ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏛᎩᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏘᎾᏫᏛᎲᎩ.
041916.english: Then delivered he him therefore unto them to be crucified. And they took Jesus, and led him away.
041916.phonetic: Hna-quo-no du-yo-hi-se-lv-gi u-na-dv-di-yi.  U-ni-ni-yv-dv-gi-no Tsi-sa a-le u-na-ti-na-wi-dv-hv-gi.

041917.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ ᎦᏁᎲᎩ ᎤᏄᎪᏨᎩ, ᎤᏍᏆᎷᎪ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎵᎦᏓ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
041917.english: And he bearing his cross went forth into a place called the place of a skull, which is called in the Hebrew Golgotha:
041917.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no tsu-da-hna-wa-dv ga-ne-hv-gi u-nu-go-tsv-gi, u-s-qua-lu-go du-do-v u-lu-tsv-gi, na-s-gi Go-li-ga-da du-do-v A-ni-tsu-si u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv a-nv-di-s-gv-i;

041918.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎬᏩᏛᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᎨᎦᏛᏅᎩ ᎢᏧᎳ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏥᏌᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ.
041918.english: Where they crucified him, and two other with him, on either side one, and Jesus in the midst.
041918.phonetic: Na-hna-ni gv-wa-dv-nv-gi, a-le a-ni-ta-li nv-wa-na-da-le i-tsu-la-ha de-ge-ga-dv-nv-gi i-tsu-la i-di-tlv Tsi-sa-no a-ye-li.

041919.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎩ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎤᏪᏯᎸᏅᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎩ; ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ, ᎤᎬᏫᏩᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
041919.english: And Pilate wrote a title, and put it on the cross. And the writing was, JESUS OF NAZARETH THE KING OF THE JEWS.
041919.phonetic: Qua-le-di-no u-wo-we-la-nv-gi a-go-li-ye-di, a-le da-da-hna-wa-s-dv u-we-ya-lv-nv-gi; hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-gi; Tsi-Sa Na-Se-Li-Di E-Hi, U-Gv-Wi-Wa-Hi A-Ni-Tsu-Si U-Na-Tse-Li-Ga.

041920.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏗ ᎤᏂᏣᏛ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᏂᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎩ, ᏥᏌᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏛᏅ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎾᎥ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎶᎻ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎪᏪᎸᎩ.
041920.english: This title then read many of the Jews: for the place where Jesus was crucified was nigh to the city: and it was written in Hebrew, and Greek, and Latin.
041920.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi a-go-li-ye-di u-ni-tsa-dv A-ni-tsu-si a-ni-go-li-ye-s-gv-gi, Tsi-sa-ye-no a-ga-dv-nv ga-du-hv na-v ge-sv-gi, A-ni-tsu-si-no, a-le A-ni-go-i, a-le A-ni-lo-mi tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv go-we-lv-gi.

041921.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏆᎴᏗ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏨᏁᎸ ᏦᏪᎳᏅᎩ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ; ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
041921.english: Then said the chief priests of the Jews to Pilate, Write not, The King of the Jews; but that he said, I am King of the Jews.
041921.phonetic: Hna-quo-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi A-ni-tsu-si tsu-na-tse-li-ga hi-a nu-ni-we-se-lv-gi Qua-le-di; Tle-s-di hi-a i-tsv-ne-lv tso-we-la-nv-gi; U-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga; hi-a-s-gi-ni; A-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tse-li-ga a-di-s-gv-gi.

041922.cherokee: ᏆᎴᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᏥᎾᏋᏁᎸ ᏣᏉᏪᎳᏅ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏉᏪᎳᏅ.
041922.english: Pilate answered, What I have written I have written.
041922.phonetic: Qua-le-di hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Tsi-na-quv-ne-lv tsa-quo-we-la-nv, hna-quo a-se a-quo-we-la-nv.

041923.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᏥᏌ ᎬᏩᏛᏅ, ᏚᏂᏁᏒᎩ ᏧᏄᏬ, ᏅᎩ ᏂᏚᏂᏛᎩ, ᏌᏉ ᎢᎦᏛᎯ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏄᏅᏁᎸᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎭᏫᏂ ᎤᏄᏬᎥᎯ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎭᏫᏂ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎥᏝ ᎦᏰᏫᏛ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᏂᎬ ᎬᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ.
041923.english: Then the soldiers, when they had crucified Jesus, took his garments, and made four parts, to every soldier a part; and also his coat: now the coat was without seam, woven from the top throughout.
041923.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi, Tsi-sa gv-wa-dv-nv, du-ni-ne-sv-gi tsu-nu-wo, nv-gi ni-du-ni-dv-gi, sa-quo i-ga-dv-hi a-si-yv-wi a-ya-wi-s-gi u-tse-li-ga nu-nv-ne-lv-gi; a-le na-s-quo ha-wi-ni u-nu-wo-v-hi.  Na-s-gi ha-wi-ni a-nu-wo v-tla ga-ye-wi-dv yi-ge-se-i, ni-gv gv-nv-hi ge-sv-gi.

041924.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎩᏣᎦᎸᎢᏒᎩ, ᎢᏓᏎᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ; ᏚᏂᏯᏙᎸᎩ ᏗᏆᏄᏬ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏄᏬᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏌᏍᏔᏅᎩ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎩ.
041924.english: They said therefore among themselves, Let us not rend it, but cast lots for it, whose it shall be: that the scripture might be fulfilled, which saith, They parted my raiment among them, and for my vesture they did cast lots. These things therefore the soldiers did.
041924.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-lv-gi; Tle-s-di i-gi-tsa-ga-lv-i-sv-gi, i-da-se-hi-quo-s-gi-ni i-da-do-le-ho-hi u-tse-li-ga i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i; u-do-hi-yu-di-yi go-we-lv hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv; Du-ni-ya-do-lv-gi di-qua-nu-wo, a-le a-qua-nu-wo-s-di u-na-sa-s-ta-nv-gi.  Hi-a na-s-gi a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi nu-na-dv-ne-lv-gi.

041925.cherokee: ᎾᎥᏃ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏛᎢ ᎠᏂᏙᎾᎥᎩ ᎤᏥ, ᎤᏂᏃ ᎤᎸᎢ ᎺᎵ ᏟᎣᏆ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎺᎵᏃ ᎹᎩᏕᎵ ᎡᎯ.
041925.english: Now there stood by the cross of Jesus his mother, and his mother's sister, Mary the wife of Cleophas, and Mary Magdalene.
041925.phonetic: Na-v-no da-da-hna-wa-s-dv Tsi-sa ga-dv-i a-ni-do-na-v-gi u-tsi, u-ni-no u-lv-i Me-li Tli-o-qua u-da-li-i, Me-li-no Ma-gi-de-li e-hi.

041926.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎤᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎾᎥ ᎦᏙᎬ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᎨᏳᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᏥ; ᎯᎨᏴ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏤᏥ.
041926.english: When Jesus therefore saw his mother, and the disciple standing by, whom he loved, he saith unto his mother, Woman, behold thy son!
041926.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-go-hv u-tsi, a-le u-go-hv na-v ga-do-gv u-s-da-wa-di-do-hi u-ge-yu-hi, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-gi u-tsi; Hi-ge-yv, Gv-ni-yu-quo tse-tsi.

041927.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏅᎤᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏣᏥᎢ.  ᎾᎯᏳᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᏪᏅᏒ ᏭᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
041927.english: Then saith he to the disciple, Behold thy mother! And from that hour that disciple took her unto his own home.
041927.phonetic: Hna-quo-no hi-a nv-u-we-se-lv-gi u-s-da-wa-di-do-hi; Gv-ni-yu-quo tsa-tsi-i.  Na-hi-yu-quo-no na-s-gi u-s-da-wa-di-do-hi tsu-we-nv-sv wu-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi.

041928.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏛᎢ, ᎪᏪᎸ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ, ᎠᎩᏔᏕᎩᎭ, ᎤᏛᏅᎩ.
041928.english: After this, Jesus knowing that all things were now accomplished, that the scripture might be fulfilled, saith, I thirst.
041928.phonetic: Hna-quo-no Tsi-sa a-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-v hna-quo u-li-s-qua-dv-i, go-we-lv u-do-hi-yu-di-yi, A-gi-ta-de-gi-ha, u-dv-nv-gi.

041929.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎥᎦᎧᎲᎩ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᏧᏂᏦᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᎧᎵᏬᎯ; ᏚᏬᎢᎵᏃ ᏧᏂᏦᏯᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎧᎵᎢᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏏᏈ ᎤᏂᏆᏙᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎰᎵ ᎾᎥ ᎤᏂᏩᏌᏔᏅᎩ.
041929.english: Now there was set a vessel full of vinegar: and they filled a spunge with vinegar, and put it upon hyssop, and put it to his mouth.
041929.phonetic: Na-hna-no v-ga-ka-hv-gi a-te-li-do tsu-ni-tso-ya-s-di a-ka-li-wo-hi; du-wo-i-li-no tsu-ni-tso-ya-s-di u-ni-ka-li-i-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le na-s-gi hi-si-qui u-ni-qua-do-ta-nv-gi, a-ho-li na-v u-ni-wa-sa-ta-nv-gi.

041930.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏧᏂᏦᏯᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎩᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏓ; ᎤᎵᏍᎫᏫᏒᏃ ᏕᎤᏲᏒᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ.
041930.english: When Jesus therefore had received the vinegar, he said, It is finished: and he bowed his head, and gave up the ghost.
041930.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no tsu-ni-tso-ya-s-di u-ne-gi-sv hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; Hna-quo a-li-s-qua-da; u-li-s-gu-wi-sv-no de-u-yo-sv-gi u-da-nv-do.

041931.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᎤᏂᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ ᏆᎴᏗ ᏗᏂᏅᏍᎨᏂ ᏗᎨᏥᏍᏆᎵᏎᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏥᏁᏍᏗᏱ, ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᏱᏗᎦᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏁᎵᏍᎬᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏙᏓᏆᏍᎬ ᎢᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎩ.
041931.english: The Jews therefore, because it was the preparation, that the bodies should not remain upon the cross on the sabbath day, (for that sabbath day was an high day,) besought Pilate that their legs might be broken, and that they might be taken away.
041931.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si-no u-ni-ta-yo-se-lv-gi Qua-le-di di-ni-nv-s-ge-ni di-ge-tsi-s-qua-li-se-di-yi a-le di-ge-tsi-ne-s-di-yi, nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi a-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi i-ga ge-sv-i, tle-s-di u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv yi-di-ga-de-s-di a-ne-li-s-gv-gi, na-s-gi-ye-no u-na-do-da-qua-s-gv i-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-gi.

041932.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏨᎩ, ᏚᏂᏍᏆᎵᏒᎩ ᏗᎦᏅᏍᎨᏂ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎦᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏐᎢ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏥᏌ ᏗᎨᎦᏛᏅᎯ.
041932.english: Then came the soldiers, and brake the legs of the first, and of the other which was crucified with him.
041932.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi u-ni-lu-tsv-gi, du-ni-s-qua-li-sv-gi di-ga-nv-s-ge-ni i-gv-yi-yi ga-di a-le so-i i-tsu-la-ha Tsi-sa di-ge-ga-dv-nv-hi.

041933.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᏛ ᏭᏂᎷᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏂᏍᏆᎵᏎ ᏗᎦᏅᏍᎨᏂ;
041933.english: But when they came to Jesus, and saw that he was dead already, they brake not his legs:
041933.phonetic: Tsi-sa-s-gi-ni ga-dv wu-ni-lu-tsv, a-le u-na-do-le-ho-sv ga-yu-la u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla yi-du-ni-s-qua-li-se di-ga-nv-s-ge-ni;

041934.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᏗᏓᏘᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᏘᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏍᏉᎨᏂ, ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᏓᏳᏨᏨᎩ ᎩᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎹ.
041934.english: But one of the soldiers with a spear pierced his side, and forthwith came there out blood and water.
041934.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-s-gi-ni a-ya-wi-s-gi, di-da-ti-s-di u-we-ti-s-ta-nv-gi a-s-quo-ge-ni, gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv na-hna da-yu-tsv-tsv-gi gi-gv a-le a-ma.

041935.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎩ, ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏦᎯᏳᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
041935.english: And he that saw it bare record, and his record is true: and he knoweth that he saith true, that ye might believe.
041935.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na u-go-hv-hi u-no-he-lv-gi, ka-no-he-s-gv-no u-do-hi-yu-ha, a-le a-ga-ta-ha u-do-hi-yu-hi ka-no-he-s-gv-i, na-s-gi ge-tso-hi-yu-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

041936.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ; "ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉ ᎤᎪᎳ ᏧᎵᏍᏆᎵᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ."
041936.english: For these things were done, that the scripture should be fulfilled, A bone of him shall not be broken.
041936.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi u-do-hi-yu-di-yi go-we-lv hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv; "V-tla sa-quo u-go-la tsu-li-s-qua-li-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di."

041937.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏩᎭ; "ᏙᏓᎬᏩᎧᎾᏂ ᏗᎬᏪᏘᎸᎯ."
041937.english: And again another scripture saith, They shall look on him whom they pierced.
041937.phonetic: A-le-wo nv-wa-da-le go-we-lv hi-a ni-ga-wa-ha; "Do-da-gv-wa-ka-na-ni di-gv-we-ti-lv-hi."

041938.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎣᏂ ᏦᏩ ᎠᎵᎹᏗᏱ ᎡᎯ, ᏥᏌ ᎠᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏛᏉ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏓᏍᎦᎢᎲᎢ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏩ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ ᏆᎴᏗ ᎤᏁᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.  ᏆᎴᏗᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎩ.  ᎰᏩᏃ ᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᎤᏁᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.
041938.english: And after this Joseph of Arimathaea, being a disciple of Jesus, but secretly for fear of the Jews, besought Pilate that he might take away the body of Jesus: and Pilate gave him leave. He came therefore, and took the body of Jesus.
041938.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv o-ni Tso-wa A-li-ma-di-yi e-hi, Tsi-sa a-s-da-wa-di-do-hi ge-sv-gi, a-se-no u-de-li-dv-quo A-ni-tsu-si da-s-ga-i-hv-i nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi, na-s-gi Tso-wa u-ta-yo-se-lv-gi Qua-le-di u-ne-s-di-yi Tsi-sa a-ye-lv-i.  Qua-le-di-no u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-gi.  Ho-wa-no u-lu-tsv-gi u-ne-sv-gi Tsi-sa a-ye-lv-i.

041939.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎥᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᎹᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏃᏱ ᎤᎷᏤᎸᎯ, ᎤᏲᎸᎩ ᏗᏜᏓᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎻᎳ ᎡᎳᏫᏃ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ.
041939.english: And there came also Nicodemus, which at the first came to Jesus by night, and brought a mixture of myrrh and aloes, about an hundred pound weight.
041939.phonetic: Na-s-quo-no v-u-lu-tsv-gi Ni-ga-di-ma-si, na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi Tsi-sa e-no-yi u-lu-tse-lv-hi, u-yo-lv-gi di-dla-s-ta-nv-hi mi-la e-la-wi-no, a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui i-yv-dv i-yu-da-ge-dv.

041940.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏂᏁᏒᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏙᎴᏛ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏂᏣᏄᎶᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᏚᏂᏣᏄᎳᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏓᎾᏓᏂᏌ.
041940.english: Then took they the body of Jesus, and wound it in linen clothes with the spices, as the manner of the Jews is to bury.
041940.phonetic: Hna-quo-no u-ni-ne-sv-gi Tsi-sa a-ye-lv-i a-le do-le-dv a-nu-wo u-ni-tsa-nu-lo-ta-nv-gi, a-le na-s-quo di-ga-wa-sv-gi du-ni-tsa-nu-la-nv-gi, na-s-gi-ya i-yu-na-dv-ne-di ge-sv A-ni-tsu-si da-na-da-ni-sa.
